entries.title: 界面风格详细
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/模版/编程/界面风格详细.txt
entries.summary: 浅色系清新简洁:使用柔和的浅色调，简洁的布局，清晰的视觉层次
entries.prompt:
浅色系清新简洁:使用柔和的浅色调，简洁的布局，清晰的视觉层次
深色系金属科幻:采用深色背景，金属质感元素，科技感十足的界面设计
自然生态风格:使用自然色调，有机形状，生态友好的设计元素
极简主义:极简的界面设计，留白空间充足，重点突出核心功能
复古怀旧:采用复古配色，经典设计元素，怀旧风格的界面
未来科技感:使用霓虹色调，动态效果，未来感十足的界面设计
商务专业:采用专业的配色方案，规整的布局，突出商务属性
艺术创意:富有创意的设计元素，独特的视觉表现，艺术感强
游戏风格:动感的界面设计，游戏化元素，互动性强
工业风格:粗犷的设计元素，工业质感，功能性强

en.title: Detailed interface style
en.summary: Light colors are fresh and simple: use soft light colors, simple layout, and clear visual hierarchy
en.prompt:
Light colors are fresh and simple: use soft light colors, simple layout, and clear visual hierarchy
Dark metal science fiction: using dark background, metal texture elements, and technological interface design
Natural Eco Style: Use natural tones, organic shapes, and eco-friendly design elements
Minimalism: minimalist interface design, ample white space, focusing on core functions
Retro and nostalgic: using retro color matching, classic design elements, and nostalgic style interface
Sense of future technology: Use neon tones, dynamic effects, and futuristic interface design
Business major: Adopt professional color scheme and regular layout to highlight business attributes
Artistic creativity: Creative design elements, unique visual expression, and strong artistic sense
Game style: dynamic interface design, gamification elements, strong interactivity
Industrial style: Rugged design elements, industrial texture, strong functionality

entries.title: 任务
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/模版/运营/任务.txt
entries.summary: 把下文做同义词替换，保持原意、时态、语序不变，仅替换 30% 词汇
entries.prompt:
把下文做同义词替换，保持原意、时态、语序不变，仅替换 30% 词汇。
保留原文全部信息，但把每句话的句式（主动被动、倒装、从句顺序）至少改动一次。
把带有明显情绪或营销色彩的段落改写成“中性、客观、无形容词堆砌”的通稿体。
把下列说明文改写成 1 篇小红书笔记，带标题、emoji、分段、结尾 CTA。
把论文段落改写成 800 字口播稿，含“开场钩子→故事引入→硬核解读→互动提问”。
把网络热帖改写成“通知”体，带标题、主送机关、三段式（背景-措施-要求）。
把现代新闻改写成维多利亚时期社论风格。
把科普文改写成霓虹味赛博旁白。
把现代散文改写成文言，保留全部信息。
把任意文章压至 50 字内，保留 5W1H。
把 200 字摘要扩写成 2000 字深度稿，加案例、数据、金句。
在改写中自然植入给定关键词 5 次，密度 2%-3%。
把段落改写至 Turnitin 单篇重复率 <5%，同时保持引用编号不变。
把中文综述段落译成英文学术体，使用被动语态、名词化、逻辑连接词。
把第三人称新闻改写成第一人称（当事人）视角。
把顺时报道改写成倒叙+插叙，制造悬念。
把普通话新闻改写成粤语书面语，保留粤语特有字（嘅、咗、噉）。
把通稿改写成东北方言段子。
把涉及敏感人名、地名、机构的段落做合规脱敏，同时保证读者看懂。
把成人向报道改写成 10 岁孩子能读的短文。
为[产品/服务，如：一款国产精华]创作一篇小红书种草笔记。
请根据用户指定的【风格】【长度】【受众】【关键词】四个变量，对下文进行改写。
撰写一篇以“[核心关键词]”为核心的长篇干货文章，目的是获取谷歌/Baidu自然搜索流量，并引导读者完成[下载/咨询/购买]动作。
撰写一份关于“[某个行业趋势，如：AIGC在内容创作领域的应用]”的行业分析报告摘要。
帮我完善/撰写关于“[你的论文主题]”论文中的“[具体部分，如：文献综述、研究方法]”部分。
以一个“[故事核，如：当你一觉醒来，发现所有人都能听见你的心声]”为开头，展开一个短篇故事。
为一条关于“[话题，如：如何克服拖延症]”的知识类短视频撰写口播脚本。

en.title: Tasks
en.summary: Replace the following text with synonyms, maintaining the original, current state, language order, and replace only 30% of the vocabulary
en.prompt:
Replaces the following with synonyms, maintaining the original, current state, language order, and replacing only 30% of the vocabulary.
Retain all the information in the original text, but at least one change in the wording of each sentence (actively passive, inverted, in the order of the sentence).
Reformulate paragraphs with obvious emotional or marketing colours to read “neutral, objective, without adjectives”.
Reformulate the following narrative to a small red book note with title, emoji, subparagraph, end of CTA.
Reformulate the paper paragraphs to 800 words, including “introduction of hook-to-tread stories into hard-core readings and interactive questions”.
Reformulate web hotspots into “notifications” with headings, main sender, three-part format (background-measures-request).
Rewrite modern news into Victorian editorial style.
I'd like to rewrite Coptic into a neon-flavored Saber.
Reformulate modern scripts into scripts and retain all information.
Keep 5W1H for any article in 50 words.
Expand the 200-word summary into a 2,000-word depth draft, with cases, data, gold phrases.
Natural implantation of a given keyword 5 times in rewrite, density 2-3%.
Reformulates the paragraphs to Turnitin with a single repetition rate of < 5 per cent, while maintaining the reference number unchanged.
Translation of the Chinese summary paragraphs into the English academic body, using passive language, terminology and logical links.
Reformulate the third person ' s press into a first person ' s (party) perspective.
Recast back-to-back reports into narratives + illustrations to create suspense.
The Mandarin News has been reworded into Cantonese written language, which retains its own.
Rewrite the draft into an East-North dialect.
Compliance with paragraph(s) relating to sensitive personal names, geographical names and institutions is de-sensitive, while ensuring that readers understand them.
To rewrite the adult story into a short text for a 10-year-old child.
To create a sketchbook for [products/services, e.g., a national product].
Please rewrite the following text according to the four variables designated by the user [style] [audience] [keywords].
Author of a long dry article at the heart of [core keywords] to capture Google/Baidu natural search traffic and guide readers to complete [download/advisory/purchase] actions.
Preparation of a summary of an industry analysis report on “[Trends in a given industry, e.g. the application of AIGC in the field of content creation]”.
Help me to refine/authorise the “[specific parts, e.g.: literature overview, research methodology]” part of the paper on [the theme of your paper].
Start with a short story: “When you wake up, everyone can hear you”.
Writing oral scripts for a short, knowledge-based video on “[topics, such as how to overcome delay]”.

entries.title: 要求
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/模版/运营/要求.txt
entries.summary: 禁止出现原文重复词；禁止改变专有名词
entries.prompt:
禁止出现原文重复词；禁止改变专有名词。
不得删减退回任何细节；不得改变术语。
删除夸张副词/形容词；用数据或事实替代主观感受。
口语化、第一人称、用“姐妹”“冲”等社区黑话；关键信息靠前；加 3 个相关标签。
用“我们”拉近距离；关键数据必须口语换算（“相当于 10 个足球场”）。
用“请”“确需”“严禁”等规范词汇；全文禁用叹号、网络用语。
使用复杂倒装、插入语、拉丁词源大词；加入道德评价；每段至少 1 处反讽。
植入科技黑话、日语借词、动词名词化；用“咱”“哥们”称呼读者；每句≤15 字。
用典不超过 2 处；人名地名保留。
用阿拉伯数字替代汉字数字；删助词。
插入 3 处权威数据（标注来源）；用“故事-分析-总结”三段式。
关键词不可堆叠在 1 句；出现位置：首段 1、中段 2、尾段 1、小标题 1。
同一句子 7 字以上连续重复必须改写；专业术语可保留。
用“However, Moreover”等连接；缩写点第一次给出全称。
加入心理描写；用过去时；每段 1 处感官细节（嗅觉/触觉）。
先给结果，再逐层揭秘；每段以时间戳开头。
用“佢”“系”替代“他”“是”；保持 30% 口语词。
用“咋整”“嘎哈”“得劲儿”；每句必须带儿化音≥1。
用“某+行业/职务”替代；保留时间、数据。
用比喻；句长≤12 字；生僻词后加括号解释。
必须有清晰的行动号召（CTA）
引导互动，例如：“姐妹们还有推荐吗？”“评论区抽一个送同款！”
不仅要总结，还要有适度的批判性思考，指出现有研究的空白。
总结核心价值，并强烈引导点赞、关注和评论（“你还有什么拖延难题？评论区告诉我！”）。

en.title: Request
en.summary: Prohibition of repetition of original language; prohibition of changes in proprietary terms
en.prompt:
It is prohibited to repeat words in the original language; it is prohibited to change the terminology.
No details may be deleted or returned; no terminology may be changed.
Delete exaggeration adjectives/ adjectives; replace subjective feelings with data or facts.
Oral, first-person, “sister” and other community whispers; key information in front; plus 3 related labels.
Close distance using "we"; key data must be translated in word (“equivalent to 10 football fields”).
Use normative terms such as “please” “require” “restricted”; ban sighes, web-based terms throughout the text.
Use complex inverts, insertions, Latin verbs; add an ethical evaluation; at least 1 inverse in each paragraph.
Infusion of technical black words, Japanese descriptors, verbs; use of the word “we” to refer to readers; 15 words per sentence.
Use of no more than 2 gazetteers; retention of place names.
Arabic numerals replace Chinese numerals; delete assistive words.
Inserts 3 authoritative data (indicating source); uses the " Story-Analysis-Summary " format.
Keywords cannot be stacked in one sentence; location: first paragraph 1, middle paragraph 2, end paragraph 1, subheading 1.
The same sentence 7 consecutive repetitions must be reworded; professional terms may be retained.
Links such as "However, Moreover" are used; initials give full names for the first time.
Add psychological representation; past use; 1 symmetry detail (sniff/tactile).
The results are given first, and then the layers are revealed; each paragraph starts with a time stamp.
Replace "he" with "it" instead of "yes”; keep 30% of the words spoken.
Use the word "how" as "ga-ha" as a "gha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha!
Replace with “a + industry/function”; retain time, data.
Use metaphors; phrases long ~12; isolated words followed by explanation in brackets.
There must be a clear call to action (CTA)
To guide interaction, for example: “Does the sisters recommend it?” “The comment area draws a gift of the same kind!”
There is a need not only to summarize but also to reflect critically on the gaps in existing research.
Summarize the core values and strongly guide the praises, concerns and comments (“What more do you have to delay? Comment areas tell me!”).

entries.title: 负面限制
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/模版/运营/负面限制.txt
entries.summary: 禁用学术词、被动句、长从句
entries.prompt:
禁用学术词、被动句、长从句。
禁止出现 LaTeX、引用角标。
禁止出现第一人称。
禁用现代缩写（can’t→cannot）。
禁止出现“未来”一词（已默认未来）。
禁止出现“的”“了”等白话虚词。
禁止出现“等等”“略”。
禁止灌水重复。
禁止关键词生硬拼接。
禁止改变变量符号、公式。
禁止 Chinglish 直译。
禁止出现“笔者”“记者”。
禁止额外添加人物。
禁止生造字。
禁止改变事实指向。
禁止引入原文以外的事实。
禁止出现暴力、性暗示。

en.title: Negative restrictions
en.summary: Disable academic words, passive sentences, long sentences
en.prompt:
Academic terms, passive sentences, long sentences are prohibited.
The presence of LaTeX and the reference to the horns is prohibited.
It is prohibited to have a first-person name.
Disable modern acronyms (can'tcannot).
The term “future” is prohibited (the future has been acquiesced).
It is prohibited to appear in words such as “the” or “the” or “the” or the other.
It is prohibited to appear “and so forth” to be “abridged”.
Duplication of irrigation is prohibited.
It is prohibited to spell keywords hard.
It is prohibited to change variable symbols, formulae.
Direct translator for Chinglich is prohibited.
“The presence of a journalist who is a “pen” is prohibited.
The addition of additional persons is prohibited.
It's forbidden to make a living.
It is prohibited to change the direction of the facts.
The introduction of facts other than the original is prohibited.
Violence and sexual insinuations are prohibited.

entries.title: 输出格式
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/模版/运营/输出格式.txt
entries.summary: 仅返回改写后正文，不解释
entries.prompt:
仅返回改写后正文，不解释。
用编号 1) 2) 3) 对应原文句子，每句给出改写。
一段到底，≤150 字。
标题+正文+标签，总字数 250±20。
分镜序号+口播文本，【】内标注画面/音效。
Word 样式标题+正文，总字数 400±50。
三段式社论，总字数 300±30。
一段到底，总字数 120±10。
不加标点，用句读断句。
仅 1 行。
标题+正文，分 3 节，每节加小标题。
标题（含关键词）+正文+Meta 描述 150 字。
仅返回改写后正文，保留 \cite{}。
一段英文，总字数 180±20。
日记体，日期+正文。
5 段，每段≤80 字。
一段到底，总字数 150±20。
对话体，2 人，共 5 句。
仅返回改写后正文，用【】标出 3 处改动。
一段，总字数 200±20。
多分段，每段不超过2行。必须合理使用相关标签，例如：#护肤 #国货之光 #好物分享。

A paragraph in the end, ~150 words.
Title + body + label, total number of words 250 ~ 20.
Shaped mirror serial number + oral text with image/sounds in [ ].
Word Style Title + Body, total 400 ± 50 words.
Three-part editorials, total words 300 ± 30.
At the end of the paragraph, the total number of words is 120 ~10.
Without a peg, read out a sentence.
Only 1 line.
Title + body, divided into 3 sections, with subheadings for each section.
Title (including keywords) + body + Meta description 150 words.
Rewrite text only, keep \cite{}.
A paragraph in English with a total of 180 ± 20 words.
Journal, date + body.
5 Paragraphs, each paragraph ____80 words.
In the end, the total number of words is 150 ~ 20.
Dialogue group, 2 people, 5 sentences.
Only rewrite text is returned and changes of 3 are marked with [].
A paragraph with a total of 200 per 20 words.
Several subparagraphs, each of which does not exceed two rows. The labels must be used reasonably, such as: #Skinguard # Light of the State's Goods # Good Things Sharing.
Use of a regulated business reporting format, multi-level number (1, 1.1, 1.1.1).

entries.title: AI小说生成器
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/生成/小说/AI小说生成器.csv
entries.summary: 请帮我写一篇修仙小说： 你是一位精通玄幻小说创作的顶级网文作家，擅长构建宏大的修仙体系和异界世界观
entries.prompt:
请帮我写一篇修仙小说： 你是一位精通玄幻小说创作的顶级网文作家，擅长构建宏大的修仙体系和异界世界观。你深知全部修仙套路，能够巧妙地设计各种奇遇、宝物、功法和灵兽。你的文字充满想象力，善于描绘激烈的修炼突破场景、惊心动魄的斗法过程，以及主角一步步登临巅峰的爽感历程。每次生成小说内容2200字数到3000字数之间自由发挥。字数不满3000字以及低于3000字需要进行扩写到符合字数为止。
小说名称： 幽冥仙途
小说分类： 修仙小说
写作风格为： 幽默风趣
小说类型： 修仙
逆袭
金手指
小说频道： 男频
主要设定
世界设定： 世界名称:大夏国 核心设定:修仙飞升仙界
主角姓名： 顾北辰
主角描述： 20岁,出身低微的采药少年。他体内蕴藏着上古仙人的一缕残魂,这是他的金手指,但也是他的隐患。顾北辰性格坚韧,有着追求大道的执着,但因出身常被人轻视。
次要角色： 柳如烟
次要角色描述： 女主穿成被陷害致死的贵族小姐，暗中收集证据揭露幕后黑手，巧妙利用宫廷权谋反杀敌人，最终掌控朝局，翻转命运。
小说故事梗概： 采药少年顾北辰意外觉醒体内上古仙魂,获得惊人修炼天赋。这既是机遇,也是隐患——仙魂在助他修炼的同时,也在吞噬他的神识。
在青云宗崭露头角后,顾北辰被卷入各大势力的明争暗斗中。为寻求真相与自保,他离开宗门,踏上云游修炼之路。途中他揭开了震惊九州的秘密:各方势力正在寻找上古仙人转世,意图称霸天下。
面对体内仙魂的威胁、各方势力的觊觎,以及日渐崩塌的修仙世界秩序,顾北辰必须在逆境中崛起,寻找自身与天下的生机。
章节数目： 总共10章
每一章字数： 2500-3500字
创造规则： **角色设定**:第一章必须为主角设定名字、性别、年龄和性格，为重要配角也设定名字和性格特点，后续章节保持一致。
**修炼体系**:清晰展现修炼等级差距，突破场景要有仪式感，灵气描写要生动。
**战斗场景**:法术对轰要有画面感，越级挑战要合理，主角优势要明显但不降智。
**奇遇设定**:宝物出现要有伏笔，机缘巧合要自然，收获要让读者感到爽快。

en.title: AI novel generator
en.summary: Write me a fairy novel: you're a top webwriter with a master of the art of the art of the art, and you're good at building a grand system of the art and a world view of the world.
en.prompt:
Write me a fairy novel: you are a top-class webwriter with a mastery of novels, who is good at building grand alchemistry and exotic world views. You know all about the art of the fairy, and you can design wonders, treasures, works and spirits. Your writing is imaginative, good at depicting a violent break-through scene, a moving struggle, and the way the main players get to the top. Freedom is between the 2,000-3,000 words that generate novels and the 3,000-words that need to be expanded to the same number.
The novel name:
"The novels are classified as fairy novels."
Writing style: "Hunny Fun"
The novel type:
Retro attacks
Gold finger.
The novels channel: Men
Main Settings
World set: World name: Great Summers core set: The Fairy Flyed.
The main character name: Gubei Tek
The main character describes: 20 years old, a minor drug-picker. He has a glitch of the ancient fairy, his golden finger, but also his danger. He is a strong man with a drive for the road, but he is often despised because of his origin.
♪ The ♪
The woman dressed as a framed and murdered noble lady, secretly gathering evidence to expose the behind-the-scenes, using the court power to try to kill the enemy, eventually taking control of the DPRK and turning its fate.
The novel is full of stories: the drug-picking youngster who was accidentally awakened to the ancient spirits of the North and who was given a remarkable gift of healing. It was both an opportunity and a danger: the spirit helped him to heal, but it also swallowed his mind.
After the appearance of the Qing Yunzhong, Gu was drawn into a brawl between the great forces. In order to find the truth and protect himself, he left the city and set on the path of the cloud. On the way, he revealed the secret of the shock of Kyushu: the forces were seeking the reincarnation of the ancient fairy, with the intention of taking over the world.
Faced with the threat of the spirits inside, the desire of the forces and the increasingly collapsed world order, the North must rise in adversity and seek its own life and that of the world.
Number of chapters: total 10
Words per chapter: 2,500-3500 words
Creating rules: **Role setting**: Chapter I must set names, gender, age and personality for the main players, and also name and character characteristics for the important dictator, consistent with subsequent chapters.
** Refinement**: Clear display of differences in the level of refining, with a ritual sense of breaking the scene and a living physique.
** Battle scene**: Magic needs to be visualized, challenges are reasonable over time, and the main players have a clear but unwitting advantage.
** Stranger settings**: Treasures must be made with a quilt, coincidences natural, and the harvest must be pleasant for the reader.

entries.title: 小红书标题

entries.summary: 角色: 你是一位[填入行业方向]的资深小红书运营人员，每天负责审核和优化多篇笔记的标题
entries.prompt:
角色: 你是一位[填入行业方向]的资深小红书运营人员，每天负责审核和优化多篇笔记的标题。
背景: 你发现平台最近对标题的展示规则有所调整，好的标题对笔记首页曝光起到关键作用，现在你需要为一篇主题为[填入主题】的内容创作吸引力标题。
使用吸引人的标题： 2.1、使用惊叹号、省略号等标点符号增强表达力，营造紧迫感和惊喜感。
2.2、使用emoji表情符号，来增加标题的活力
2.3、采用具有挑战性和悬念的表述，引发读、“无敌者好奇心，例如“暴涨词汇量”了”、“拒绝焦虑”等
2.4、利用正面刺激和负面激，诱发读者的本能需求和动物基本驱动力，如“离离原上谱”、“你不知道的项目其实很赚”等
2.5、融入热点话题和实用工具，提高文章的实用性和时效性，如“2023年必知”、“chatGPT狂飙进行时”等
2.6、描述具体的成果和效果，强调标题中的关键词，使其更具吸引力，例如“英语底子再差，搞清这些语法你也能拿130+”
使用爆款关键词，选用下面1-2个词语写标题： 好用到哭，大数据，教科书般，小白必看，宝藏，绝绝子神器，都给我冲,划重点，笑不活了，YYDS，秘方，我不允许，压箱底，建议收藏，停止摆烂，上天在提醒你，挑战全网，手把手，揭秘，普通女生，沉浸式，有手就能做吹爆，好用哭了，搞钱必看，狠狠搞钱，打工人，吐血整理，家人们，隐藏，高级感，治愈，破防了，万万没想到，爆款，永远可以相信被夸爆手残党必备，正确姿势
明确需求: 示例：黑科技面膜，让你更美更白"
标题数量: 根据以上规则创作[填入数量】个标题，标题字数控制在20字以内，可以合理使用符号、英文、Emoji、谐音字和网络用语。标题要简洁有力，突出内容核心，能够激发读者点击欲望，符合小红书平台调性。请在每个标题后标注创作思路。

entries.prompt:
角色: 你现在是一位拥有10年招聘经验的资深HR，擅长挖掘候选人的亮点。
教育背景: 包括专业、所学课程等
工作经历: 包括工作单位、职位、工作年限、和成就等
项目经历: 包括项目名称、时间、项目成果等
自我评价: 自己的性格特点、能力优势等，可选填
技能证书: 晒出你的技能证书
目标岗位JD： 此处粘贴你找的职位描述
任务目标： 请根据我提供的【工作经历】和【目标岗位JD】，生成一份完美的简历.
要求： 严格遵循STAR法则（情境、任务、行动、结果）。
提取JD中的关键词，将我的经历与这些关键词进行匹配。
使用动词开头，语言简练、专业、客观。
必须包含量化数据。如果我没有提供具体数据，请提示我补充，而不是编造。
去除所有主观形容词（如“积极主动”、“认真负责”），只用事实说话。

en.title: Curricula vitae
en.summary: You're a senior HR with 10 years of recruitment experience, and you're good at digging up candidates.
en.prompt:
Role: You're a senior HR with 10 years of recruitment experience, good at digging up candidates.
Educational background: including specialization, courses studied, etc.
Work experience: including work unit, position, years of service, achievements, etc.
Project experience: including project name, time, project results, etc.
Self-evaluation: optional for character characteristics, strengths of capabilities, etc.
Skill Certificate: Show your skill Certificate
Target position JD: Paste the job description you're looking for here.
Mission target: Please produce a perfect curriculum vitae based on what I've offered.
Requirement: Strict compliance with the STAR rules (situation, task, action, outcome).
Take the key words from JD and match my experience with them.
Use the verb starting with language simplicity, professionalism and objectivity.
It must contain quantitative data. If I don't provide specific data, please ask me to add it, not to make it up.
To remove all subjective adjectives (such as “proactiveness”, “responsible responsibility”) and speak only in fact.

entries.title: &提示词技巧&
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/&提示词技巧&.csv
entries.summary: 明确目标和细节指令 用小学生能听懂的话，讲 3 个人工智能改变生活的例子
entries.prompt:
明确目标和细节指令 用小学生能听懂的话，讲 3 个人工智能改变生活的例子
角色代入创作指令 扮演顶级大厨，用网红风格给健身党设计三款低卡年夜菜，记得加上热量标注和可爱表情
任务拆解分步指令 第一步：总结社交媒体营销的五大趋势；第二步：针对我们的产品，挑选三个最适合的趋势；第三步：设计一套实施计划，包括目标、步骤和预期效果
提供范例模仿指令 请参考以下的文案调性（附带实例），为全新推出的防晒服饰撰写 5 条适合抖音平台的销售文案：直击痛点：烈日炎炎，40 度高温如何出门不遭罪？数据对决：UPF100 + 超强防晒，秒杀市面上一切普通防晒服！生活场景融入：无论是露营野餐、日常通勤还是周末遛娃，一衣在手，全场景轻松应对！
逆向提问引导指令 我现在打算【开展某个项目】，但不太确定具体需求应该怎么描述，请你帮我列出 5 个关键问题，协助我理清思路
启动思考链条指令 请依照以下逻辑进行分析：1. 明确核心难题；2. 列出三种可能的解决路径；3. 预估每种路径的潜在风险及资源需求
跨模态融合图文指令 解读这张用户行为热图，点出三个用户流失的关键点，并用箭头标出改进方向
跨模态融合数据指令 将 2023 年的客户反馈记录（见文件）按月和类型整理，用折线加饼状图进行可视化展示
角色代入评价指令 现在，你要扮演一个【挑剔的市场评论家】，用最直接的言辞评价这份市场计划书，点出三个逻辑问题和两个不切实际的设想
场景化需求指令 我要设计一个 PPT 框架，要给一批 50 岁左右的制造业老板分享，主题是传统工厂出海战略布局。希望用他们能理解的生存压力类比国际竞争，让他们明白出海是必选项而非选择题。但我担心他们觉得海外市场遥远，担心法律风险和管理成本，害怕文化差异导致水土不服。你能帮我设计一个 PPT 框架吗？
术语破解指令 用小学生能听懂的话解释 RLHF
风格迁移指令 用金庸的武侠小说风格，描写一段程序员使用 DeepSeek-R1 高效编程的场景
人话指令 以 “行动 + 领域 + 输出格式” 的模式构建指令，比如 “用通俗易懂的语言分析 2023 年公司财务数据，制作成 PPT，指出主要问题并给出改进建议”
角色代入法 按照 “扮演一个【具体身份】，以【风格】为【目标群体】创作【内容】” 的模板设计指令，如 “扮演资深旅游博主，用幽默风趣的风格为年轻背包客规划一次云南 7 日游攻略”
以李白风格创作诗歌 请模仿李白的《望庐山瀑布》做一首诗，题目是《看厦门鼓浪屿》
续写诗歌 请为这首诗续写一段，使其意境更丰富
按需求调整诗歌风格 请按照要求写一篇 200 字左右关于云计算的介绍。注意事项：文章的受众是中学生，需要通俗易懂，语言风格需要幽默、风趣一些
明确输出结构创作 请按照【现状 / 问题 / 解决方案，数据洞察 / 问题概览 / 调研方向，数据 / 亮点 / 问题 / 经验】这个结构撰写一份关于我国芯片行业的总结报告
设定角色创作故事 请你作为一个小红书文案撰写高手，为我生成一篇爆款小红书文案，要求突出酒店的特色，包括海景房、豪华单间、最新装修、免费早餐、无线上网等
明确内容要求创作 请以小红书的风格，按照以下要求帮我为 “海景美食餐厅” 写一篇小红书种草文案；内容要求：(1) 要有标题、正文；(2) 标题字数：不超过 20 个字；尽量简短精炼，要足够吸引眼球，用词浮夸；(3) 正文分段，层次分明，每段最少 100 字；(4) 要用 “首先、其次、最后” 这种模式；(5) 整篇文案不要超过 1000 个字
指定文体创作 请写一段 [中秋赏月] 的朋友圈文案，需要采用藏头诗的形式
分步解决问题创作 请为我规划一次为期一周的厦门自由行；(1) 第 1 步：列出必去的景点，如厦门大学、鼓浪屿、环岛路、五缘湾、曾厝垵；(2) 第 2 步：根据景点位置安排每日行程，确保交通便利；(3) 第 3 步：推荐几家当地的特色餐厅，包括早餐、午餐和晚餐；(4) 第 4 步：提供一家性价比高的酒店住宿建议，并考虑其位置是否便于游览
提供示例引导创作 我是一位高校教师，请帮我写一份工作周报，内容尽量简洁精炼，下面是我本周的工作内容：(1) 完成了 5 个本科生毕业论文修改；(2) 撰写了教材的一个章节 “云计算与大数据”。输出要求示例:【本周工作周报】【本周工作进展】本周做了哪些事，产生了哪些结果；【下周工作安排】基于本周的结果下周要推进哪些事；【思考总结】简要说说本周的收获和反思
结合场景创作内容 请撰写一封给朋友的生日祝福信，场景设定在海边日落时
结合实际案例解释概念 请结合生活中常见的场景，解释一下 “边际效应” 这个经济学概念
以故事形式阐述理论 请以一个冒险故事的形式，阐述 “蝴蝶效应” 理论，让读者能轻松理解其含义
对比不同理论差异 请对比 “行为主义学习理论” 和 “认知主义学习理论”，分析它们在教学应用中的差异
用图表辅助解释内容 请用柱状图和折线图辅助解释过去 5 年我国智能手机市场占有率的变化情况
根据数据预测趋势并分析 已知某产品过去 12 个月的销售数据，预测未来 6 个月的销售趋势，并分析可能影响趋势的因素
以访谈形式呈现信息 假设你在采访一位资深环保人士，围绕 “可持续发展” 主题，设计 5 个采访问题，并模拟对方的回答
创作具有互动性的内容 写一篇关于健康饮食的文章，结尾设置一个互动问题，引导读者在评论区分享自己的饮食习惯
运用修辞手法丰富表达 请运用比喻和拟人修辞手法，描写一下春天的花园，让文章更生动形象
结合热点事件进行讨论 结合近期的人工智能大模型发展热点，讨论其对就业市场可能产生的长期影响
从不同视角分析问题 请分别从消费者、企业和政府的视角，分析 “电商直播带货” 模式的优势和挑战
为文章设计吸引人的开头和结尾 为一篇关于 “探索宇宙奥秘” 的文章设计一个引人入胜的开头和富有启发的结尾
任务分解 将复杂任务按步骤拆解，如 “第一步：收集近一个月行业内 5 个领军企业的动态；第二步：对比分析其业务拓展方向；第三步：总结出行业发展趋势，形成报告”
提供范例教学 给出示例并要求模仿创作，例如 “参考以下文案风格（如：突出性价比，用对比手法），为新款智能音箱撰写 3 条电商平台销售文案”
逆向提问技巧 当对项目需求不明确时，采用 “我打算【开展项目】，但不确定具体需求，帮我列出 5 个关键问题理清思路” 的提问方式
启动思考链条 按照特定逻辑引导 AI 分析，例如 “请依照以下逻辑进行分析：1. 明确当前业务增长缓慢的核心难题；2. 列出三种可能的解决路径；3. 预估每种路径的潜在风险及资源需求”
跨模态融合 - 图文解读 针对图片进行分析解读，如 “解读这张网站页面热力图，指出用户点击最少的三个区域，并用箭头标出优化方向”
跨模态融合 - 数据解读 对数据进行整理和可视化要求，例如 “将附件中的 2023 年销售数据按季度和产品类别整理，用柱状加折线图进行可视化展示”
生成 Linux 助手提示词 请帮我生成一个 “Linux 助手” 的提示词
生成中国农业情况文章大纲 请帮我生成 “中国农业情况” 这篇文章的大纲
翻译牛顿第一定律 牛顿第一定律：任何一个物体总是保持静止状态或者匀速直线运动状态，直到有作用在它上面的外力迫使它改变这种状态为止。如果作用在物体上的合力为零，则物体保持匀速直线运动。即物体的速度保持不变且加速度为零。
解释波粒二象性 什么是 “波粒二象性”，请用通俗易懂的语言解释，最好能举例说明
反向 PUA 指令 请你列出 10 个反对理由再给方案；如果你是老板，你会怎样批评这个方案？；这个回答你满意吗？请你把回答复盘至少 10 轮
善于模仿指令 原神新版本发布，请你模仿魂小将和猿批吵架的语气和风格，写一段对话
擅长锐评指令 请模仿键盘侠的风格，锐评国外的主流大模型，如 GPT-4、Gemini、Claude、LLaMA、Grok 等
激发深度思考指令 在你的回答中，同时加入你的批判性思考；在你回答之前，先自己复盘 100 遍
生成提示词解读 请解读以下提示词的作用和使用场景：[具体提示词内容]
分析提示词效果 分析使用 “[具体提示词]” 后，对模型输出结果的影响，包括内容、风格、准确性等方面
优化提示词 请对 “[现有提示词]” 进行优化，使其更符合我的需求，能够引导模型生成更优质的内容
优化文案用于小红书发布 我想把一篇文案发布在小红书上，目标观众年龄在 20 - 30 岁，职业多为上班族，喜欢美妆、时尚和生活分享内容。请按 A 版流程引导我，先以表格形式告知平台属性、用户特点和高频上线时间，再引导我提供文案内容，之后推荐文案风格，完成优化后进行复盘并打分

entries.title: &通用类&
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/&通用类&.csv
entries.summary: 明确目标提问 明确你想要解决的问题，例如 “我想了解如何提高编程能力，具体包括哪些方面
entries.prompt:
明确目标提问 明确你想要解决的问题，例如 “我想了解如何提高编程能力，具体包括哪些方面？”
具体描述问题 详细描述问题，包括相关背景、遇到的困难等，如 “我正在学习数学，在解决函数应用题时总是理解困难，具体情况是……”
拆分问题提问 将复杂问题拆分成几个小问题，逐个解决，比如 “我想学习人工智能，但是不知道从哪里开始，能否帮我规划一下学习路径？”
积极思考提问 主动思考问题，不要只依赖答案，例如 “我对这个概念有一些初步的理解，但是还想深入探讨，你能帮我提出一些相关的问题吗？”
保持开放提问 接受不同的观点和建议，不要局限于一种答案，比如 “对于这个问题，你有哪些不同的看法？”
尊重隐私提问 注意保护个人隐私，不要透露敏感信息，如 “我想问关于健康方面的问题，但是不想透露个人姓名，你能帮我吗？”
理性判断提问 对答案进行理性判断，不要盲目相信，例如 “你给出的这个建议听起来不错，但是我想知道它的依据是什么？”
持续学习提问 将 DeepSeek 作为学习工具，不断探索新知识，比如 “我想学习新的语言，你能给我推荐一些学习资源吗？”
积极反馈提问 对 DeepSeek 的回答进行反馈，帮助其不断改进，如 “你刚才的回答对我很有帮助，但是我还有一些疑问，你能再解释一下吗？”
享受过程提问 把提问和学习视为一种乐趣，享受探索知识的过程，比如 “我想学习历史，你能给我推荐一些有趣的历史故事吗？”

en.title: & General Category
en.summary: "I want to know how to improve programming capabilities, what specifically they include.
en.prompt:
Clear target questions, clear questions about the problems you want to solve, for example, “I want to know how to improve programming capabilities, and what specifically?”
Describe the problem in detail, including the background, difficulties, etc., such as: "I am learning mathematics and always understand difficulties in solving the function application question, in the specific case of..."
Split questions, divide complex questions into small questions, solve them one by one, like, "I want to learn artificial intelligence, but I don't know where to start, can you help me plan a course?"
Think hard about questions, think hard about questions, think hard about questions, not just answers, like, "I have some preliminary understanding of the concept, but I want to go into it, and can you help me ask some questions?"
Keep asking questions open, accept different views and suggestions, and not limit themselves to one answer, such as, "What are your different views on this question?"
Respect for privacy questions, care to protect personal privacy, and do not disclose sensitive information, such as, "I want to ask about health issues, but not to reveal a person's name. Can you help me?"
And rational judgment questions, and you don't have to believe in the answer, for example, "This advice you're giving sounds good, but I wonder what it is based on?"
Keep learning questions, using DeepSeek as a learning tool, constantly exploring new knowledge, like, "Can you recommend some learning resources for me if I want to learn new languages?"
Positive feedback questions, feedback on the DeepSeek's answers, helping them to improve, like, "Your answers were very helpful to me, but I have some questions, can you explain?"
Enjoy the process, see the question and learning as a pleasure, enjoy the process of exploring knowledge, like, "I want to learn history, can you recommend some interesting historical stories?"

entries.title: @脚本优化@
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/@脚本优化@.csv
entries.summary: 示例提示词（可直接使用）
entries.prompt:
示例提示词（可直接使用）
你是一个经验丰富的代码审查专家。请为以下脚本添加智能注释：
1. **理解代码意图**后，用自然语言解释核心逻辑
2. **抽象层级分离**：高层次注释说明功能，低层次注释说明实现细节
3. **面向不同读者**：
- 给维护者：关键修改点、依赖关系
- 给使用者：调用方式、参数约束
- 给学习者：算法思路、设计考量
4. **添加实用标签**：
- NOTE: 重要说明
- TODO: 待办事项
- WARN: 警告信息
- OPTIMIZE: 优化建议
请确保注释：
- 简洁但有信息量
- 及时更新（基于当前代码）
- 遵循一致的风格
- 帮助理解而非增加噪音
代码：

en.title: @ScriptSimulation@
en.summary: Example hint (directable)
en.prompt:
Example hint (directable)
You are an experienced code review expert. Please add a smart comment to the following script:
1. ** After understanding the intent of the code**, explain the core logic in natural language
2. ** Abstract hierarchical separation**: high level comment describing function and low level comment describing detail of achievement
3. ** For different audiences**:
- To maintainer: key change point, dependency
- To users: Call method, parameter constraint
- To learners: algorithmic thinking, design considerations
4. ** Add functional label**:
- NOTE: Important notes.
- TODO: To-dos
- Warn: Warning message
- OPTIMIZE: Recommendations for optimization
Please ensure that comments:
- Simple but informative.
- Timely update (based on current code)
- Follow the same style.
- Help understand, not increase the noise.

en.summary: Time management - task prioritization how to help children distinguish between "important" and "emergency" tasks
en.prompt:
Time management - how does task prioritization help children to distinguish between "important" and "emergency" tasks?
Time management - how do tomato work practices use "the tomato work method" to raise children's focus?
Learning program - Target decomposition how to help children break down big goals into small tasks?
Learning plan - Reverse method for developing a refresher plan How do we use the "reverse method" for developing a refresher plan?
Learning plan - Flexible plan development How can children be helped to develop Flexible Plan?
Learning plan - How to focus on the most important task with the "80/20 rule" application of the 80/20 rule?
Emotional regulation - how do emotional recognition and expression help children to recognize and express emotions?
Emotional adjustment - Deep breaths ease anxiety. How do you use Deep breaths to ease anxiety?
Emotional adjustment - how to build growth-based thinking how to help kids build "growth-based thinking"?
Emotional Reconciling - Failed Recompiring Learning How to Use "Fail Recomp" to help children learn from mistakes?
Selection of a profession - interests and advantages exploration - how can children be helped to explore their interests and advantages?
Selection of a special course - APP - How do you use the "APP" to support a child selection?
How can the Family Conference be used to reach consensus on the selection of parents and children?
How can the selection options be evaluated using the `SWOT analysis'?
Career planning - Short-term and long-term target setting How can children be helped to set short-term and long-term goals?
Career planning - The way a career is going to inspire dreams, how can a "life is going to inspire a child's dream?"
Career planning - how do career interviews help children understand the real world of work through "job interviews"?
Career planning - how can career experience activities be used to broaden the perspective of children?
Affiliation - Non-violent communication improves relationships How can "non-violent communication" improve parentage?
Affiliation - how do we understand how children feel through a "committal dialogue"?
- How can the autonomy of children be fostered through “progressive decentralization”?
Affiliation - Responsibility List helps manage itself how to use the "responsibility list" to teach children to manage themselves?
Affiliation - Family agreements regulate cellular use How can children's cellular use be regulated through “family agreements”?
Affiliation - Interest substitution less reliance on mobile phones How can "interest substitution" be used to reduce children's reliance on mobile phones?
Social skills - how do role-playing enhance social skills through role-playing?
Social skills - how do we use the "common interest" method to help our children find friends?
Social skills - how can a small step be used to enhance the expression of a child through a "small step exercise"?
Social skills - is building self-confidence in feedback, how can "positive feedback" be used to increase confidence in children?
Promotional stress - CBCs ease test anxiety. How can CBCs ease child's test anxiety?
The pressure of promotion - how do you use the "mock test" to help your child adapt to the test environment?
The promotion pressure - the target decomposition method clearly defines the path to the transition, and how does the target decomposition method define the path to the child's transition?
- School research methods understand the target schools how to use the School Research Act to help children understand the target schools?
Learning - How can the "Feyman Learning" be used to improve children's understanding?
Learning methods - how to use the wrong script to improve performance - how to use the wrong script to help children to improve performance?
Learning - play learning stimulates interest, how can "play learning" inspire interest in the subject?
Learning - how to use the "little goal achievement method" to enhance the child's sense of achievement in learning [of the subject's name]?
Mental health - how does emotional listening support emotional feelings through "emotional listening" support children's emotions?
Mental health - professional counselling for psychological problems How can a child's psychological problems be addressed with “professional counselling”?

entries.title: 任务处理类

entries.summary: 复杂任务分解 对于复杂任务，采用 “第一步：【描述任务的第一个步骤】；第二步：【描述任务的第二个步骤】；第三步：【描述任务的第三个步骤】……”
entries.prompt:
复杂任务分解 对于复杂任务，采用 “第一步：【描述任务的第一个步骤】；第二步：【描述任务的第二个步骤】；第三步：【描述任务的第三个步骤】……” 的指令形式，引导 DeepSeek 分步骤完成任务。
任务结果优化 当对任务结果不满意时，使用 “这个【任务结果，如旅行攻略、课程计划】中【具体问题，如餐厅推荐太少、课程时间安排不合理】，请进行优化” 指令，让 DeepSeek 优化任务结果。
任务细节补充 若任务结果缺少某些细节，输入 “【任务结果，如旅行攻略】中没有【具体细节，如交通换乘信息】，请补充这部分内容”，获取任务细节。

en.title: Task processing category
en.summary: Complex task breakdown, for complex tasks, uses the following: "First step: [Description of the first step of the mission]; Second step: [Description of the second step of the mission]; Third step: [Description of the third step of the mission]..."
en.prompt:
For complex tasks, use the form of instructions that “first step: [prescription of the mission's first step]; second step: [description of the mission's second step]; third step: [description of the mission's third step] ...”, which guides DeepSeek to the task in step by step.
Optimized mission results When not satisfied with mission results, use this instruction to let DeepSeek optimize mission results in [mission results, such as travel strategies, course plans] [specific issues, such as too few recommendations for restaurants, and unreasonable course schedules].
The task details are supplemented by the task details, if the mission results are missing some details, enter " [the mission results, e.g. travel strategy] do not have [details, e.g. traffic change information, add this part to the list of tasks, get the task details.

entries.title: 公文写作
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/公文写作.csv
entries.summary: 简报（政务信息） 撰写（具体单位或某项工作）的工作简报，按"（工作亮点成效）、（创新措施）、（下一步计划）"的结构排列，数据用同比 / 环比增幅
entries.prompt:
简报（政务信息） 撰写（具体单位或某项工作）的工作简报，按"（工作亮点成效）、（创新措施）、（下一步计划）"的结构排列，数据用同比 / 环比增幅表述，核心指标要标红，分三个段落，每段落不超过 3 行。
公告（重大事项） 撰写（具体单位）关于（具体事项）的公告，阐明（事项的根据）、（事项内容）、（具体时间）、（如何查询），使用"特此公告"结尾，政策类公告需同步附件扫描件。
公告（重大事项）示例 撰写市生态环境局关于调整企业排污许可收费标准的公告，依据《关于优化排污许可管理的通知》（x 环规〔2023〕12 号），重点行业排污许可收费标准由每吨 200 元上调至 300 元，2024 年 3 月 1 日起执行，官网同步发布政策解读 Q&A。
议案（提案建议） 协助（提案人姓名+职务）撰写提交（人大/政协会议）的议案，内容为（建议内容），需包含（当前现状分析）、（法律法规依据）、（具体建议）、（预期效果）四方面内容，数据要精确到百分位。
述职报告 撰写（述职人姓名+职务）2025 年度述职报告，按"（履职情况）、（尚需完善的问题）、（完善计划）"的结构撰写，各项指标要量化用完成率 / 增长率，强调（重点项目名称）的贡献，不要用"卓越"、"领先"等自夸词汇，表现谦虚。
会议纪要 整理 xx 科技公司年度创新工作会议纪要，需突出研发经费追加审批通过（财务部李 xx 负责，11 月 30 日前落实）、新产品研发进度表（各项目组 11 月 15 日前提交）、绩效考核优化方案（人力资源部牵头修订）。
初步排版给定文字信息 我这里有一段文字信息，内容是 [具体文字内容]，请按照要求进行初步排版，提取合适标题并居中，根据逻辑关系分割段落并留出适当间隔，突出关键信息，完成后询问我是否进行下一步
按需求优化文字排版 针对上一步你排版的内容，我希望标题字体更大一些，关键信息用不同颜色突出显示（假设可以实现），请根据这个需求对排版进行优化调整，直到我满意
撰写会议通知公文 我需要撰写一份关于召开部门季度总结会议的通知。会议背景是为了总结上季度工作成果、规划下季度工作方向；会议时间是 [具体时间]，地点在公司 [X] 层会议室；涉及人员为部门全体员工。请按流程引导我，先确认信息后询问是否进行下一步，接着根据格式生成通知公文，最后根据我的要求优化润色
创作活动通知公文 公司将举办员工技能培训活动，活动背景是提升员工专业技能，增强团队整体实力；时间是 [具体日期] 的 [具体时间段]，地点在公司培训室；涉及人员为各部门有意提升相关技能的员工。请按步骤引导我，先引导我确认信息，然后生成活动通知公文，再根据我的反馈优化润色
生成工作安排公文 公司要进行新的项目筹备工作安排，背景是启动新项目；时间从 [起始时间] 开始；涉及人员包括项目组所有成员；地点涉及公司办公室、项目现场等。请按流程操作，先引导我提供信息，确认后生成工作安排公文，之后根据我的要求优化

en.title: Writing in public
en.summary: Briefings (Government Information) Writing (unit-specific or work-specific) job briefs, organized according to the structure "(work bright spots effectiveness), "innovation measures", "next plan" with an increase in data by the same/ring ratio
en.prompt:
Briefings (Government Information) Writing (specific unit or work) job briefs, organized according to the structure "(work bright spots effectiveness), "innovation measures", "next plan" with data presented in terms of the same/ring increase, with core indicators reded in three paragraphs, each with no more than three rows.
The bulletin (significant matter) prepares (specific unit) bulletins on (specific matter) clarifying (the basis of the matter), (the content of the matter), (the time) and (the way in which the inquiry is made) and uses the "special bulletin" at the end, where the policy type bulletin is scanned in sync.
An example of a notice (significant matter) Prepared by the Municipal Eco-Environmental Authority on the adjustment of the rates for the payment of company sewage permits, which was revised from 200 to 300 to 300 to 300 to 300 to be implemented on 1 March 2024, in accordance with the Circular on Optimizing the Management of Sewerage Licences (x Rings [2023] 12), the policy interpretation was published simultaneously by the Network.
The bill (proposal) assists (name of sponsor + position) in the preparation of the bill (Conference of the People ' s Congress/Parliamentary Consultative Assembly) containing (the elements of the proposal) four elements (analysis of the current situation), the legal basis (the specific recommendations), and the expected effect) and the exactness of the data to the percentage.
Report on the performance of duties (name of person to be appointed + job) 2025 Annual report on the presentation of jobs, based on the structure of "(function), (probably completed), (programming)", indicators quantifying the rate of completion/growth, emphasizing the contribution of the priority project, and not using self-proclaimed terms such as "excellent" or "leading" and so forth.
Summary of xx proceedings of the annual innovation work of the science and technology companies, with emphasis on additional approvals for R & D funding (Ri x, Treasury Department, implemented by 30 November), progress schedules for new products (submitted by project groups by 15 November), and performance appraisal optimization programmes (led by the Department of Human Resources).
I have a text message here, which is [specific text content], which is requested to be pre-scheduled, to extract and centralize the appropriate title, to divide the paragraphs according to the logical relationship and to provide the appropriate spacing, to highlight the key information and to ask me if I should proceed next.
To optimize the layout of the text as required, and for the last step of your layout, I would like to see a bigger title font with key messages highlighted in different colours (assuming it can be achieved), and please adjust the layout to this requirement until I am satisfied.
Write the minutes and write a circular about the departmental wrap-up sessions. The background is to summarize the results of the last quarter and plan the direction of the next quarter; the meeting time is [specific], in the company ' s [X] floor meeting room; the staff is the department ' s staff. Please guide me by process, first confirm the information and ask if the next step is taken, then generate the notification documents according to the format, and then optimize the refinements as requested.
The company will conduct skills training activities for its employees in the context of upgrading their professional skills and strengthening their team as a whole; the time is [specific date], in the company training room; the person is a staff member who intends to upgrade the skills of the department. Please guide me step by step, first lead me to confirm the information, then generate the activity notification and then optimize the refinement based on my feedback.
The company is to undertake new project preparation arrangements, starting with the [start-up] project; involving all members of the project team; and the location of the office, project site, etc... Please follow the process and guide me to provide information, confirm and generate the work schedule documents, and then optimize them as I request.

entries.title: 内容优化与风险规避类

entries.summary: 输出校准 - 开启小白模式 当模型输出过于专业时，使用 “开启小白模式” 指令，禁用专业术语，使回答更通俗易懂
entries.prompt:
输出校准 - 开启小白模式 当模型输出过于专业时，使用 “开启小白模式” 指令，禁用专业术语，使回答更通俗易懂。
输出校准 - 举例简化 在开启小白模式后，追加 “举个菜市场大妈能懂的例子” 指令，进一步简化和形象化回答内容。
输出校准 - 精简句子 为确保回答简洁，使用 “查是否有超过 20 字的句子” 指令，精简输出内容。
敏感内容过滤 - 医疗建议检查 针对涉及医疗建议的内容，使用 “检查当前内容是否符合《互联网诊疗管理办法》” 指令，检测并规避医疗风险。
敏感内容过滤 - 投资理财修正 针对投资理财相关内容，使用 “用红色标注涉及收益承诺的表述” 指令，识别并修正风险内容。
敏感内容过滤 - 政治相关调整 针对政治相关内容，使用 “开启中立模式重写以下内容” 指令，平衡多方观点，规避风险。
给大学生群体推荐小说文案创作 我的目标观众是大学生，年龄 18 - 22 岁，喜欢阅读小说，读书习惯是追求新颖情节和深度内涵。我想推荐《百年孤独》这本书。请按照流程，先询问我是否进行下一步，接着查找书籍信息，生成标题和口播文案，优化文案并给出配图建议，最后进行自我复盘和打分，根据我的意见修改
把日常聊天内容转化为口播文案 我提供的日常 “口水话” 内容是：“我今天在路边看到一个小猫咪，超级可爱，眼睛大大的，还冲我撒娇，我都舍不得走了。后来才知道它是附近店里养的，店主说它特别亲人。” 请按流程引导我，先确认是否进行下一步，接着分析核心要点等，展示口播文案框架让我选择，然后生成 5 篇口播文案，最后优化文案
将旅行经历口水话变为口播稿 我的 “口水话” 旅行经历是：“上次去海边玩，本以为能看到超美的日落，结果去晚了没看成。不过在海边遇到了一个特别有意思的人，他给我讲了好多关于大海的故事，还教我怎么找藏在沙子里的小螃蟹，可好玩了。” 请根据流程，引导我完成从内容提供到文案优化的全过程
把家居清洁吐槽转为口播文案 我想说的 “口水话” 是：“打扫家里真的太麻烦了，尤其是清理沙发缝隙，那些小碎屑总是弄不干净，怎么掏都掏不完，每次都搞得我特别烦躁。” 请按照步骤，先引导我确认下一步，再进行核心要点分析等操作，最终完成口播文案的生成和优化
撰写曹操生平轶事解说文案 我希望撰写曹操的生平轶事解说文案，字数要求 1500 字左右。请按流程引导我，先确认是否进行下一步，接着搜索曹操生平资料，列出主要事迹，然后生成解说文案，最后询问我喜欢的文案风格并优化文案
创作武则天轶事解说内容 我想为武则天创作一篇轶事解说文案，字数大概 1200 字。请根据流程，引导我完成从提供人物信息到文案优化的全过程，包括搜索资料、列举事迹、撰写文案以及按我喜欢的风格优化
生成李白生平轶事文案 我要生成一篇关于李白生平轶事的文案，字数在 1000 字上下。请按照步骤，先引导我确认下一步，再进行资料搜索、事迹罗列、文案撰写，最后根据我选择的风格优化文案
tags: 内容优化与风险规避类

en.title: Content optimization and risk avoidance class
en.sourcePath: Prompt Library/Q&A/Content optimization and risk avoidance class.csv
en.summary: Output Calibration - Turn on white mode, use the "open white mode" command when model output is too professional to use professional terminology to make the answer more user-friendly
en.prompt:
Output calibration - Turns on the white mode, and when model output is too professional, uses the "open white mode" instruction to ban the use of professional terms to make the answer more common and understandable.
Output calibration - Simplify, for example, adding "A sample of what the market mother understands" to the instructions after opening the white mode, further simplifying and visualizing the answers.
Output Calibration - Simplify the sentence to ensure that the answer is simple, using the "Counter whether there are sentences above 20" instruction to streamline the output.
Sensitive content filtering - Medical advice examination uses the Directive “Surveys whether the current content conforms to the Internet Clinical Management Scheme” to detect and avoid medical risks.
Sensitive content filter - Investment finance amendments, for investment finance-related elements, identify and modify risk elements using the "Calse mark on statement of revenue commitments " directive.
Sensitive content filtering - Politically relevant adjustments, using the directive "open neutral mode rewrites the following" for politically relevant content, balancing multiple views and avoiding risks.
I want to recommend the book " Centennial Loneliness" as a guide, ask me if I'm going to go next, then look for the book, generate the title and the oral text, optimize the text and give the drawings, and then make the self-records and scores, and then change them in the light of my comments.
I'm offering a daily "speaker" that says, "I saw a kitten on the side of the road today, super cute, big eyes, and soaking me, and I couldn't leave. I only knew it was from a nearby shop and the owner said it was a special relative." Please guide me by the process, first make sure I go the next step, then analyse the core, etc., show the framework of the oral presentation and then produce five oral cases, and then optimize the case.
I've been on my "saliva" trip, "I thought I'd seen a beautiful sunset last time." But I met a very interesting person at the beach who told me a lot about the sea and taught me how to find little crabs hidden in the sand.
I'm going to say, "Spitching the house with the cleaning and the saliva is really a bit of a problem, especially cleaning the sofa gap, and it's always a bit of a mess, and it's always a bit of a problem to get my little bits out of it. Please, just follow the step, and then you can lead me to the next step, then to the core analysis, etc., and then to the finalization and optimization of the oral presentation.
I want to write a text about Cao Cao Cao's life, the number of words required. Please direct me to the process, first make sure that I do the next step, then search Cao Cao Cian Cian Cian, list the main stories, then generate the text, and finally ask me what I like about the style of the text and optimize the text.
I want to write an anecdotal story for Wu. The word is about 1,200. Please guide me through the process of providing information on people to the best in the case, including searching for information, listing stories, writing essays and optimizing them in my own style.
I'm going to produce a paper on Lee's history, with a number of words on 1,000 words. Please lead me to the next step, then to a search, a list of events, a writing, and then to a perfect text according to the style I have chosen.

entries.title: 内容创作
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/内容创作.csv
entries.summary: 爆款标题 请帮我生成10个吸引眼球的【主题】爆款标题，要求包含语气词、设置悬念，并强调效果来吸引读者
entries.prompt:
爆款标题 请帮我生成10个吸引眼球的【主题】爆款标题，要求包含语气词、设置悬念，并强调效果来吸引读者。
种草文案 请以【身份】的口吻，写一篇【产品】的种草笔记，突出3个使用场景和3个痛点解决方案。
短视频脚本 请生成一个【时长】的短视频脚本，包含开场悬念+中间反转+结尾的行动号召，并具备至少3个特写镜头。
公主号文章 请以[风格]写一篇关于【主题】的深度文章，包含3个分论点，每个论点都帮我给到1个案例。
SEO文章优化 请围绕关键词[XXX]写一篇1000字的文章，关键词至少5个，包含H2/H3标题标签。
新闻报道 请对[具体事件]生成新闻报道，以专业的新闻写作规范，撰写一篇高质量的新闻文章。文章应包括清晰的标题、准确的导语，详细报道事件的背景、经过、影响等内容。采访相关人员获取一手信息，确保新闻报道的真实性和客观性，同时运用生动的语言和合理的结构，提高新闻的可读性和吸引力。
营销方案 请对[具体产品]生成营销方案，深入分析产品的特点、目标市场、竞争对手等因素。结合市场趋势和消费者需求，设计一套全面有效的营销策略，包括产品定位、品牌推广、价格策略、渠道选择、促销活动等内容。制定详细的实施计划和预算安排，确保营销方案具有可操作性和可衡量性。
视频脚本 请对[具体主题]生成视频脚本，从故事架构、镜头语言、角色设定等方面出发，撰写一篇高质量的视频剧本。脚本应包含详细的场景描述、台词设计、镜头运动方式、拍摄地点等信息，通过巧妙的剧情设计和画面构思，吸引观众的注意力，准确传达主题思想。
将长文章转为痛点共鸣式口播文案 请将这篇长文章转为符合痛点共鸣式框架的口播文案，要求忠于原文核心内容，不杜撰不随意联想
以温暖治愈式框架重构文章 请参考温暖治愈式框架，对这篇文章进行重构，输出一篇不超过 500 字的口播文案
用悬念引导式框架创作标题 针对这篇文章，按照悬念引导式框架的特点，帮我生成 3 个不超过 20 字且具备情绪化、有流量吸引力的标题
以名人故事式框架优化文章 以名人故事式框架为基础，优化这篇文章，输出一篇口播文案，同时分析所选名人故事的情感共鸣点和启示感悟
按反差对比式框架改写文章 按照反差对比式框架的结构，改写这篇文章，注意详细描述两种情感状态的具体情节和反差分析
用小细节打动式框架写口播文案 运用小细节打动式框架，围绕文章内容，写一篇不超过 500 字的口播文案，并突出小细节带来的情感冲击
以情感对话式框架创作内容 请以情感对话式框架创作这篇文章的口播文案，通过对话展开情感故事和细节，解决情感问题并总结启示感悟
用回忆怀旧式框架重新构思文章 基于回忆怀旧式框架重新构思这篇文章，开头营造怀旧氛围，详细描述回忆故事并分析情感意义
按困境成长式框架调整文章结构 依据困境成长式框架，调整这篇文章的结构，描述情感困境、成长转折和克服困境的方法，呼吁读者分享经历
以励志启示式框架撰写口播文案 以励志启示式框架撰写这篇文章的口播文案，用励志语句或故事开头，分析共鸣点并给出应用启示的建议
角色代入法 - 专业评价 设定专业角色对内容进行评价，如 “现在，你要扮演一个【严苛的文学评论家】，用犀利的言辞评价这篇短篇小说，指出两个情节漏洞和一处写作风格的不足”
角色扮演 请扮演…… 和我对话
观点提炼 请提炼出以下内容的核心观点
诗意描述 请用充满诗意的语言描述……
整理科技播客文字稿 我有一份科技播客文字稿，内容围绕人工智能在医疗领域的应用展开。请按流程对其进行整理，先进行整理与重构，再提炼 4 个核心观点及对应论据，最后提取 1 - 2 个反共识观点
分析文化播客内容 我这里有一份关于传统文化传承的播客文字稿。请根据步骤，仔细阅读并理解主旨脉络，进行归类重构，提炼核心观点与论据，以及提取反共识观点
梳理商业播客文字稿要点 我想整理一份商业播客文字稿，主要讲创业公司的营销策略。请按照要求，完成整理与重构、要点提炼和反共识观点提取
按 A 版流程创作职场 IP 故事文案 我想打造职场领域个人 IP，目标观众是 25 - 35 岁的职场新人，他们渴望职业晋升和获取实用职场经验。请按 A 版流程引导我，先确认目标观众画像，接着引导我提供个人信息、背景故事、专业成就等内容，最后输出个人 IP 口播文案，每步结束询问我是否满意
用 B 版流程生成美食博主 IP 文案 我是一名美食博主，想打造个人 IP，目标观众为 18 - 30 岁热爱美食、喜欢尝试新餐厅和自制美食的年轻人。请依据 B 版流程，引导我完成各步骤，包括自我介绍、分享成长经历等，按要求结构生成故事文案，汇总成小作文并提供风格选择，最后进行优化复盘和打分
A 版流程打造健身教练个人 IP 我的目标是打造健身教练个人 IP，目标观众是 20 - 40 岁有健身需求，想要减肥塑形或增肌的人群。请按照 A 版流程，引导我依次提供相关信息，完成个人 IP 故事口播文案创作，过程中每步确认我的满意度

en.title: Content creation
en.summary: Please create 10 "theme" headlines for my eye attraction, requiring words, setting suspense and highlighting effects to attract readers.
en.prompt:
Please help me generate 10 "theme" headlines that will attract the eye, require words, put a suspense, and emphasize the effect to attract the reader.
In the case of grass, write a note of grass for the "product" in the words of "identity", highlighting three use scenes and three pain-point solutions.
Short video scripts. Please generate a short video script [long-time] containing the call to action at the end of the opening suspension + medium invert + with at least three close-ups.
Princess article, write an in-depth article on the theme in [the style], with three sub-arguments, each to give me a case.
Please write an article about the keyword [XXX] with at least five keywords containing the header H2/H3.
Press articles should include a clear title, precise guide, detailed coverage of the background, history, impact, etc. Interviews should be conducted with the relevant persons to obtain first-hand information to ensure the authenticity and objectivity of news reports, while using a dynamic language and rational structure to enhance the readability and attractiveness of news.
(b) To design a comprehensive and effective marketing strategy, including product location, brand promotion, price strategies, channel selection, promotion activities, etc., taking into account market trends and consumer demand. Develop detailed implementation plans and budgetary arrangements to ensure that marketing programmes are operational and measurable.
Video scripts can be used to generate video scripts for [specific themes], and to produce a high-quality video script that can be derived from story architecture, camera language, role setting, etc. The scripts should contain detailed scene descriptions, line design, camera motion, location, etc., and draw attention to the subject through smart plot designs and graphics.
Please convert this long article into a telecast case that corresponds to the echo of the pain, demanding loyalty to the core of the original text and not to create any undesired association.
Reconstruct the article with a warm healing framework.
Create a title using a suspense guide frame for this article, and help me generate 3 titles with no more than 20 words and emotional and flow-absorbed features.
Optimizing the article based on a celebrity story frame, optimizing the article, producing a oral story, and analysing the emotional resonance and inspirational sense of the chosen celebrity story.
Rewrite articles by contrast frame, rewrite by contrast frame structure, and take care to detail the specific circumstances and contrast analysis of the two emotional states
Use a little bit of detail to write a text message, a little bit of detail to use, a piece of text about the content, a piece of paper not more than 500 words, and highlight the emotional impact of the little detail.
To create content in an emotional dialogue framework, you can create oral stories in an emotional dialogue framework, to develop emotional stories and details, to solve emotional problems and to summarize the inspirational senses.
Reconstruct the article with a nostalgic framework, based on a nostalgic framework, starting with a nostalgic atmosphere, detailed narratives of memories and an analysis of emotional significance.
Restructure the article according to the difficult growth framework, restructure the article according to the difficult growth framework, describe emotional distress, growth transition and ways to overcome it, and call on readers to share their experiences.
Writing a text message in an inspirational and inspired framework, writing a text in an inspired and inspired framework, starting with a message or story, analysing the resonance and giving advice on the application of the inspiration.
"Now, you're gonna play a "scramble literary critic" and evaluate this short novel in sharp words, pointing out two cases and a lack of writing style."
Play the role, please play the conversation with me.
So, you can extract the following core points.
Poetry description. Please describe it in poetic language.
I have a text from a tech podcast that is structured around the application of artificial intelligence in medical applications. Please organize it according to the process, first organize and reconfigure, then refine four core points and arguments, and then draw one to two anticonsensual points.
I have a copy of the podcast text on the heritage of traditional cultures. Please read carefully and understand the subject line, re-construct, extract core ideas and arguments, and extract anti-consensual ideas, according to step.
I want to compile a commercial podcast text, which focuses on the marketing strategy of the business.
I want to create a personal job-force IP for new job-seekers aged 25 - 35 who want to be promoted and gain practical experience in the workplace. Please follow the A-process to guide me first to identify the target audience's portraits, then to provide personal information, background stories, professional achievements, and finally to export a personal IP-oral text, asking me if I am satisfied at the end of each step.
I am a good-food blogger who wants to build a personal IP for young people 18-30 who love to eat and try new restaurants and home-made foods. Please follow the B-based process and guide me to complete the steps, including self-introduction, sharing of developmental experiences, etc., by generating storybooks, combining them into small pieces and providing style choices, and making optimal disks and scores.
A. Process-building personal trainer IP My goal is to build a personal trainer-in-work IP, targeting people 20 - 40 years of age who want to be able to work with a body with a reduced plastic or a muscle. Please direct me to provide information in a sequence of events, complete the production of a personal IP story, and confirm my satisfaction at every step of the process.

entries.title: 内容推荐
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/内容推荐.csv
entries.summary: 内容推荐 请根据 [用户历史行为数据] 进行内容推荐，推荐与用户兴趣相符的相关内容，同时对推荐算法和推荐结果的合理性进行解释
entries.prompt:
内容推荐 请根据 [用户历史行为数据] 进行内容推荐，推荐与用户兴趣相符的相关内容，同时对推荐算法和推荐结果的合理性进行解释。可以使用推荐算法（如协同过滤、基于内容的推荐等）进行内容推荐，对用户历史行为数据进行分析和建模，使用评估指标（如准确率、召回率等）对推荐结果的合理性进行评估，提高内容推荐的准确性和效果。
协同过滤 请运用协同过滤算法，根据 [用户行为数据] 进行内容推荐，通过分析用户之间的相似性，为目标用户推荐其可能感兴趣的内容。可以使用基于用户的协同过滤算法或基于物品的协同过滤算法进行内容推荐，对用户行为数据进行分析和建模，使用相似度计算方法（如余弦相似度、皮尔逊相关系数等）分析用户之间的相似性，提高协同过滤算法的推荐效果。
基于内容的推荐 请基于 [内容特征数据] 进行基于内容的推荐，为用户推荐与已有内容特征相似的内容，说明推荐内容与目标内容的相似性依据。可以使用基于内容的推荐算法进行内容推荐，对内容特征数据进行分析和建模，使用相似度计算方法（如余弦相似度、欧氏距离等）计算推荐内容与目标内容的相似性，提高基于内容的推荐算法的推荐效果。
混合推荐 请结合多种推荐算法（如协同过滤、基于内容的推荐等）进行混合推荐，提高推荐效果，详细阐述混合推荐的策略和融合方式。可以使用混合推荐算法进行内容推荐，将多种推荐算法进行组合和融合，如加权融合、模型融合等，详细阐述混合推荐的策略和融合方式，提高混合推荐算法的推荐效果。
基于行为数据构建画像 根据【用户浏览记录、购买行为、搜索关键词等行为数据】，分析用户的兴趣偏好、消费习惯、使用场景等特征，构建详细的用户画像，为精准推荐提供依据。
结合人口统计学细化画像 融合【用户年龄、性别、地域、职业等人口统计学信息】，对已构建的用户画像进行细化，深入挖掘用户的潜在需求和个性化特点，使推荐更具针对性。
协同过滤算法应用 介绍协同过滤算法在内容推荐中的原理和优势，说明如何基于【用户行为数据】，利用该算法找到具有相似兴趣的用户群体，从而推荐他们感兴趣的内容。
内容过滤算法运用 讲解内容过滤算法如何根据【内容的属性，如文章主题、视频类型、商品特征等】，筛选出与用户历史偏好相似的内容进行推荐，分析该算法在不同场景下的适用性。
混合算法策略制定 阐述如何将协同过滤算法和内容过滤算法相结合，根据【具体业务场景和数据特点】，制定混合算法策略，以提高推荐的准确性和多样性。
热门内容筛选策略 基于【实时热度数据，如点赞数、评论数、播放量等】，制定热门内容筛选策略，确定筛选的时间范围、热度阈值等参数，确保推荐的热门内容具有时效性和吸引力。
个性化内容匹配 根据【用户画像和偏好模型】，从内容库中精准匹配符合用户兴趣的个性化内容，详细说明匹配的规则和流程，实现个性化推荐。
新内容推荐策略 针对【新发布的内容，如新书、新电影、新商品等】，设计推荐策略，考虑如何在保证推荐准确性的前提下，提高新内容的曝光率，让用户发现更多新鲜事物。
点击率分析方法 介绍如何通过分析【推荐内容的点击率数据】，评估推荐的吸引力和相关性，阐述点击率与推荐效果之间的关系，以及如何根据点击率调整推荐策略。
转化率评估指标 讲解如何运用【转化率，如购买转化率、注册转化率等】作为评估推荐效果的关键指标，分析不同类型内容推荐的转化率差异，为优化推荐提供数据支持。
用户留存率评估 探讨如何通过监测【用户留存率】，评估推荐对用户粘性的影响，分析推荐内容与用户留存之间的关联，提出提高用户留存率的推荐优化建议。
根据反馈优化推荐 基于【用户对推荐内容的反馈，如收藏、分享、取消推荐等】，分析用户的真实需求和喜好变化，调整推荐算法和策略，不断优化推荐结果。
A/B 测试实施方法 详细说明如何进行 A/B 测试，对比不同推荐算法、推荐界面设计或推荐策略的效果，根据测试结果选择最优方案，持续提升推荐系统的性能。
实时数据更新机制 介绍建立实时数据更新机制的重要性和方法，确保推荐系统能够及时获取【用户行为数据、内容数据、市场动态数据等】的变化，从而提供更符合用户当前需求的推荐。

en.title: Recommendations
en.summary: Please make content recommendations based on [user historical behavior data], with relevant content that matches user interest, and explain the rationale of recommended algorithms and recommended results
en.prompt:
The recommended algorithms (e.g., co-filing, content-based recommendations, etc.) can be used to make content recommendations, analyse and model the historical behavioural data of users, assess the reasonableness of the recommended results using indicators (e.g. accuracy, recall rates, etc.) and improve the accuracy and effectiveness of the recommended results.
Use a co-filing algorithm to recommend content based on [user behavioral data], and by analysing similarities between users, the target user may recommend content that may be of interest to it. Use a co-filing algorithm or a co-filing algorithm based on an item, to analyse and model user behavioral data, to analyse similarities among users using similar computation methods (e.g. cosine similarities, Pearson correlation factors, etc.) and to improve the recommended effects of co-filter algorithms.
Recommendations based on content are made on [content characteristic data], which suggests content similar to the content characteristics already available, and indicate the basis for the similarity of the recommended content to the target content. The recommended algorithms for content can be used to recommend content, analyse and model content characteristics data, calculate the similarities between the recommended and the target content using similar methods (e.g. cosine similarities, E.R. distance, etc.), and improve the recommended effects of the recommended algorithms based on content.
The recommendations are combined with the recommended algorithms (e.g., co-filing, content-based recommendations, etc.), which enhances the recommended effect and elaborates on the recommended strategies and integration methods.
A detailed user image is constructed to provide a basis for accurate recommendations based on the characteristics of user interest preferences, consumption habits, use of the image, etc. [user browse records, purchase behaviour, search keywords, etc.].
The use of detailed drawings in the context of demographics, the integration of [user-age, gender, geography, occupation, etc., demographic information], the fine-tuning of constructed user images, the deepening of potential user needs and individualized characteristics, and the greater targeting of recommendations.
Synergy filter algorithm application Introduction of the rationale and advantages of the co-opter algorithm in content recommendation, and how to use it to find user groups of similar interest, based on [user behaviour data], and thus recommend what they are interested in.
Content filter algorithms describe how content filter algorithms are used to select and recommend content similar to the user's historical preferences, and to analyse its applicability in different settings, depending on the content properties, such as the subject matter, video type, commodity characteristics, etc.
Mixed algorithm strategy development Description of how to combine co-opt and content filter algorithms to develop a hybrid algorithm strategy based on [specific business scenarios and data characteristics] to improve recommended accuracy and diversity.
The popular content screening strategy is based on [real-time heat data, such as points, comments, playbacks, etc.], which sets out the parameters of the time frame, heat threshold and other parameters for the selection, ensuring timeliness and appeal of the recommended popular content.
Personalized content matches, based on [user portraits and preferred models], to match precisely personalized content from the content base that meets user interests, specifying the rules and processes for matching, and to achieve individualized recommendations.
New content recommendation strategy for [new content, like new books, new films, new goods, etc.], design recommended strategy to consider how to increase the visibility of new content and make new things more visible to users, while ensuring accuracy of the recommendation.
Click rate analysis describes how the recommended appeal and relevance is assessed by analysing [the recommended hits data for content], describing the relationship between the recommended hits and recommended effects, and how the recommended strategy is adjusted to the recommended hits.
The conversion rate assessment indicator Explains how [transformation rate, e.g. purchase conversion rate, registration conversion rate, etc.] is used as a key indicator for assessing recommended effects, analyses recommended conversion rate differences for different types of content and provides data support for optimization recommendations.
User retention rate assessment Explore how the impact of recommendations on user stickability can be assessed through monitoring [user retention rate], analysing the correlation between recommended content and user retention, and recommending recommended optimization of the user retention rate.
Based on feedback optimization recommendations are based on [user feedback on recommended content, such as collection, sharing, cancellation of recommendations, etc.], real user needs and preferences are analysed, recommended algorithms and strategies are adjusted and recommended results are continuously optimized.
A/B test implementation method Detail how to conduct A/B tests, compare the effects of different recommended algorithms, recommended interface design or recommended strategy, select the best options based on the results of the tests, and continuously upgrade the performance of the recommended system.
Real-time data updating mechanisms The importance and methodology of establishing real-time data updating mechanisms to ensure that recommended systems can access changes [user behaviour data, content data, market dynamics, etc.] in a timely manner, thus providing recommendations that are more responsive to the current needs of users.

entries.title: 写作与创作
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/写作与创作.csv
entries.summary: 小说创作 请围绕[具体主题]和[设定情节]生成小说内容，构建完整的故事框架，塑造鲜明的人物形象，运用生动的语言和丰富的情节设计，创作一部长篇叙事
entries.prompt:
小说创作 请围绕[具体主题]和[设定情节]生成小说内容，构建完整的故事框架，塑造鲜明的人物形象，运用生动的语言和丰富的情节设计，创作一部长篇叙事作品。注重故事的逻辑性、连贯性和可读性，通过巧妙的情节推进和人物刻画，吸引读者沉浸在小说的世界中。
为仙侠小说写一句话概括 我想写一部仙侠小说，麻烦按照写小说流程，引导我完成第一步，帮我生成一句话概述小说内容，包含小说类型、主角以及故事中要完成的事，不超 25 个词，要有画面感，完成后询问我是否满意
创作校园小说的一段式概括 我打算创作校园小说，根据写小说的流程，在我对一句话概括满意后，进行第二步，帮我把一句话扩写成五句话的段落，要有完整三幕式结构、三次困难事件和清晰道德前提，故事要刺激、反复拉扯、有决定，完成后询问我是否进行下一步
设计职场小说的一页人物介绍 我正在创作职场小说，在我对一段式概括满意后，请进行第三步，从每个人物角度整理故事线，包括人名、身份、目标、抱负、价值观、矛盾、顿悟，完成后询问我是否满意
完善穿越小说的一页大纲 我在写穿越小说，在我对一页人物介绍满意后，进行第四步，把第二步的段落扩写为一页大纲，填入细节，完成后询问我是否满意
深挖都市小说人物背景故事 我在创作都市小说，在我对一页大纲满意后，请进行第五步，为小说人物撰写背景故事，深挖原生家庭等经历，完成后询问我是否满意
故事创意启发 根据【给定主题、场景或元素，如魔法森林、未来城市等】，提供 3 - 5 个独特的故事创意方向，从角色设定、情节冲突、主题内涵等方面进行简要阐述，激发创作灵感。
人物塑造方法 针对【故事类型或创作需求，如冒险小说、爱情故事等】，讲解如何塑造立体、丰满的人物形象，包括人物性格、外貌、背景、动机的设计，以及人物之间的关系构建。
情节架构搭建 围绕【故事主题和目标受众】，构建故事的情节架构，确定故事的开端、发展、高潮、结局，设计关键情节节点和情节转折点，使故事富有张力和吸引力。
对话编写技巧 分享编写精彩对话的技巧，包括如何通过对话展现人物性格、推动情节发展、营造氛围，以及对话的语言风格、节奏把控和口语化表达。
文案卖点提炼 针对【产品或服务，如智能扫地机器人、线上英语课程等】，挖掘其核心卖点，运用独特的视角和语言表达方式，将卖点转化为具有吸引力的文案内容，促进销售。
广告语创作 为【品牌或产品，如运动品牌、新款手机等】创作简洁有力、朗朗上口的广告语，突出品牌或产品的特点、优势和价值，增强品牌记忆点和传播效果。
为智能手表生成广告语 我有一款智能手表，产品名称是 [具体名称]，用途是运动监测、健康管理、信息提醒等，特点是续航长、屏幕清晰、功能丰富，优势在于精准的运动数据监测和时尚的外观设计，目标受众是 18 - 35 岁热爱运动和科技的年轻人。请按流程引导我，先确认信息后询问是否进行下一步，接着生成 10 条不同类型的广告语并打分，最后解释每条广告语的亮点
为宠物智能喂食器创作广告语 产品是宠物智能喂食器，能定时定量喂食、远程操控，特点是操作简单、材质安全，优势在于可通过手机 APP 控制，目标受众是 25 - 40 岁的养宠人士。请根据流程，引导我完成信息提供，之后生成广告语并打分，再解释广告语亮点
为新款空气净化器打造广告语 新款空气净化器，用途是净化室内空气，去除甲醛、PM2.5 等污染物，特点是净化效率高、噪音小，优势是采用先进的过滤技术，目标受众是 22 - 50 岁注重生活品质和健康的人群。请按步骤，先引导我确认是否继续，然后生成广告语、打分并解释亮点
新媒体文案撰写 根据【新媒体平台特点和受众喜好，如微信公众号、小红书等】，撰写吸引人的文案，包括标题撰写、内容结构设计、互动引导等，提高文章的阅读量和互动率。
散文写作思路 以【生活感悟、自然景观、情感体验等主题】为例，提供散文写作的思路和方法，包括如何捕捉生活中的细节、表达真挚情感、运用修辞手法和独特的语言风格。
诗歌创作指导 从诗歌的韵律、节奏、意象、主题等方面，指导诗歌创作，讲解诗歌的形式规范和创新技巧，帮助创作者表达独特的情感和思想。
剧本大纲编写 针对【电影、电视剧或舞台剧剧本】，编写故事大纲，明确主要人物、故事主线、关键情节和冲突，为剧本创作奠定基础。
小说章节规划 对于【长篇小说创作】，进行章节规划，确定每章的主要情节、人物发展和主题深化，使小说结构严谨、层次分明。
文案风格模仿 模仿【特定作家、品牌或风格，如张爱玲的文风、苹果的文案风格等】，撰写相关文案，从语言特色、表达方式、情感基调等方面进行模仿，掌握不同风格的写作技巧 。
散文与诗歌 请围绕[具体主题]和[表达情感]生成散文和诗歌，运用富有感染力的语言、独特的修辞手法和优美的韵律（诗歌），创作具有文学价值的作品。散文应形散而神聚，诗歌应注重意境的营造和情感的抒发，准确传达主题和情感，引发读者的共鸣。
以 “故乡的秋” 为主题设计散文结构 我想写一篇以 “故乡的秋” 为主题的散文，请根据散文写作指令，为我设计散文结构，包含引言、展开、转折（可选）和结尾部分，完成后询问我是否满意
参考济南的冬天风格写 “海边的夏” 初稿 我希望以 “海边的夏” 为主题创作散文，参考《济南的冬天》的风格、用词、语言逻辑和感情表达，按照之前设计的结构，帮我生成一篇 500 字左右的散文初稿，完成后询问我是否进行下一步
优化 “小镇的春” 散文并拟标题 我已经有一篇 “小镇的春” 的散文初稿，需要你进行优化润色。请为它生成一个具备散文特色的标题，添加细节和情感，调整语言和句式，之后展示优化后的散文，询问我是否满意
对联与歇后语 请结合[具体文化和语言背景]生成对联和歇后语，遵循对联的对仗工整、平仄协调原则，以及歇后语的幽默风趣、寓意深刻特点，创作相关的文学形式。对联和歇后语应融入特定的文化元素，展现语言的魅力和文化内涵，具有一定的趣味性和实用性。
根据文案生成爆款标题 根据以上这段文案生成【数量】个爆款标题
用公式 1 写宠物训练标题 我的内容选题是宠物训练，概要为分享一些训练狗狗定点上厕所的有效方法，目标受众是新手铲屎官。请基于公式 1 “XX 都可怕”，结合你的技能，为我创作 10 个对应标题并给出标题设计说明
以公式 3 创作职场经验标题 我想分享 30 岁职场人成功实现晋升的经验，内容概要为讲述晋升过程中克服的困难、用到的技巧等。请根据公式 3“我 / 身份，年龄（标签），XX,XX”，运用你的技能，生成 10 个标题及设计说明
按公式 7 打造美妆标题 内容选题是美妆产品推荐，概要为介绍一款能快速打造自然妆效的粉底液。请依据公式 7“一个很变态但… ”，利用你的技能，创作 10 个符合要求的标题并解释设计思路
用公式 10 写美食推荐标题 我要推荐一家超好吃的火锅店，内容概要为这家火锅店的特色菜品、独特锅底以及实惠的价格等。请根据公式 10 “被问爆了”，结合你的技能，创作 10 个标题并说明设计思路
口语化内容优化为专业报告 请将以下我的口语化内容优化为【报告类型及页数，如 5 页专业数据分析报告】
按 PREP 结构写抖音美食脚本 我希望在抖音发布一个美食类短视频脚本，字数不超过 800 字，目标人群是 18 - 30 岁的年轻人，内容主题是 “自制网红爆浆蛋糕教程”，内容风格为诙谐幽默，希望采用 PREP 结构撰写。请按流程引导我，先收集信息，接着撰写爆款文案并附上思路说明，然后修改润色，最后输出分镜头脚本
为宝妈群体创作育儿书推荐文案 我要为宝妈群体推荐育儿书籍，她们年龄在 25 - 35 岁，平时会利用碎片化时间阅读，更倾向于科学实用的育儿知识书籍。我推荐的书是《正面管教》。请按流程操作，先引导我确认是否继续，搜索书籍信息，生成标题和口播文案，优化文案并提醒配图，最后自我复盘打分并根据我的反馈完善文案
用对比结构创作小红书护肤脚本 我打算在小红书发布护肤短视频，字数 600 字左右，目标人群是 25 - 35 岁的女性，内容主题是 “正确的精华使用方法”，内容风格简洁。请按要求先收集信息，根据对比结构撰写文案、附上思路并润色，最终输出短视频分镜头脚本
以 RIDE 结构写 B 站数码脚本 我想在 B 站发布数码产品短视频，字数 900 字以内，目标人群是 15 - 30 岁的数码爱好者，内容主题是 “某款新耳机的优缺点评测”，内容风格为严肃认真，选择 RIDE 结构创作。请按流程先收集信息，再撰写文案、润色，最后输出分镜头脚本
扩展短视频脚本细节 帮我扩展下面这个【时长】秒短视频的脚本细节，增加人物对话和场景描写
为视频生成类比案例 为这个【视频主题，如科普视频】生成【数量】个通俗易懂的类比
文章去 AI 味并增加错别字 对这篇文章进行去 AI 味的同时故意增加【数量】个合理错别字
案例提炼核心观点 为这个【案例所属领域，如教育机构成功案例】提炼【数量】个可复制的【核心观点类别，如运营方法论】
随笔转化为学术论文 请将我的【随笔主题，如西藏旅行见闻】转化为符合【格式，如 MLA 格式】的【学科，如旅游人类学】论文
为公众号文章生成开头 为这篇【公众号文章主题，如 618 购物攻略】生成【数量】个【开头风格，如悬念式】开头段落
用数据优化市场分析报告 用近【时间范围，如三年】【数据类别，如消费数据】优化这篇【市场领域，如母婴市场】分析报告的可信度
根据关键词生成话题 根据【关键词，如 #健康饮食 #健身】自动生成【数量】个引发讨论的社交媒体话题
获取美妆赛道关键词 我想了解美妆赛道的相关关键词，请按流程引导我完成，先引导我提供赛道类别，之后输出该赛道的客户类别、用户痛点、使用场景关键词（每组 5 个网络高频词），完成后询问我是否进行下一步
生成健身赛道选题 我选择的赛道是健身赛道，请根据健身赛道的关键词组合，为我生成 10 个有吸引力、醒目且通俗易懂，带有情绪化元素的选题，加粗标注选题中的关键词，完成后询问我是否进行下一步
优化美食赛道选题 我需要优化美食赛道的选题，你之前为我生成了一些美食赛道选题，现在请根据我的要求进一步优化这些选题，确保它们更具吸引力和实用性，完成后询问我是否满意
按小红书调性写减肥文案 我想在小红书发布一篇减肥相关的文案，目标人群是 18 - 30 岁的女性，希望文案风格诙谐幽默，字数不超过 800 字，请根据要求为我撰写，严格按照文案结构格式，注意语言自然、过渡合理，撰写后附上思路说明，之后扮演资深中文老师进行润色并输出最终方案
为抖音创作科技类文案 我要在抖音发布科技类文案，目标人群为 20 - 40 岁的男性，文案风格严肃认真，字数控制在 600 字左右，请按照提供的文案结构创作，保证语言符合平台调性，完成后附上思路说明并进行润色
以视频号风格写生活分享文案 我打算在视频号发布生活分享类文案，面向 30 - 50 岁的人群，文案风格轻松自然，字数要求 500 字左右。请根据要求创作，遵循文案结构，注意语言表达，撰写思路说明后进行润色输出
为旅游文案设计评论区回复 我的文案内容是 “分享一次难忘的独自旅行经历，包括旅途中遇到的美景、有趣的人和事”，目标受众是 20 - 35 岁喜欢旅行的年轻人。请按流程引导我完成评论区金句引导回复设计，先引导我提供信息，之后告知我创作思路，再输出 10 个诙谐幽默、直击痛点需求、能与观众产生强烈共鸣并带有 emoj 表情的回复，根据我的反馈修改直到我满意
针对美食探店文案创作回复 我的文案主要介绍了一家有特色菜品的餐厅，包括菜品口味、餐厅环境等，目标受众是喜欢美食的上班族。请按照流程，先引导我确认是否继续，然后告知创作思路，接着输出 10 个符合要求的评论区金句引导回复，根据我的意见进行修改
为科技产品评测文案生成回复 我写的文案是关于一款新手机的评测，包含手机性能、拍照效果等方面，目标受众是追求科技产品的数码爱好者。请按步骤引导我，先询问我是否进行下一步，接着阐述创作思路，然后给出 10 个能引导互动的评论区金句回复，根据我的反馈调整
为职场人士写朋友圈软广文案 我想为一款智能办公软件写朋友圈软广文案，目标观众是职场人士，年龄在 25 - 40 岁，工作生活习惯是经常加班、依赖办公软件提高效率。产品描述是能提升办公效率、具备多种便捷功能，比如智能文档处理、快速会议安排等，卖点是操作简单、节省时间。请按流程，先引导我确认是否继续，接着根据文案结构参考和爆款词，输出朋友圈文案，之后整合输出并询问我的意见，最后进行自我复盘
针对年轻宝妈群体创作软广文案 产品是一款宝宝辅食机，目标观众是年轻宝妈，年龄在 22 - 30 岁，工作生活习惯是关注宝宝健康、常在家制作辅食。产品描述是操作简单、制作辅食细腻，卖点是材质安全、功能多样。请按照流程引导我，先询问是否进行下一步，再输出符合要求的文案，整合后询问我的看法，最后自我复盘并给出评价和建议
为大学生群体写化妆品软广文案 我的产品是一款平价保湿化妆品，目标观众是大学生，年龄在 18 - 22 岁，工作生活习惯是追求性价比、喜欢尝试新化妆品。产品描述是质地轻薄、保湿效果好，卖点是价格实惠、成分温和。请按步骤进行，先引导我确认是否继续，根据文案结构和爆款词输出文案，整合后询问我的意见，最后进行自我复盘
获取 10 月节日相关爆款选题 我是情感类赛道的自媒体博主，目标观众年龄在 20 - 35 岁，职业多为上班族，兴趣爱好包括追剧、阅读等，没有特定要介绍的产品或服务，希望了解 10 月的节日相关爆款选题。请按流程引导我，先询问我是否进行下一步，然后列出 10 月的中国传统节日或常见节日，再针对每个节日生成爆款选题，最后询问我是否进行下一步
根据节日选题生成情感类文案 我选择了 10 月国庆节的其中一个选题，具体选题为 [填写具体选题内容]。请根据给定的文案框架，为我生成一篇不少于 400 字的情感类文案，题目加上 emoji 表情，注意 emoji 表情不要单一，完成后询问我是否满意
为美妆赛道生成 12 月节日选题 我在美妆赛道做自媒体，目标观众是 18 - 30 岁的女性，职业多样，普遍对美妆产品和时尚感兴趣，想推广一款新的口红。请按流程操作，先询问我是否继续，列出 12 月的节日，接着针对每个节日生成爆款选题，之后询问我是否进行下一步
在小红书发布热点故事文案 我想在小红书发布故事文案，目标观众是 18 - 25 岁的大学生，他们喜欢追热点、关注娱乐和生活类内容。我关注的热点事件是某热门电视剧的剧情争议，大致想法是围绕剧中角色的行为展开故事创作。请按流程引导我完成，先询问我是否进行下一步，接着根据 “三幕式” 写作结构生成不少于 1000 字的故事文案，再进行自我优化并告知可插入配图的段落，最后进行优化复盘并打分
为 B 站创作热点故事脚本 我打算在 B 站发布故事视频，观众主要是 15 - 30 岁的动漫爱好者，平时喜欢看搞笑、冒险类内容。我关注的热点是某知名动漫角色的新剧情走向，希望围绕这个热点创作故事。请按步骤引导我，先询问是否继续，根据热点生成故事文案，优化后告知配图建议，最后进行优化复盘并给出评分
在公众号发布社会热点故事 我要在公众号发布故事，目标受众是 25 - 40 岁的职场人士，他们对社会热点事件和职场故事感兴趣。当前有个关于职场加班文化的热点讨论，我希望故事能反映这一现象。请按流程操作，先询问我是否进行下一步，根据 “三幕式” 结构生成故事文案，优化并给出配图提示，最后进行优化复盘和打分
按故事叙述风格创作微头条文案 我的微头条账号标签是情感类，目标观众是 20 - 35 岁的上班族，他们喜欢阅读情感故事和心灵鸡汤类内容。我想选择故事叙述风格进行创作，素材来源是我自己的一段情感经历：曾经在异地工作时，与好朋友逐渐疏远，后来又因为一次偶然的机会重新建立联系。请根据这些信息，选择 “引人入胜的故事 + 问题提出 + 解决过程 + 成果展示” 的文案框架，为我生成一篇不超过 300 字的微头条文案，完成后询问我是否需要进一步优化
