entries.title: 提问优化类
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/提问优化类.csv
entries.summary: 明确需求提问 避免模糊提问，采用 “帮我用【编程语言，如 Python】写一个【具体功能，如预测房价】的代码，数据是【数据格式，如 CSV 格式
entries.prompt:
明确需求提问 避免模糊提问，采用 “帮我用【编程语言，如 Python】写一个【具体功能，如预测房价】的代码，数据是【数据格式，如 CSV 格式】，列名包括【数据列名，如面积、地段、楼层】，要带数据清洗和可视化” 的提问方式，明确任务需求。
设定身份提问 在提问开头加上 “你是一个【专业身份，如 10 年经验的算法工程师】，现在要解决以下问题...”，获取专业角度的回答。
限制回答要求 在提问时加上 “给出可验证的参考资料来源”“如果不确定请明确说明” 等要求，限制 DeepSeek 的回答。
分步骤提问复杂问题 对于复杂问题，使用 “第一步先【列出可能的方法】，第二步【分析优缺点】，第三步【给出推荐方案】” 的分步骤提问方式。

en.title: Question Optimisation Class
en.summary: To identify the need for questions, avoid vague questions, and use the "Criteria for writing a code for [specific functions, such as house price projections] in [programmed language, for example, Python" for data in [data format, such as CSV format].
en.prompt:
Clear needs questions Avoid vague questions, using the question-based approach of “help me write a code for [specific functions such as forecast house prices] in [programmed language such as Python,] data format such as CSV format, listings including [data listings such as area, location, floor, data cleansing and visualization]”.
Set identity questions and add at the beginning, "You're a professional, like a 10-year-old algorithm engineer, now you have to solve the questions..." and get a professional answer.
Restricted reply to a request to add to the question a requirement such as " Give authentic reference sources " , " If not identified, please specify " , and limit the answer to DeepSeek.
Questions are complex in step, questions are complex in step, and questions are asked in step by step in step, using "first step [list possible methods], second step [analyse strengths and weaknesses], third step [give recommended options] " .

entries.title: 教育教学
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/教育教学.csv
entries.summary: 课程计划制定 以 “我是【教师身份相关背景，如中文母语者、英语教师】，我需要【构建一个针对特定学生群体，如幼儿园小朋友（也是中文母语）的全英语课
entries.prompt:
课程计划制定 以 “我是【教师身份相关背景，如中文母语者、英语教师】，我需要【构建一个针对特定学生群体，如幼儿园小朋友（也是中文母语）的全英语课程计划】，我希望【课程包括听力、口语、阅读、写作，有趣、有效、系统化】，你能帮助我【制定一个这样的课程计划】，【包含内容建议、资源和相关链接吗】” 为指令，制定课程计划。
课程内容优化 针对已制定的课程计划，输入 “请根据小朋友在课程中的反馈，优化【课程计划中的具体内容，如听力训练部分】，提高课程的趣味性和有效性”，优化课程内容。
教学资源补充 在课程实施过程中，使用 “我在实施【课程名称】时，发现【教学资源，如游戏资源、视频资源】不足，你能推荐一些相关资源吗？最好有相关链接” 指令，获取教学资源补充。
个性化学习教学设计 请依据【教材版本+学科+学段+课题名称】，生成一份完整的个性话教学设计教案。需依次明确各板块内容（包括授课地点、课前准备、课前准备、教学环境分析、学习策略的方法、教材内容分析、学情分析、教学目标、教学重难点分析、设计理念分析、教学环节、板书设计、课件设计、教学反思等），确保逻辑连贯、内容详实，符合教育教学原理和数字化教学环境要求。
设计初中【数学一元一次方程】教案 我要设计初中数学 “一元一次方程” 这节课的教案，课型是新授课，课时为 2 课时，受众群体是初中一年级学生。请按流程引导我，先确认基本信息后询问是否进入下一步，接着引导我上传课程内容或提供简介，进行学情分析、设计教学目标等，直至完成教案整体呈现和板书设计
制作【高中历史五四运动】教案 我想制作高中历史 “五四运动” 的教案，课型是讲授新课，课时为 1 课时，受众群体是高中一年级学生。请按照步骤，引导我完成信息提供、学情分析、教学目标设计等流程，最后输出完整教案及板书设计
规划【小学语文古诗】教案 我要规划小学语文古诗《静夜思》的教案，课型为精读课，课时 1 课时，受众群体是小学一年级学生。请按流程，先引导我提供信息，之后依次进行各环节设计，最终呈现完整教案和板书设计
教学方法选择建议 针对【不同学科、教学内容和学生特点】，分析讲授法、讨论法、项目式学习法等多种教学方法的适用性，给出选择建议。
教学评估 请针对 [教学过程和教学效果] 开展教学评估，设计科学合理的评估指标和评估方法，对教师的教学质量和学生的学习效果进行全面、客观的评价。
学生辅导 请根据 [学生的学习情况和需求] 进行学生辅导，制定个性化的辅导方案，帮助学生解决学习中遇到的困难和问题，提高学生的学习成绩。
混合式教学 请设计并实施 [具体课程] 的混合式教学方案，结合线上教学和线下教学的优势，合理安排教学活动，提高教学效果。
分层教学 请根据 [学生的学习能力和水平] 进行分层教学，将学生分为不同层次，制定相应的教学目标和教学内容，实施有针对性的教学。
导学案 请编写 [具体学科、具体章节] 的导学案，包括学习目标、学习重难点、学习过程、学习方法指导等，引导学生自主学习。
预学案-语文古诗词 请为[古诗词名称]生成预学案，包含作者生平及写作背景介绍、诗词原文标注生字读音和重点字词释义、初步梳理诗词大意并提出2 - 3个预习思考问题，引导学生理解诗词内涵。
预学案-数学函数 针对[函数章节名称]，生成预学案。列出函数的基本概念，如定义域、值域等；给出几个简单的函数示例，要求学生判断函数类型；设置思考问题，如函数图像的变化规律与函数表达式的关系。
预学案-英语一般现在时 设计一份关于英语一般现在时的预学案，解释一般现在时的定义，列举常见的标志词，如always、usually等；提供一些含有一般现在时的简单句子，让学生找出并分析结构；提出问题引导学生思考一般现在时在实际交流中的运用场景。
助学案-语文阅读理解 以[阅读文章标题]为例，生成助学案。先分析文章结构，划分段落层次并概括段落大意；针对文章中的重点语句进行详细解析，包括修辞手法、表达效果等；提供阅读技巧指导，如如何快速定位关键信息，以及针对文章内容的拓展练习题。
助学案-数学几何证明 围绕[几何证明题目类型，如三角形全等证明]生成助学案。梳理三角形全等的判定定理，通过具体例题详细展示证明思路和书写步骤；总结证明过程中的易错点和关键技巧；给出几道类似的证明题目，要求学生模仿练习并附上参考答案。
助学案-英语写作 为英语写作[写作主题，如My Hobbies]生成助学案。提供写作框架，如开头引入主题、中间描述爱好及原因、结尾总结升华；列举相关的常用词汇和句型，如表达喜好的短语；给出一篇优秀范文，让学生分析文章结构和亮点，然后进行写作练习。
固学案-语文文言文 针对[文言文篇目名称]生成固学案。设计字词巩固练习，包括实词、虚词的含义解释和用法辨析；翻译文中的重点句子；设置阅读理解问题，考查学生对文章内容和主旨的理解；要求学生背诵文中的重点段落。
固学案-数学概率统计 以[概率统计知识点，如古典概型]为核心生成固学案。出几道古典概型的计算题目，涵盖不同的情境；要求学生分析题目中的基本事件和样本空间；总结古典概型的解题方法和常见错误类型；提供拓展练习，如与其他知识点结合的综合题目。
固学案-英语词汇 围绕[英语单词主题，如动物类单词]生成固学案。设计单词拼写、词义匹配、词汇运用等练习；给出一些含有这些单词的句子，让学生进行语法填空或句子改写；引导学生运用所学单词进行短文写作，锻炼词汇综合运用能力。
评价量规表 请根据 [教学目标和评价标准] 制定评价量规表，明确评价指标和评价等级，用于对学生的学习成果进行量化评价。
教学大纲编写 根据【学科名称】和【课程目标】，设计涵盖教学内容、教学方法、考核方式等方面的课程大纲，确保课程体系完整且符合教学要求。
教学课件制作 请针对 [具体教学内容] 制作教学课件，包括文字、图片、音频、视频等多种元素，以增强教学的直观性和趣味性。
教学反思撰写 请根据 [教学过程和教学效果] 撰写教学反思，总结教学中的经验和教训，提出改进措施，不断提高教学质量。
作业设计 请根据 [教学目标和学生实际情况] 设计多样化的作业，包括书面作业、实践作业、探究作业等，以巩固学生所学知识，培养学生的综合能力。
教学资源收集 请收集 [特定学科、特定主题] 的教学资源，如教材、教案、课件、试题等，为教学活动提供丰富的素材。
教学资源整合 结合【学科课程】，整合教材、课件、在线课程、教学案例等资源，提供资源获取渠道及整合思路。
课程标准解读 请对 [具体课程标准] 进行解读，分析课程标准的要求和目标，为教学活动提供依据。
学科教研活动 请对 [具体学科教学活动] 进行全程把控，通过组织学生反馈小组或利用信息化教学管理平台，持续关注学生在教学活动中的学习状态、技能掌握进度和知识理解程度，确保教学活动按计划有序推进且学生能有效吸收知识与技能。一旦学生在操作步骤、概念理解、小组协作等方面出现错误频发、理解停滞、配合不畅等情况，迅速介入指导并详细记录相关状况。具体操作时，运用课堂观察量表、学习行为分析软件等工具，重点留意学生在函数图像绘制步骤的执行、对函数性质与图像关系的理解、小组讨论时的参与度等方面表现，分析学生学习行为的频率（如主动提问次数）、行为发起主体（个体学生或小组）、行为性质（积极探究、被动接受等）等特征。及时察觉教学活动中可能存在的教学引导不足、练习难度不匹配、小组分配不合理等潜在问题，并生成教学活动的即时评估报告，报告中应包含问题发现、原因剖析、当下改进措施及后续优化建议等内容，以此保障教学活动高效开展，提升学生学科素养。
学生学习评估 依据【教学内容和课程目标】，设计包括考试、作业、课堂表现等多元化的学生学习评估方案，明确评估标准。
教学活动策划 为【提升学生学习兴趣和参与度】，策划课堂互动、小组竞赛、实地考察等教学活动，说明活动流程和组织要点。
教育技术应用 介绍多媒体软件、在线教学平台、教育类 APP 等教育技术工具在教学中的应用方法，如使用技巧和应用场景。
个性化教学方案 根据【学生的学习能力、兴趣爱好和知识基础差异】，制定个性化教学方案，满足不同学生的学习需求。
家校沟通策略 提供与家长沟通学生学习情况、学校活动等内容的策略和方法，如家长会、家访、线上沟通技巧。
教师专业发展规划 针对【不同教龄和教学水平的教师】，制定涵盖教学技能提升、教育研究参与、课程开发等方面的专业发展规划。
教育政策解读 解读【国家或地方最新教育政策】，分析政策对教学实践、教育资源分配等方面的影响。
教学反思与改进 指导教师基于【教学实践中的问题和经验】进行教学反思，提出改进教学效果的措施和方法。
模仿教学风格解释理论 把我当成小孩子，模仿费曼的教学风格，使用卡夫卡的比喻方式，解释【理论名称，如量子力学基础理论】
解题过程转化为创意形式 将【问题及解题过程】分解成精彩的【短视频 / 相声 / 小品 / 电影 / 动漫…】, 分步讲解
苏格拉底提问法理解概念 用苏格拉底提问法帮我理解【概念名称，如人工智能概念】, 让我有所启发
可视化讲解公式 用可视化的方式讲解【公式名称，如鸡兔同笼公式】
编程逻辑图示转化 将【代码编程逻辑】转化为简单易懂的图示
案例分析法理解原理 用案例分析法帮我理解【原理名称，如经济学原理】
模仿风格讲解定律 用【作者风格，如李白、鲁迅的说话风格】讲解复杂的【定律名称】
生成知识误区或相似例子 生成【数量】个常见误区 / 举一反三，生成【数量】个相似例子
知识转化为趣味形式 把【知识点】转化为趣味知识卡片 / 趣味记忆口诀
知识转化为表格 将这个知识点转化为 Markdown 表格
智能问答理解 在我阅读过程中遇到问题时，为我提供即时解答，比如 “我在阅读《三体》时，对其中的物理概念不太理解，你能帮我解释一下吗？”
思维导图生成 将我阅读的内容自动生成思维导图，帮助我梳理逻辑结构，如 “请帮我将这篇关于人工智能的文章生成思维导图。”
创意写作辅助 为我提供写作素材、灵感提示和语言润色帮助，例如 “我想写一篇关于环保的作文，你能给我一些写作思路和素材吗？”
跨学科知识链接 将阅读内容与其他学科知识进行链接，帮助我构建跨学科的知识网络，比如 “我在学习历史时，发现了一些与地理相关的内容，你能帮我解释一下吗？”

en.title: Teaching and learning
en.summary: The curriculum was developed to read, "I am a teacher-related background, like Chinese mother tongue, English teacher," and I need to build an English-language course for specific groups of students, such as kindergarten children (also Chinese mother tongue).
en.prompt:
The curriculum is developed in the following terms: "I am a teacher-related background, such as a Chinese mother tongue, an English language teacher, and I need to build an English-language curriculum for specific groups of students, such as kindergarten children (also a Chinese mother tongue), and I hope that you can help me develop a curriculum for instructions.
For the curriculum plan that has been developed, insert the following: “Please optimize [the content of the curriculum, such as the hearing training component], based on feedback from the young people in the course, to improve the fun and effectiveness of the course” and optimize the content of the curriculum.
In the course of the course, using the instruction "I'm using the curriculum " , I find that there is not enough teaching resources, like game resources, video resources, can you recommend some relevant resources? Better have the relevant links" to get the teaching resources supplement.
Personalized learning teaching design. A full curriculum for the design of the individualized speech is developed based on the [curricular version + subject + subject section + subject name]. The content of the modules (including the place where the instruction is conducted, pre-school preparation, pre-curricular preparation, pedagogical environment analysis, learning strategy methodology, content analysis of the teaching materials, situation analysis, teaching objectives, learning hard spots analysis, conceptual analysis of the design, teaching links, book design, course design, and teaching reflection) needs to be defined in order to ensure logical consistency, substance-based content, in accordance with the principles of education and the requirements of the digital teaching environment.
Designing the curriculum for junior high school, I'm going to design the curriculum for the course "One dollar, one equation" in mathematics, which is new, with two classes, and a target group of first graders. Please direct me to the process, first confirm the basic information and ask me if I'm going to go next, then guide me to upload the content of the course or to provide a brief, to conduct a science analysis, design the objectives of the course, etc., until the whole curriculum is presented and the curriculum is designed.
I want to make a lesson in high school history, the "Four Four" program, with a new lesson, a 1-hour class, for students in the first year of high school. Please guide me to the next steps, and finally to complete the process of information delivery, science analysis, teaching goals design, and the final output of the full curriculum and book design.
I'm planning a curriculum for the English-language poem "Silent Nights" in primary schools, which is designed to be a master course, and a class of 1 hours, with a target group of first grade students.
The choice of teaching methods recommends that choices be made for the application of various teaching methods such as teaching methods, discussion methods, project-based learning methods and so forth, for [different disciplines, content and student characteristics].
(b) Teaching and learning assessment. Please conduct pedagogical assessments [of the teaching process and the effectiveness of teaching], design scientifically sound assessment indicators and methods, and conduct a comprehensive and objective evaluation of the quality of teaching and learning outcomes of teachers and students.
Student guidance is provided on the basis of [students' learning and needs], and individualized counselling programmes are developed to help students to solve difficulties and problems encountered in learning and to improve their learning achievement.
(c) A mixed teaching programme is designed and implemented [in specific curricula], combining the advantages of teaching on-line and off-line, rationalizing the activities of teaching and improving its effectiveness.
(b) The hierarchy of instruction is based on [the ability and level of learning of the student], with pupils divided into different levels, with corresponding objectives and content and with targeted teaching.
The guidebooks are prepared for [special subjects, specific chapters], including learning objectives, learning hard spots, learning processes, learning methods, etc., to guide students to self-learning.
Pre-school - Ancient Language Poetry. Create a pre-school for [the name of the ancient poem] that includes the author ' s background information on life and writing, the original language of the poems indicating the pronunciation and emphasis of the native word, the initial synthesizing of the poems and the presentation of 2 - 3 pre-school thinking questions, and guide students to understand the meaning of the poems.
Pre-school - Mathematical function Generates a pre-school for [function chapter name]. Lists the basic concepts of functions, such as defining domains, values, etc.; gives several simple examples of functions, requiring students to judge the type of function; sets the question of thinking, such as how the pattern of changes in function images relates to the function expression.
Pre-school - English is now usually designed to design a pre-school case for English, which is generally now, explaining the definition of English, and listing commonly used sign words such as " allways " ; providing simple sentences that contain the normal current-day structure that students can identify and analyse; and asking questions that lead students to reflect on the current practical use of the current situation.
Study aids - Language reading understandings.
The study aid case - mathematical geometry certificate - generates the study aid case around [the type of geometric proof subject, such as the triangulation certificate]. The decision-making theory of the trigonometry, etc., details the reasoning and writing steps through specific case-specific questions; summarizes the points of error and key techniques in the certification process; and gives several similar proof topics, requiring students to copy the exercise and attach references.
A study aid case - English writing - produces a study aid case for English writing [the subject of writing, such as My Hobbies].
Stereotyping - Language and language creates solid studies for [the title of the text and the language].
Solid case-magic probability statistics Generate solid case with [probability statistical knowledge points, such as classical profiles] as the core. Several classical scenarios are developed, covering different scenarios; students are required to analyse basic events and sample spaces in the subject; classical profile solutions and common error types are summarized; and extension exercises are provided, such as integrated topics in conjunction with other knowledge points.
Solid case - English vocabulary Generates solid case around [English word theme, e.g. animal word]. Designs exercises such as word spelling, word matching, vocabulary application; gives sentences containing these words, lets students use grammatically empty or rephrase the sentence; guides students to short-text writing using the words they learn and exercises a combination of vocabulary.
Please establish a schedule of evaluation measures, based on [the teaching objectives and evaluation criteria], that clearly identifies evaluation indicators and evaluation levels to be used in quantitative evaluation of students ' learning outcomes.
Curriculum development Design of curriculum outline covering the content of teaching, teaching methods, evaluation methods, etc., in accordance with [the subject name] and [the objectives of the curriculum], ensuring that the curriculum is complete and in line with the requirements of the teaching.
(b) To produce teaching materials, including text, pictures, audio, video and other elements, for [specific content], in order to enhance the visual and fun nature of teaching.
(c) To prepare a study on the basis of [the teaching process and the effectiveness of teaching], drawing on the experience and lessons learned in teaching and proposing measures for improvement and continuous improvement of the quality of teaching.
(b) Job design. Design diversified operations, including paper, practice, study, etc., in accordance with [the objectives of the teaching and the actual situation of the student], to consolidate the knowledge acquired by the student and to develop the student ' s comprehensive abilities.
(b) The collection of teaching resources [in specific disciplines, specific subjects], such as teaching materials, programmes, textbooks, test subjects, etc., which provide a wealth of material for teaching activities.
Integration of teaching resources Integration of teaching materials, course materials, online courses, teaching cases, etc., with resource access and integration of ideas, with [disciplinary curriculum]
Please interpret [the specific curriculum criteria], analyse the requirements and objectives of the curriculum standards and provide the basis for teaching activities.
(b) Study and study activities in disciplines: [System-specific teaching activities], through the organization of student feedback groups or the use of informational teaching management platforms, keep an eye on the student’s learning status, skill acquisition and knowledge understanding in teaching activities, ensuring that teaching activities are carried out according to plan and that students effectively absorb knowledge and skills. In case of errors in operational steps, conceptual understanding, group collaboration, etc., step-by-step, understanding stagnation, and lack of coordination, step-by-step guidance and detailed documentation of the situation. In the case of operations, use such tools as classroom observation schedules, learning behavior analysis software, and focus on student performance in the implementation of function image mapping steps, understanding of the nature of function and image relationships, and participation in group discussions.The analysis of the frequency of student learning behaviour (e.g. number of active questions), the subject of the initiation of the conduct (individual student or group), the nature of the behaviour (active inquiry, passive acceptance, etc.) is carried out.
(b) Designing a diversified student learning assessment programme that includes examinations, homework, classroom performance, etc., with clear evaluation criteria based on [the content of the teaching and course objectives].
Teaching activities are planned to [enhance student learning interest and participation], and teaching activities such as classroom interactions, group competitions, field trips, etc., are planned to describe the process and organizational highlights of the activities.
Introduction to the application of educational technology tools such as multimedia software, online teaching platforms, educational classes APPs, etc. in teaching, such as the use of techniques and application scenarios.
Individualized teaching programmes are developed to meet the learning needs of different students, based on [students ' learning abilities, hobbies and differences in knowledge base].
The strategy of communication in schools provides parents with strategies and methods to communicate with students, school activities, etc., such as parent meetings, home visits, online communication skills.
(c) Teacher professional development plans, which cover the areas of upgrading of teaching skills, participation in educational research, curriculum development, etc., are targeted at [teachers of different educational ages and levels].
Educational policy interpretation [new education policy at the national or local level], analysis of the impact of policy on teaching practices, resource allocation for education, etc.
Teaching reflection and improvement Guidance to teachers on teaching reflection based on [issues and experiences in teaching practice] proposes measures and methods to improve teaching effectiveness.
I'm a little kid, a little Ferman, a kafka metaphor, explaining.
The process of solving the problem becomes creative and decomposing into a wonderful way of explaining it in step.
Socrates' question method understands the concept, and Socrates' question method helps me understand it.
Visually speaking formulas, in visual terms.
The programming logic diagram is converted into a simple, understandable icon.
Case-analysis principles.
Imitation of the law, in which you explain the complex nature of the law.
Generate knowledge error or similar examples Generate [number] common error areas/ inverse three, produce [number] similar examples
Knowledge becomes fun form, knowledge points become fun knowledge cards / fun memory machines
Convert knowledge into a table. Convert this knowledge point into a Markdown table.
I'm just trying to understand the problem I've encountered in reading, and I'm being given immediate answers, like, "I don't understand the physical concepts in the trilogy, can you explain them?"
The mind map is generated to automatically generate the mind map of what I read, to help me comb the logic structure, like, "Please help me generate the mind map of this article on artificial intelligence."
Creative writing aids, which provide me with writing materials, inspirational tips and language improvement, like, "I want to write a piece on the environment, can you give me some writing ideas and material?"
Interdisciplinary knowledge links, linking reading content to other disciplines, helping me build interdisciplinary knowledge networks, like, "I found some geo-related content in my history, can you explain it?"

entries.title: 数据分析
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/数据分析.csv
entries.summary: 时间序列分析 请对 [时间序列数据] 进行深入分析，通过合适的时间序列预测算法，如ARIMA、LSTM等，精准预测未来一段时间内的趋势变化，并提
entries.prompt:
时间序列分析 请对 [时间序列数据] 进行深入分析，通过合适的时间序列预测算法，如ARIMA、LSTM等，精准预测未来一段时间内的趋势变化，并提供预测结果的置信区间。同时，对时间序列数据进行平稳性检验、季节性分析等，为预测模型的选择和优化提供依据。
数据洞察 请分析以下销售数据，找出3个增长机会和2个潜在风险。
用户画像 请根据以下行为数据，生成[产品]的目标用户画像，包含3个特征。
市场预测 请基于[行业]最新数据，预测未来6个月的3个趋势。
财报解读 请用通俗易懂的语言解读以下财务报表，指出2个关键问题和1个改进建议。
定价策略 请分析[竞品]间的定价策略，给出3个优化建议。

en.title: Data analysis
en.summary: Time series analysis Please provide an in-depth analysis of [time series data] to accurately predict trends over time through appropriate time series prediction algorithms, such as ARIMA, LSTM, and mention
en.prompt:
Time series analysis Please provide an in-depth analysis of [time series data], using appropriate time series prediction algorithms such as ARIMA, LSTM, etc., to accurately predict trends over a certain period of time in the future and provide confidence intervals for the forecast results. Meanwhile, time series data are subject to smooth testing, seasonal analysis, etc., to provide the basis for the selection and optimization of predictive models.
Please analyse the following sales data and identify three growth opportunities and two potential risks.
User portraits Please generate a target user portrait of [products] containing three features based on the following behavioural data.
Market projections Please project three trends over the next six months based on the latest [industry] data.
Please read the following financial statements in plain and understandable language, indicating two key issues and one recommendation for improvement.
Please analyse the pricing strategy between [competing] and give three recommendations for optimization.

entries.title: 数据可视化
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/数据可视化.csv
entries.summary: 数据可视化 请对 [提供的数据] 进行数据可视化处理，根据数据特点和分析需求，选择合适的图表类型（如柱状图、折线图等）将数据转换为直观易懂的图表
entries.prompt:
数据可视化 请对 [提供的数据] 进行数据可视化处理，根据数据特点和分析需求，选择合适的图表类型（如柱状图、折线图等）将数据转换为直观易懂的图表和图形，同时提供图表的详细解读。可以使用数据可视化工具（如Matplotlib、Seaborn等）进行数据可视化，对数据进行预处理、绘图和标注，提高数据可视化的效果和可读性。
折线图 请对 [随时间变化的数据] 生成折线图，清晰展示数据随时间的变化趋势，对折线图中的关键节点和趋势变化进行详细分析和解释。可以使用Matplotlib等工具生成折线图，对数据进行时间序列分析，标注关键节点和趋势变化，提高折线图的分析价值。
柱状图 请对 [包含不同类别数据的数据集] 生成柱状图，准确展示不同类别的数据分布情况，对各类别数据的差异进行对比分析。可以使用Matplotlib等工具生成柱状图，对数据进行分类统计，对比各类别数据的差异，提高柱状图的分析效果。
饼图 请对 [体现不同类别比例关系的数据] 生成饼图，直观展示不同类别的比例，同时标注出每个类别所占的具体百分比。可以使用Matplotlib等工具生成饼图，对数据进行比例计算和标注，提高饼图的可读性。
散点图 请对 [具有两个变量的数据] 生成散点图，清晰展示数据点之间的关系，通过分析散点图的分布特点，判断变量之间的相关性。可以使用Matplotlib等工具生成散点图，对数据进行相关性分析，判断变量之间的相关性，提高散点图的分析价值。
热力图 请对 [二维数据] 生成热力图，准确展示数据的密集程度，利用热力图找出数据的聚集区域和异常值分布。可以使用Seaborn等工具生成热力图，对二维数据进行可视化，找出数据的聚集区域和异常值分布，提高热力图的分析效果。

en.title: Data Visualization
en.summary: Please visualize the data [the data provided] and select the appropriate chart type (e.g., column, line, etc.) based on data characteristics and analytical needs to convert the data to a visual and understandable chart
en.prompt:
Please make data visualization available to [the data provided], select the appropriate chart type (e.g., column charts, line charts, etc.) according to data characteristics and analytical needs, and convert data to visually understandable charts and graphics, while providing detailed interpretation of the chart. Data visualization can be done using data visualization tools (e.g., Matplob, Seaborn, etc.), pre-processing, mapping and labelling of data, and improving the visualization effect and readability of data.
Line maps. You can generate a line map using tools such as Matplotslib, time-series analysis, key nodes and trend changes, and increase the analytical value of the line charts by indicating the trends over time.
Bar charts Please generate a column chart [that contains data sets for different categories] that accurately shows the distribution of data across different categories and compares the differences between categories.
A pie map is used to produce a pie map [data reflecting the ratio of different categories], showing in a visual way the proportions of different categories, while indicating the percentage of each category. A pie map can be generated using tools such as Matplotlib, which allows for the scale calculation and labelling of data, and improves the readability of the pie map.
A wildcard map is used to generate a wildcard map of [data with two variables], clearly show the relationship between the data points, and determine the correlation between the variables by analysing the distribution characteristics of the wildspot maps. A wildcard map can be generated using tools such as Matplotslib, which can be used to analyse the data relevance, determine the correlation between variables and increase the analytical value of the wildspot maps.
Thermotry, please use the heat to generate [two-dimensional data] to accurately demonstrate the intensity of the data, using the heat to find the concentration and the distribution of the abnormal values. The heat is generated using tools such as Seaborn, visualize the data, identify the concentrations and distribution of the abnormal values and improve the analytical effect of the thermal effort.

entries.title: 数据处理
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/数据处理.csv
entries.summary: 关键数据 通过构建数据分析模型，对数据进行深度分析，挖掘数据中的潜在规律和趋势，为决策提供科学、准确的数据依据和决策建议
entries.prompt:
关键数据 通过构建数据分析模型，对数据进行深度分析，挖掘数据中的潜在规律和趋势，为决策提供科学、准确的数据依据和决策建议。
趋势预测 请对[具体对象或数据序列]进行趋势预测，基于历史数据，运用时间序列分析、回归分析、机器学习算法（如神经网络、支持向量机等）等方法，建立合适的预测模型。对模型进行训练和优化，预测未来的发展趋势，评估预测结果的准确性和可靠性，为决策提供前瞻性的信息支持。
具体数据可视化 请对[具体数据]进行数据可视化，运用专业的数据可视化工具（如Python的Matplotlib、Seaborn库，或专业软件如Tableau、PowerBI等），将数据转换为直观易懂的图表和图形（如柱状图、折线图、散点图、箱线图等）。通过合理设计图表的颜色、布局、标签等元素，突出数据的特征和趋势，帮助用户更好地理解数据。

en.title: Data processing
en.summary: Key data through the construction of data analysis models, in-depth analysis of data, exploitation of potential patterns and trends in data, scientific, accurate data basis and decision-making recommendations for decision-making
en.prompt:
Key data provide scientific, accurate data basis and decision-making advice for decision-making by building data analysis models, carrying out in-depth analysis of data, exploiting potential patterns and trends in data.
(b) Trends projections [specific target or data series] are requested to establish appropriate predictive models based on historical data, using such methods as time series analysis, regression analysis, machine learning algorithms (e.g. neural networks, vector support machines, etc.). Models are trained and optimized, future trends are projected, the accuracy and reliability of the forecast results are assessed and forward-looking information is provided to support decision-making.
Please visualize [the specific data] using specialized data visualization tools (e.g. Matplob, Seaborn Library of Python, or professional software such as Tableau, PowerBI, etc.) to convert data into visually understandable charts and graphics (e.g. columns, folding charts, scatter maps, box lines, etc.). By reasonably designing the colour, layout, labels, etc. of the chart, the characteristics and trends of data will be highlighted to help users better understand the data.

entries.title: 数据存储
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/数据存储.csv
entries.summary: 数据存储 请将 [待存储的数据] 安全地存储到指定的数据存储介质（如数据库、文件系统等）中，确保数据的完整性和一致性
entries.prompt:
数据存储 请将 [待存储的数据] 安全地存储到指定的数据存储介质（如数据库、文件系统等）中，确保数据的完整性和一致性。
数据库设计 请根据 [业务需求] 进行数据库设计，包括表结构设计、字段定义、索引创建等，以满足数据的高效存储和查询需求。
数据备份 请制定数据备份策略，定期对 [重要数据] 进行备份，备份数据应存储在不同的地理位置，以防止数据丢失。
数据恢复 请建立数据恢复机制，当数据出现丢失或损坏时，能够快速从备份数据中恢复到正常状态。

en.title: Data Storage
en.summary: Please store [data to be stored] safely in the specified data storage medium (e.g. database, file system, etc.) to ensure data integrity and consistency
en.prompt:
Please store [data to be stored] safely in the specified data storage medium (e.g. database, file system, etc.) to ensure data integrity and consistency.
Database design Please design the database according to [business needs], including table structure design, field definition, index creation etc., to meet the efficient storage and query needs of data.
Please develop a data backup strategy, which should be stored in different geographical locations to prevent data loss, and to keep [critical data] back-up regularly.
Please establish a data recovery mechanism that can quickly recover from backup data when data are lost or damaged.

entries.title: 数据挖掘
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/数据挖掘.csv
entries.summary: 数据清洗 请对 [原始数据集] 进行数据清洗，去除重复数据、缺失值和异常值，确保数据的准确性和完整性
entries.prompt:
数据清洗 请对 [原始数据集] 进行数据清洗，去除重复数据、缺失值和异常值，确保数据的准确性和完整性。
数据转换 请对 [特定数据集] 进行数据转换，如数据标准化、归一化等，以满足后续分析和建模的需求。
数据聚合 请对 [多个数据集] 进行数据聚合操作，将相关数据合并在一起，方便进行综合分析。
数据挖掘 请对 [数据集名称] 进行数据挖掘，深度剖析数据，从数据集中精准提取具有高价值、可指导业务决策的信息。可采用多种数据挖掘算法，如聚类分析、关联规则挖掘等，对数据进行全面探索，挖掘潜在的模式和规律。同时，对挖掘结果进行可视化展示，以便更直观地理解数据。
特征选择 请针对 [数据集及特征列表] 开展特征选择工作，从众多特征中筛选出与目标变量关联度最高、对后续分析和建模最为关键的特征。可以使用相关性分析、方差分析等方法进行特征筛选，同时考虑特征之间的相关性，避免冗余特征的引入。
聚类分析 请对 [数据集] 执行聚类分析操作，通过合适的聚类算法，如K-Means、DBSCAN等，将数据点科学合理地分组到不同簇中，并对每个簇的特征进行详细描述。分析簇内数据的相似性和簇间数据的差异性，为后续的数据分析和决策提供支持。
关联规则 请对 [数据集] 进行关联规则挖掘，深度揭示变量之间隐藏的、有意义的关系，以支持业务决策，例如发现产品购买组合规律等。使用Apriori算法或FP-Growth算法进行关联规则挖掘，设置合适的支持度和置信度阈值，筛选出有价值的关联规则。
异常检测 请构建实时异常检测系统，对 [数据来源，如业务日志数据、传感器数据等] 进行实时监测，及时发现偏离正常模式的异常行为，并给出异常的详细描述和可能原因。可以使用基于统计的方法、机器学习算法（如孤立森林、One-Class SVM等）进行异常检测，对异常数据进行标记和记录，以便后续分析和处理。
文本挖掘 请对 [大量文本数据集合，如新闻文章库、社交媒体评论集等] 进行文本挖掘，提取关键信息，如主题、情感倾向、关键事件等，以支持舆情分析、市场调研等业务。可以使用词频统计、主题模型（如LDA）、情感分析算法等进行文本挖掘，对文本数据进行预处理、特征提取和模型训练，提高文本挖掘的准确性和效率。
数据论证 请用具体数据论证…… 观点的正确性

en.title: Data mining
en.summary: Please clean the [original data set] of data to remove duplicates, missing and abnormal values and ensure the accuracy and completeness of data
en.prompt:
Please clean the [original data set] of data to remove duplicates, missing and abnormal values and to ensure the accuracy and completeness of data.
Data conversion Please perform data conversions of [specific data sets], such as data standardization, standardization etc., to meet the need for subsequent analysis and modelling.
Data aggregation. Please use the data aggregation of [multiple data sets] to combine relevant data to facilitate integrated analysis.
Data mining Please perform data excavations [name of data set], in depth profile data, to extract high-value information from data concentration that can guide business decision-making. A full survey of data and potential patterns and patterns can be conducted using multiple data mining algorithms, such as cluster analysis, association rule excavation, etc., while visualizing the results of excavations to understand the data more sharply.
Characteristics Selection Please perform a feature selection process for [datasets and feature lists], screening from a wide range of features that are most relevant to the target variable and are critical for subsequent analysis and modelling. Characterization screening can be done using such methods as relevance analysis, variance analysis, etc., taking into account the correlation between features and avoiding the introduction of redundant features.
Please perform a cluster analysis operation for [datasets], using appropriate cluster algorithms, such as K-Means, DBSCAN, etc., to group data point science reasonably into different clusters and describe the characteristics of each cluster in detail. Analysis of similarities in data and differences in data between clusters supports subsequent data analysis and decision-making.
Linkage rules are available for [data sets] to provide insight into hidden and meaningful relationships between variables to support business decision-making, such as the discovery of product-purchase combination patterns.
An anomaly detection system is built to monitor [data sources, such as business log data, sensor data, etc.] in real time, detect deviations from normal patterns in a timely manner, and provide a detailed description of the anomalies and possible reasons. An anomaly can be detected using statistically based methods, machine learning algorithms (e.g. isolated forests, One-Class SVM, etc.), and unusual data can be marked and recorded for subsequent analysis and processing.
Text mining [a large collection of text data, such as news articles, social media reviews, etc.] is available for text mining, extracting key information such as themes, emotional tendencies, key events, etc., to support operations such as narration analysis, market research, etc. Text mining can be done using word frequency statistics, thematic models (such as LDAs), emotional analysis algorithms, etc., pre-processing, feature extraction and modeling of text data, and improving the accuracy and efficiency of text mining.
Data validation. Please use specific data to demonstrate the validity of the view.

entries.title: 文件处理类
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/文件处理类.csv
entries.summary: 文档分析 上传文件后，输入具体指令进行文档分析，如 “总结这份项目策划书的重点内容”“提取报告中的关键数据制成表格”
entries.prompt:
文档分析 上传文件后，输入具体指令进行文档分析，如 “总结这份项目策划书的重点内容”“提取报告中的关键数据制成表格”
对比分析 针对多个文档，使用 “对比文档 A 和文档 B 的 [具体内容，如观点、策略等] 差异” 指令进行对比分析
数据提取 从文档中提取特定数据时，采用 “从 [文档名称] 中整理所有 [数据类型，如销售额数据、时间数据等]” 指令

en.title: Document processing class
en.summary: Document analysis Upon uploading files, enter specific instructions for document analysis, such as "Summary the highlights of this project plan" "Preparing key data from extracting reports into tables"
en.prompt:
Document analysis Upon uploading files, enter specific instructions for document analysis, such as "Summary the highlights of this project plan" "Preparing key data from extracting reports into tables"
Comparative analysis, for multiple documents, using the [specific content, such as views, strategies, etc.] instruction "Comparation document A and document B differences"
When extracting data from a document, use the "Calculate all [data types, e.g. sales, time data, etc.]" command

entries.title: 文本搜索
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/文本搜索.csv
entries.summary: 文本搜索 请在 [文档数据库名称] 中进行文本搜索，查找与 “特定关键词” 紧密相关的内容，不仅返回包含关键词的文档，还需根据相关性进行排序
entries.prompt:
文本搜索 请在 [文档数据库名称] 中进行文本搜索，查找与 “特定关键词” 紧密相关的内容，不仅返回包含关键词的文档，还需根据相关性进行排序。可以使用全文检索引擎（如Elasticsearch）进行文本搜索，采用TF-IDF、BM25等算法计算文档与关键词的相关性得分，提高搜索结果的准确性和排序效果。
全文搜索 请在大量文档中进行全文搜索，精准查找与搜索需求相关的段落，同时提供每个段落与搜索内容相关性的评估依据。可以使用基于向量空间模型的全文搜索算法，将文档和搜索词表示为向量，计算向量之间的相似度，作为相关性评估的依据。
关键词提取 请对 [文档内容] 进行关键词提取，生成全面、精准且具有代表性的关键词列表，关键词应能准确概括文档的核心内容。可以使用TF-IDF、TextRank等算法进行关键词提取，对文档进行分词、词性标注等预处理，提高关键词提取的准确性和效率。
语义搜索 请在 [文档集合] 中进行语义搜索，找到与查询语义高度相关的文档，通过语义相似度算法（如Word2Vec、BERT等）对搜索结果进行排序。可以使用预训练的语言模型对文档和查询进行编码，计算编码向量之间的相似度，提高语义搜索的准确性和效果。

en.title: Text Search
en.summary: Text search Please search text in [document database name] for content that is closely related to "Specific keywords", not only returning documents containing keywords, but also sorting them according to relevance
en.prompt:
Text search. You can use the full-text search engine (e.g. Elasticsearch) to search for text in [document database name] for content that is closely related to the " specified keyword " . The search is conducted using the TF-IDF, BM25 algorithms to calculate the relevance of the document to the keyword and to improve the accuracy and sorting effect of the search results.
Full-text search. Please search the full-text search in a large number of documents to precisely search for paragraphs relevant to the search requirements, while providing the basis for assessing the relevance of each paragraph to the search content. You can use a full-text search algorithm based on vector space models to express the document and search word as vectors and calculate similarities between vectors as a basis for relevance assessment.
Keyword extraction. Please extract the [document contents] keywords to produce a comprehensive, accurate and representative list of keywords that accurately capture the core content of the document. Keyword extraction can be done using TF-IDF, TextRank, etc. algorithms, pre-processing documents with words, word type labels, etc., to improve the accuracy and efficiency of keyword extraction.
Semantic search. You can use pre-trained language models to encode documents and queries, calculate similarities between code vectors, improve the accuracy and effect of semantic search by finding documents associated with the semantic height of the search.

entries.id: 问答-文生图-提示词生成
entries.title: 文生图-提示词生成
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/文生图-提示词生成.csv
entries.summary: 奇幻风格提示词 请生成用于生成奇幻风格图像的提示词，画面呈现一个神秘的异世界，有漂浮的岛屿被绚丽的极光环绕，岛屿上生长着巨大的发光蘑菇和奇异的会
entries.prompt:
奇幻风格提示词 请生成用于生成奇幻风格图像的提示词，画面呈现一个神秘的异世界，有漂浮的岛屿被绚丽的极光环绕，岛屿上生长着巨大的发光蘑菇和奇异的会飞的花朵。画面中心是一座宏伟的魔法学院，学院的尖塔闪烁着魔法光芒，学院前的广场上，魔法学徒们在练习魔法，他们手中的魔法杖释放出五彩斑斓的光芒，天空中还有巨大的飞龙翱翔。
古风风格提示词 请生成用于生成古风风格图像的提示词，描绘江南水乡的春日清晨，粉墙黛瓦的古民居错落有致地排列在清澈的河边，河面上漂浮着几叶扁舟，船头站着身着蓑衣的渔夫。岸边垂柳依依，嫩绿的柳条随风飘舞，桃花盛开，花瓣纷纷扬扬地飘落。远处山峦起伏，云雾缭绕，若隐若现的古寺钟声似乎在空气中回荡。
赛博朋克风格提示词 请生成用于生成赛博朋克风格图像的提示词，以未来的废弃都市为背景，灰暗的天空下，破旧的高楼大厦布满了涂鸦和闪烁的故障灯光。街道上到处是废弃的机器人零件和垃圾，偶尔有几个经过机械改造的居民匆匆走过，他们身上的义体闪烁着冰冷的金属光泽。街角有一个破旧的电子广告牌，上面播放着模糊不清的广告画面，画面中的色彩与周围的灰暗形成鲜明对比。
水墨风格提示词 请生成用于生成水墨风格图像的提示词，展现一幅山水画卷，远处层峦叠嶂的山峰在云雾中若隐若现，山峰由浓墨勾勒轮廓，淡墨渲染山体，呈现出独特的层次感。山间瀑布如银练般垂下，用灵动的线条表现水流的动态。山脚下是一片宁静的湖泊，湖水用淡墨晕染，岸边几株垂柳，细长的柳枝用中锋笔法画出，随风摇曳。湖面上有一艘孤舟，船头站着一位身着素衣的文人，正举目远眺，画面营造出宁静悠远的意境。
写实风格提示词 请生成用于生成写实风格图像的提示词，拍摄视角聚焦于一个热闹的早市。摊位上摆满了新鲜的蔬菜水果，红彤彤的西红柿、翠绿的青菜、金黄的橙子色泽鲜艳且质感逼真。摊主们热情地招呼着顾客，脸上的皱纹和汗珠清晰可见。顾客们有的在挑选商品，有的在与摊主讨价还价，他们的表情和动作生动自然。地面上有湿漉漉的水渍，摊位上的招牌字迹清晰，远处的建筑和天空也以写实的手法呈现，整个画面充满生活气息。
波普艺术风格提示词 请生成用于生成波普艺术风格图像的提示词，画面以明亮且高饱和度的色彩为主，如荧光粉、柠檬黄、宝蓝。主体是一个巨大的流行文化标志性形象，比如玛丽莲·梦露的头像，头像被放大且重复排列，每个头像的色彩都有微妙变化。背景是由各种夸张的几何图形，如圆形、三角形、正方形组成的图案，这些图形中填充着如报纸条纹、彩色网点等元素，营造出强烈的视觉冲击感。
蒸汽朋克风格提示词 请生成用于生成蒸汽朋克风格图像的提示词，画面是一个充满齿轮、链条和蒸汽管道的机械城市。城市中高耸着巨大的蒸汽动力建筑，烟囱冒着滚滚浓烟。街道上行驶着蒸汽驱动的汽车和飞艇，汽车造型复古且带有复杂的机械装饰，飞艇的表面有铆钉和铜质装饰。人们穿着带有金属质感和皮革元素的服装，手中拿着各种蒸汽朋克风格的机械装置，天空中弥漫着蒸汽，阳光透过蒸汽洒下，整个画面充满工业感和复古未来主义氛围。
洛可可风格提示词 请生成用于生成洛可可风格图像的提示词，画面展现一个华丽的室内场景。房间的墙壁和天花板装饰着精美的石膏雕花，色彩以粉色、淡蓝色和金色为主，营造出柔和而奢华的氛围。房间中有一张雕花的木质贵妃椅，椅垫和靠背是绸缎材质，上面绣着精致的花卉图案。旁边的桌子上摆放着水晶吊灯折射出的五彩光芒映照下的精致瓷器和鲜花。地板是拼花木地板，图案复杂而优雅。窗边挂着轻薄的蕾丝窗帘，微风轻轻吹动窗帘，整个画面充满浪漫、优雅和细腻的装饰感。
北欧简约风格提示词 请生成用于生成北欧简约风格图像的提示词，画面是一间明亮的客厅。白色的墙壁搭配浅木色的地板，给人简洁、舒适的感觉。客厅摆放着一套浅灰色的布艺沙发，沙发上随意地放着几个色彩柔和的抱枕。客厅中央有一个简洁的白色茶几，上面摆放着一束北欧常见的绿植，如尤加利叶。一侧的落地窗让充足的自然光洒入室内，窗边挂着白色的简约窗帘。远处可以看到窗外是一片宁静的森林或湖泊，整个画面以简洁的线条、自然的材质和淡雅的色彩营造出宁静、舒适的空间氛围。
新中式风格提示词 请生成用于生成新中式风格图像的提示词，画面呈现一个现代与传统融合的书房。木质书架上摆放着线装古籍和现代书籍，书架的造型简约且带有中式传统的格栅元素。书桌是深色实木材质，桌上放着笔墨。
卡通Q版风格提示词 请生成用于生成卡通Q版风格图像的提示词，画面中是一群可爱的小动物在童话森林里举办派对。一只Q版的小兔子戴着彩色的生日帽，正开心地笑着，它的脸蛋圆圆的，眼睛又大又亮像两颗黑宝石。旁边的小松鼠抱着一堆坚果，毛茸茸的大尾巴向上翘着，身上的皮毛色彩鲜艳且柔和。不远处，几只小鸟站在树枝上，叽叽喳喳地唱着歌，它们的羽毛有着彩虹般的颜色。森林里的树木都是大大的蘑菇形状，蘑菇上还有彩色的斑点，地面上铺满了五颜六色的花朵。派对上有一个大大的蛋糕，蛋糕上插着蜡烛，奶油的质感看起来十分诱人，整个画面充满童趣、色彩鲜艳且萌趣满满。

en.title: Text-in-Kindion Generation
en.summary: Quiz-style tips, create a hint for the creation of a phantom-style image of a mysterious world, with floating islands surrounded by radiant auroral rings, huge glowing mushrooms and strange meetings on the island.
en.prompt:
Quiz-style tips, create a hint for the creation of a phantom-style image of a mysterious world, with floating islands surrounded by radiant auroral rings, with huge glowing mushrooms and wonderful flying flowers. The center of the picture is a grand magic college, its towers are shining with magic, its pre-school squares, its apprentices are practicing magic, their magic cane is releasing five-colored lights, and huge dragons are flying in the sky.
Ancient style of the wind, for example, is the first time in the spring morning, when the town of Gangnam is located on the clear river, where the old people of the pink wall Deva are stubble in the clear river, and the river is floating with a few leaves of the cane, and the boat is standing in its coat. The dyke is on the shore, the green willows are dancing with the wind, the peaches are blooming and the petals are falling. The mountains are falling and the clouds are stale, and if the ancient temple bells hidden are sounding back in the air.
Saberpunk style tips, please generate a hint for creating Saberpunk style images, in the context of the future abandoned city, with a gray sky full of graffiti and flashy glitters of broken buildings. Streets are full of abandoned robot parts and garbage, and occasionally have a few mechanically modified residents rushing through, with their body glittering with cold metal light. There is a worn electronic billboard on the corner of the street, with vague advertising images, in contrast to the dark surroundings.
Ink style tips are given to create ink-style images, displaying a mountain-watering roll, remote and folding mountain peaks that are hidden in cloudy clouds, contoured by thick ink, and light ink-rewd mountains, with a unique sense of hierarchy. The mountains fall down like silver, with a moving line of water flow. Under the foot of the mountain is a quiet lake, the lake is dizzled with a faint ink, several willows on the shore, and long branches are drawn with a middle-knit pen, twirl. A boat is on the surface of the lake, standing on a boat with a man in a silk coat, looking at the distance, creating a calm and distant view.
Written style tips: Create a hint for producing a realistic image, with a view to a lively morning market. The booths are full of fresh vegetable fruit, red tomatoes, green green vegetables, yellow oranges and bright and humbling. The stalls are warm with customers, and the wrinkles and sweatstones on their faces are visible. Some customers are looking for goods, some are negotiating with their host, their faces and their movements are natural. There are wet water on the floor, signs on the stands are clear, and far-away buildings and sky are presented in a written way, with life-changing images.
Popper styles are used to generate pop-up-style graphics with bright and saturated colours such as fluorescent powder, lemon yellow, and bouncy blue. The subject is a huge popular cultural icon, like Marilyn Monroe's head, which is magnified and repeated, and the colours of each image are slightly different. The background is a highly visual shock-generating pattern of various exaggerated geometrical images, such as circles, triangles, squares, filled with elements such as newspaper strips, coloured web points.
Steam punk-like tips, please generate a hint for generating steam punk-like images, a mechanical city full of gear, chains and steam pipes. The city is full of huge steam-powered buildings with smoke in its chimneys. The streets are driven by steam-driven cars and boats, cars are old and complex mechanical and their surfaces are nailed and copper-based. People wear clothing with metal and leather elements, with steam punk-like mechanical devices in their hands, and the sky is filled with steam, and the sun is pouring through it, with industrial sense and a culture of retrospectivism.
Loco style hints, create a nice interior scene for producing Loko style images. The walls and ceilings of the room are decorated with fine carved gloss, coloured with pink, light blue and gold, creating a soft and luxurious atmosphere. There is a wooden high-prime chair with carving flowers, a mat and a back with a fine picture of flowers. The table next to it is a fine glass of fine ceramics and flowers, with a five-colored picture of crystal chandeliers. The floor is a wooded floor, complex and elegant. The window is a lightly silhouette, a light wind blowing curtain, a small wind blowing and a whole picture of romantic, elegant and delicate decoration.
A brief Nordic style tip is requested to generate a bright living room with a bright, white wall with light wooden floors, which give a sense of simplicity and comfort. The living room is equipped with a light grey cloth couch with a few soft-coloured pillows on it. There is a simple white tea spot in the center of the living room, with a green plant common to northern Europe, such as Yugari. The falling window on the side allows sufficient natural light to spill into the room, with white curtains on the side. It is clear that the window is a quiet forest or lake, and the whole image creates a calm and comfortable space with a fine line, natural material and light colour.
New Chinese style tips generate a hint for generating new medium style images that present a modern and traditional room. The wooden bookshelves are lined with ancient and modern books, and the shelves are simple and have a classic grid element. The desks are dark and solid wood with pen ink on the tables.
A Q-style rabbit with a colored birthday hat and a smile, its face round, and its eyes full of two black stones. Next to the squirrels, with a pile of nuts, hairy big tails high up, furry and soft. A few little birds standing on branches singing with their feathers colored with rainbow colours. Trees in the forest are huge mushroom shapes, with mushrooms with coloured spots, and six-colored flowers on the floor. There's a big cake on the floor, with candles on it, and creams look so attractive and full of fun.

entries.title: 文生视频-提示词
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/文生视频-提示词.csv
entries.summary: 奇幻冒险风格 请生成用于生成奇幻冒险风格的提示词，镜头从一片浩瀚神秘的星空拉开，无数璀璨星辰闪烁，一颗拖着长尾的流星划过，镜头跟随流星坠向一个奇
entries.prompt:
奇幻冒险风格 请生成用于生成奇幻冒险风格的提示词，镜头从一片浩瀚神秘的星空拉开，无数璀璨星辰闪烁，一颗拖着长尾的流星划过，镜头跟随流星坠向一个奇幻大陆。大陆上有一座古老的魔法城堡，城堡的尖顶在阳光下闪耀着神秘光芒。城堡大门缓缓打开，走出一位身着华丽魔法袍的少年魔法师。他手持魔杖，念动咒语，召唤出一只巨大的、浑身散发着蓝光的飞龙。飞龙载着少年飞越茂密的魔法森林，森林里奇异的发光植物闪烁，巨大的藤蔓在空中舞动。突然，前方出现一个神秘的黑暗洞穴，洞穴中传来诡异的声响。少年和飞龙勇敢地飞了进去，洞穴中充满了各种奇异的魔法生物和神秘符文。在洞穴深处，有一颗散发着强大魔力的水晶，少年能否成功获取水晶，展开一段惊心动魄的奇幻冒险！
古风诗意风格 请生成用于生成古风诗意风格的提示词，清晨，第一缕阳光洒在宁静的江南水乡小镇。镜头沿着青石板路推进，街边是粉墙黛瓦的房屋，屋顶的炊烟袅袅升起。一位身着淡蓝色古装的女子，手持油纸伞，漫步在河边。河水清澈见底，倒映着岸边的垂柳和房屋。女子走到一座古桥上，凭栏远眺，远处山峦连绵，云雾缭绕，如诗如画。随着微风，樱花花瓣纷纷飘落，女子轻轻抬手接住一片花瓣，眼神中透露出淡淡的忧伤。画面切换到夜晚，小镇灯火辉煌，河面上飘着一盏盏花灯，女子和一群人一起放花灯，许愿，整个画面充满了古风诗意和浪漫氛围。
赛博朋克未来都市风格 请生成用于生成赛博朋克未来都市风格的提示词，未来的超大型都市，霓虹灯闪烁，巨大的电子屏幕铺满高楼大厦的外墙，播放着绚丽的广告和信息流。镜头从空中俯瞰，街道上车水马龙，悬浮汽车飞驰而过，尾气是五彩斑斓的光带。街边的行人大多是机械改造人，身上闪烁着金属光泽和流动的电路线条。一位身着黑色风衣、戴着墨镜的神秘特工穿梭在人群中。突然，城市警报响起，一群机械怪兽从地下钻出，开始攻击城市。特工迅速拿出高科技武器，与怪兽展开激烈战斗。激光束、爆炸火光交相辉映，城市陷入一片混乱，展现出赛博朋克风格的科技感和紧张刺激感。
梦幻童话风格 请生成用于生成梦幻童话风格的提示词，在一个被绚丽彩虹环绕的童话王国里，镜头从一座高耸的糖果城堡开始。城堡由各种颜色的糖果和巧克力建成，闪烁着诱人的光泽。城堡的大门打开，一群可爱的小精灵飞了出来，它们扇动着透明的翅膀，撒下五彩的花粉。草地上，一群小动物正在举办欢乐的派对，毛茸茸的小兔子、憨态可掬的小熊和机灵的小猴子都在欢快地跳舞。远处，有一片神奇的花海，花朵巨大无比，花瓣像丝绸一样柔软，颜色梦幻。花海中央有一口许愿井，一位小公主穿着华丽的粉色公主裙来到许愿井边，闭上眼睛许愿。此时，一只金色的独角兽出现，带着公主飞向天空，画面充满梦幻色彩和童话氛围。
复古胶片风格 请生成用于生成复古胶片风格的提示词，镜头缓缓扫过一座充满复古气息的小镇，时间仿佛停留在上世纪。街边的建筑是复古的欧式风格，路灯散发着昏黄的光。一位年轻的摄影师手持胶片相机，漫步在小镇的街道上。他看到一位穿着复古连衣裙的女孩站在花店门口，微笑着挑选花朵。摄影师按下快门，捕捉下这一瞬间。画面切换到海边，夕阳西下，海浪轻轻拍打着沙滩，女孩穿着泳衣在海边嬉戏，摄影师在一旁记录着。随着胶片的翻动，画面中展现出小镇的各种生活场景，如露天电影、街头爵士乐表演等，充满怀旧氛围，色调温暖而柔和，带着胶片特有的颗粒感。
跑酷风格写实 高清写实的城市街头，一位身着黑色紧身运动服的男性正在进行跑酷，他在高楼大厦间穿梭跳跃，精准地踩着墙壁、栏杆等障碍物，动作敏捷且流畅，周围的环境细节丰富，有熙熙攘攘的人群和闪烁的霓虹灯；阳光明媚的下午，一位身材矫健的女性跑酷者在废弃的工业厂区跑酷，她飞跃生锈的机器、跨越巨大的管道，扬起阵阵灰尘，背景是破旧的厂房和斑驳的墙壁
跑酷风格动漫 色彩鲜艳的动漫世界中，一位拥有金黄色头发和蓝色眼睛的少年在充满奇幻建筑的城市里跑酷。他身着带有特殊图案的跑酷服，背后背着一个酷炫的背包，在跑酷过程中还做出各种高难度的旋转和翻转动作，周围有各种动漫风格的特效；日系风格的街道，一位粉色头发的少女跑酷者在屋顶和墙壁间跳跃，她的服装是可爱的洛丽塔风格与运动元素的结合，脸上带着俏皮的笑容，跑酷动作灵动活泼，像一只飞舞的蝴蝶
飞行风格写实 广阔的天空下，一位身着高科技飞行装备的冒险家在空中自由飞行。他的装备带有闪烁的灯光和喷射的火焰，身后留下一道道绚丽的轨迹。下方是一望无际的大海和壮观的海岸线；在云雾缭绕的高山之巅，一位身着白色长袍的神秘人展开一双巨大的翅膀，缓缓升空。他在空中盘旋，俯瞰着连绵的山脉和茂密的森林，阳光洒在他身上，形成一圈光晕
飞行风格科幻 未来的赛博朋克城市上空，一位半机械人在飞行。他的身体部分被机械装置所取代，拥有强大的推进器和能量护盾。他在高楼大厦之间高速飞行，躲避着各种激光射线和飞行机器人；浩瀚的宇宙空间中，一位宇航员穿着先进的太空飞行服，在星辰之间穿梭飞行。周围是五彩斑斓的星云和闪烁的星球，他手中拿着一个神秘的仪器，似乎在探索着宇宙的奥秘
跑酷与飞行结合风格魔幻 在一个神秘的魔法森林中，一位身着绿色长袍的魔法师在树木间跑酷，他利用魔法的力量跳跃、攀爬，动作轻盈自如。突然，他施展魔法，背后长出一对透明的翅膀，飞向森林的上空，俯瞰着整个魔法森林，森林中弥漫着神秘的光芒；古老的城堡废墟中，一位英勇的骑士先是在断壁残垣间进行跑酷，展现出强大的身体素质和敏捷的身手。当遇到无法跨越的沟壑时，他拔出佩剑，念动咒语，剑身发出光芒，他借助光芒的力量飞行起来，越过沟壑，继续向前探索城堡的秘密

en.title: Vincent video-tip

entries.title: 法律与合规
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/法律与合规.csv
entries.summary: 合同审查 请对[具体合同]进行合同审查，由专业法律人士依据相关法律法规，仔细检查合同中的条款和条件
entries.prompt:
合同审查 请对[具体合同]进行合同审查，由专业法律人士依据相关法律法规，仔细检查合同中的条款和条件。重点关注合同的主体资格、权利义务、违约责任、争议解决等关键条款，确保合同条款符合法律要求，不存在法律漏洞和风险，维护合同双方的合法权益。
法律文档生成 请对[具体法律事务]生成法律文档，根据法律规定和实际需求，编写符合法律规范的合同、协议、法律意见书等法律文件。在编写过程中，明确各方的权利义务、法律责任、合同生效条件等关键内容，确保法律文档的准确性、完整性和合法性，为法律事务的顺利进行提供有力保障。
法律咨询 请针对[具体法律问题]提供法律咨询，由专业律师依据法律法规和法律实践经验，回答相关咨询并提供专业意见。对法律问题进行深入分析，解释相关法律条款的适用情况，为咨询者提供可行的解决方案和建议，帮助其了解自身的权利和义务，应对法律纠纷。
日常法律问题解答 根据【具体法律问题描述，如劳动纠纷中加班工资计算问题】，结合相关法律法规，给出准确清晰的解答，包括涉及的法律条款、法律依据以及实际操作建议。
复杂法律问题分析 针对【复杂法律问题，如跨境电商知识产权侵权纠纷】，从不同法律关系、司法实践等方面进行深入分析，梳理问题的关键要点和潜在风险，提供多种可能的解决方案及各方案的利弊分析。
合同条款合法性审查 对【合同文本】进行全面审查，重点关注合同条款是否符合【相关法律法规，如民法典合同编、行业特定法规等】，指出违法或存在法律风险的条款，并提供修改建议使其合法合规。
合同条款完整性审查 检查【合同文本】是否涵盖所有必要条款，如标的、数量、质量、价款、履行期限、违约责任等，针对缺失条款提出补充建议，确保合同内容完整，避免潜在纠纷。
合同条款公平性审查 评估【合同文本】中双方权利义务是否对等，是否存在显失公平的条款，如不合理的免责条款、加重对方责任条款等，提出调整建议以维护合同的公平性和合理性。
企业合规体系建设 依据【企业所属行业、业务范围、企业规模等信息】，协助企业构建全面的合规管理体系，包括制定合规政策、设立合规岗位、建立合规风险识别与评估机制、制定合规培训计划等。
合规风险评估与应对 针对【企业业务活动，如海外投资、数据处理业务等】，识别可能面临的合规风险（如反洗钱风险、数据隐私合规风险等），评估风险发生的可能性和影响程度，制定相应的风险应对策略和控制措施。
合规培训方案设计 根据【企业合规需求和员工岗位特点】，设计个性化的合规培训方案，包括确定培训内容（如法律法规解读、合规案例分析等）、选择培训方式（线上课程、线下讲座、模拟演练等）、安排培训时间和考核方式等，提高员工的合规意识和能力。
起诉状撰写 根据【案件事实和诉讼请求，如民间借贷纠纷中原告要求被告偿还借款及利息】，撰写规范的起诉状，包括明确原被告基本信息、陈述事实与理由、列出诉讼请求及所依据的法律条款，确保起诉状内容完整、逻辑清晰、法律依据充分。
答辩状撰写 针对【对方起诉状内容和己方答辩思路，如被告针对原告的侵权诉讼进行答辩】，撰写答辩状，反驳对方的诉讼请求，陈述己方事实和理由，提供证据支持，维护己方合法权益，同时注意答辩状的格式和语言规范。
法律意见书撰写 基于【企业或个人的法律问题咨询，如企业拟进行重大资产重组的法律风险咨询】，撰写法律意见书，对相关法律问题进行深入研究和分析，明确法律意见和建议，提供法律依据和论证过程，为咨询方决策提供专业参考。
商标注册申请指导 协助【企业或个人】进行商标注册申请，包括商标查询、确定商标类别、准备申请材料（如商标申请书、商标图样、申请人身份证明等）、填写申请表格以及指导后续的商标审查流程应对，提高商标注册成功率。
专利申请策略制定 根据【发明创造内容，如新型机械设备发明】，制定专利申请策略，分析发明创造的技术特点和创新点，确定申请专利的类型（发明专利、实用新型专利、外观设计专利），规划申请时间和申请地域，撰写专利申请文件（如权利要求书、说明书、附图等），确保专利申请的有效性和保护范围。
著作权登记与维权 指导【作者或著作权人】进行著作权登记，包括登记流程介绍、准备登记材料（如作品样本、著作权归属证明等），在发生著作权侵权时，协助制定维权策略，如发送侵权警告函、提起诉讼、申请证据保全等，维护著作权人的合法权益。
劳动合同起草与审核 根据【企业用工需求和当地劳动法律法规】，起草或审核劳动合同，明确劳动合同期限、工作内容、工作时间、劳动报酬、社会保险、福利待遇、竞业限制、解除合同条件等条款，避免劳动合同存在法律漏洞和风险。
劳动纠纷处理策略制定 针对【劳动纠纷情况，如员工离职纠纷、工伤赔偿纠纷等】，分析纠纷的性质和可能的法律后果，制定合理的处理策略，包括协商调解方案、劳动仲裁或诉讼的准备工作（如收集证据、确定仲裁请求或诉讼请求、撰写法律文书等），维护企业或员工的合法权益。
员工手册合规审查 对【企业员工手册】进行合规审查，确保员工手册中的规章制度（如考勤制度、奖惩制度、休假制度等）符合劳动法律法规的规定，避免因规章制度违法导致企业面临法律风险，同时提出优化建议，使员工手册更具合理性和可操作性。

en.title: Law and compliance
en.summary: Contract review. Contract review [for specific contracts]. Professional legal practitioners scrutinize the terms and conditions in the contract in accordance with relevant laws and regulations
en.prompt:
Contract review [for specific contracts] is required to be reviewed by professional legal practitioners, who carefully examine the terms and conditions in the contract in accordance with the relevant laws and regulations. Focus on key terms such as the contractual subject, rights and obligations, liability for breach of contract, dispute resolution, etc., to ensure that the contract terms comply with the law, that there are no legal gaps or risks, and that the legitimate interests of the parties to the contract are safeguarded.
In preparing the legal documents, please generate legal documents for [specific legal matters], and prepare legal documents such as contracts, agreements, legal opinions, etc. that conform to the legal norms, in accordance with the legal provisions and actual needs. In doing so, identify the key elements of the rights and obligations of the parties, legal liability, conditions for entry into force of the contract, and ensure the accuracy, integrity and legitimacy of legal documents, which provide a strong guarantee for the smooth conduct of legal affairs.
Legal advice is provided on [specific legal issues], and specialized lawyers respond to legal issues and provide professional advice based on legal regulations and experience in legal practice.
The daily legal questions are answered with precise and clear answers, including the legal provisions involved, the legal basis and practical advice, in the context of the relevant legislation and regulations [description of specific legal issues, such as the calculation of overtime pay in labour disputes].
Complex legal issues analysis, in which an in-depth analysis of different legal relationships, judicial practices, etc., provides a multiplicity of possible solutions and analysis of the advantages and disadvantages of the various programmes, is undertaken.
Review of the legality of contract terms, conducting a comprehensive review of [the text of the contract], focusing on the conformity of contract terms with [relevant laws and regulations, such as civil code contract books, industry-specific regulations, etc.], identifying provisions that are in conflict with the law or that present legal risks, and providing recommendations for amendments to bring them into legal compliance.
Review of the integrity of the contract terms Check whether [the text of the contract] covers all necessary terms, such as the subject matter, quantity, quality, price, duration of performance, liability for breach of contract, etc., and makes additional recommendations with respect to missing clauses to ensure the integrity of the contract and avoid potential disputes.
A fair review of contractual terms Assess whether the rights and obligations of the parties are reciprocal in [the text of the contract], whether there are unfair clauses, such as unreasonable exoneration clauses, aggravated liability clauses, etc., and recommend adjustments to preserve the fairness and reasonableness of the contract.
(b) Enterprise compliance system development Assistance to enterprises in building a comprehensive compliance management system based on [business sector, scope, size of business etc.], including compliance policy development, compliance posts, compliance risk identification and assessment mechanisms, compliance training programmes etc.
Compliance risk assessment and response measures identify potential compliance risks (e.g., anti-money-laundering risks, data privacy compliance risks) for business operations such as overseas investments, data processing operations, assess the likelihood and impact of risk occurrence and develop corresponding risk response strategies and controls.
The compliance training programme design, based on [enterprise compliance needs and employee job characteristics], is designed to develop individualized compliance training programmes, including the identification of training content (e.g., interpretation of laws and regulations, analysis of compliance cases), selection of training modalities (online courses, offline lectures, simulation exercises, etc.), scheduling of training time and evaluation methods, and to increase staff compliance awareness and capacity.
Written by [facts of the case and claims, such as private lending disputes, where the plaintiff requests the defendant to repay the loan and interest], the written brief is regulated, including the clarification of the basic information of the original defendant, the presentation of the facts and reasons, the listing of the claim and the legal provisions on which it is based, and ensuring that the indictment is complete, logical and well founded.
The pleadings are written in response to [the content of the other party's indictment and the other party's defence doctrine, such as the respondent's defence against the plaintiff's tort proceedings], the respondent's statement of the other party's claim, the presentation of its own facts and reasons, the provision of evidentiary support and the defence of its legitimate interests, while bearing in mind the formal and linguistic norms of the pleadings.
Legal opinion writings are based on [legal advice on business or personal issues, such as legal risk advice for a business to undertake a major asset reorganization], writing legal opinions, in-depth research and analysis of relevant legal issues, identifying legal opinions and recommendations, providing legal basis and validation processes, and providing professional reference for the decision-making of the consulting parties.
(b) Assisting [entities or individuals] in the application for trademark registration, including trademark search, identification of trademark categories, preparation of applications (e.g. trademark application, trademark drawings, applicant identification documents, etc.), completion of application forms and guidance on subsequent trademark review process responses, and improvement of the success rate of trademark registration.
The patent application strategy is developed on the basis of [inventive creations such as new mechanical equipment inventions], which analyses the technical characteristics and innovation points of inventions, determines the type of patent application (inventory patents, practical new patents, design patents), plans the time and territory of application, prepares patent application documents (e.g. claims, instructions, accompanying drawings, etc.), and ensures the effectiveness and scope of patent application.
The authors or authors of copyrights are directed to register copyrights, including the introduction of registration processes, preparation of registration materials (e.g., samples of works, proof of copyright, etc.), assistance in developing strategies for the defence of copyright rights in the event of copyright violations, such as sending tort warnings, filing lawsuits, applying for preservation of evidence, etc., and defending the legitimate rights and interests of authors.
The drafting and review of labour contracts, in accordance with the requirements of enterprises and local labour laws and regulations, are designed or reviewed to identify the duration of the contract, the content of the work, working hours, remuneration, social security, benefits, restrictions on the competitive process and the conditions for its dissolution, in order to avoid legal loopholes and risks.
The development of a strategy for the management of labour disputes, including the preparation of conciliation programmes, labour arbitration or litigation (e.g. collection of evidence, determination of arbitration or litigation requests, writing of legal instruments) and the defence of the legitimate rights and interests of enterprises or employees, is aimed at analysing the nature of the dispute and the possible legal consequences of the dispute [in the case of labour disputes, such as those involving separation of employees, compensation for work injuries, etc.].
Compliance review of the Manual for Employees of Enterprises, ensuring that regulations in the Manual (such as attendance, reward and punishment, leave, etc.) are in accordance with labour laws and regulations, avoiding legal risks to enterprises due to violations of the regulations, and making recommendations for their optimization and making the Manual more rational and operational.

entries.title: 编程开发
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/编程开发.csv
entries.summary: 生成代码 请用[XX语言]写一个[XXX]脚本，要求实现[XXX]功能并添加异常处理模块
entries.prompt:
生成代码 请用[XX语言]写一个[XXX]脚本，要求实现[XXX]功能并添加异常处理模块。
HTML代码生成 请根据 [具体需求，如网页布局、功能要求等] 生成符合HTML规范的代码，包括HTML标签、CSS样式和JavaScript脚本，确保网页的美观性和交互性。
Python代码生成 请根据 [具体需求，如功能描述、算法要求等] 生成符合Python语法的代码，包括函数定义、类定义、模块导入等，确保代码的可读性和可维护性。
JAVA代码生成 请根据具体需求，使用JAVA语言编写高效、健壮的代码，遵循JAVA编程规范和最佳实践。
C++代码生成 请根据具体需求，使用C++语言编写高效、健壮的代码，遵循C++编程规范和最佳实践。
批处理脚本生成 请生成一个批处理（bat格式）脚本，用于实现 [具体功能描述]。脚本应具备良好的可读性和健壮性，对可能出现的错误进行合理处理。
PYQT6应用生成 请生成一个基于PYQT6的应用程序，实现 [具体功能需求]。程序应具备良好的用户界面设计和交互体验，使用面向对象编程的思想进行开发，确保代码的可维护性和可扩展性。
VBA代码脚本生成 请生成符合 VBA（Visual Basic for Applications）语法规范的代码脚本，实现 [具体功能要求]，如自动化 Excel 操作、Word 文档处理等。代码要注重结构清晰，合理使用变量、函数和过程。
Photoshop脚本生成 请生成 Photoshop 脚本（.jsx 文件），完成 [具体图像处理任务描述]，像批量调整图像大小、添加特效等。脚本要遵循 JavaScript 语法在 Photoshop 环境下的应用规则。
Scratch代码生成 请生成Scratch编程代码，实现 [具体功能描述]，代码应符合Scratch编程规范。
Blockly代码生成 请生成Blockly编程代码，实现 [具体功能描述]，代码应符合Blockly编程规范。
Alice代码生成 请生成Alice编程代码，实现 [具体功能描述]，代码应符合Alice编程规范。
代码生成与调试 根据需求生成代码，并进行错误分析和修复，如 “请用 Python 生成一个快速排序的代码，并调试错误。”
算法设计与分析 设计和分析算法，如 “请设计一个高效的搜索算法，并分析其时间复杂度。”
数据库管理 处理数据库相关的问题，如 “请帮我优化这个数据库的查询语句。”
系统设计与架构 进行系统设计和架构规划，如 “请为这个网站设计一个高可用的架构。”
Arduino编程 请使用Arduino平台编写代码，实现 [具体功能要求]，代码应充分考虑Arduino硬件特性，如引脚分配、中断处理等。
RaspberryPi编程 请使用Raspberry Pi平台编写代码，实现 [具体功能要求]，代码可利用Raspberry Pi丰富的接口和计算资源，如GPIO控制、网络通信等。
Unity编程 请使用Unity引擎编写代码，实现 [具体功能要求]，代码需符合Unity的编程规范和架构，如使用MonoBehaviour类、协程等。
UnrealEngine编程 请使用Unreal Engine编写代码，实现 [具体功能要求]，代码应遵循Unreal Engine的编程模式和蓝图系统，如使用Actor类、事件驱动等。
AppInventor编程 请使用App Inventor平台编写代码，实现 [具体功能要求]，代码应利用App Inventor的可视化编程界面和组件，如按钮、文本框等。
乐高Mindstorms编程 请使用乐高Mindstorms平台编写代码，实现 [具体功能要求]，代码需结合乐高Mindstorms的硬件模块和传感器，如电机控制、颜色传感器等。
DEBUG助手 请解释下面这段代码报错的原因(附错误日志)，并提供两种修复方案。
API对接 请编写调用 [XXX]接口的示例代码，包含身份验证和错误重试机制。
代码审查 请检查以下代码的5个潜在问题，按安全性/性能/可读性分类说明。
算法优化 请将O(n2)时间复杂度算法优化至O(n log n)，保留详细注释。
代码调试 - 错误信息翻译 遇到报错时，使用 “【错误诊断模式】用小白能懂的话解释问题本质，标注可能引发该错误的 3 个常见场景，给出最可能的修复方案 (标&) 和其他备选方案，请：我遇到 [编程语言] 报错:"粘贴错误信息"" 指令
代码调试 - 上下文分析 粘贴相关代码后，使用 “用箭头图画出变量值变化轨迹，在可疑行号旁标注 并说明原因，输出修改后的代码差异对比 (用绿色 +/ 红色 - 标注)” 指令进行上下文分析
代码调试 - 防御性编程 针对错误类型，使用 “针对这个错误类型：设计 [数量] 个单元测试用例 (含边界条件)，生成代码片段：
技术面试 - 考点预测 根据目标公司和技术栈，使用 “根据 [目标公司] 近 3 年面经和我的技术栈:[技术栈名称，如 Java/Python/Go...]，输出：高频考点 TOP10 (按出现频率排序)，对应 LeetCode 题号 (标注原题 / 变式题)，系统设计重点领域 (附学习路线图)” 指令预测考点
技术面试 - 白板编程模拟 - 生成题目 使用 “给我一道 [题目难度，如中等难度] 的 [题目类型，如二叉树题目]，要求：包含递归和非递归两种解法，设置 [数量] 个易错测试用例，附带时间复杂度分析要点” 指令生成面试题目
技术面试 - 白板编程模拟 - 模拟面试 使用 “现在开始面试模拟：请用伪代码描述思路 (计时 [时长])，我会指出 [数量] 个潜在 bug，请现场修复，最后给出优化建议 (空间换时间策略)” 指令模拟面试过程
技术面试 - 白板编程模拟 - 智能反馈 根据代码，使用 “根据我的代码:[粘贴代码]，请：按大厂评分标准给出 ABC 等级，标注代码亮点 (如优雅的边界处理)，指出可能扣分的坏味道 (如魔法数字)” 指令获取智能反馈
技术面试 - 加分神器 使用 “生成 10 个高频追问问题: ' 如果数据量扩大 [倍数] 倍，如何优化？'，' 这个算法在分布式环境怎么适配？'” 指令获取高频追问问题

en.title: Programming development
en.summary: Generate code. Please write a [XXX] script in [XX languages, requesting [XXX] functionality and adding an abnormal processing module. ]
en.prompt:
Generate the code. Write a [XXX] script in [XX languages, requesting the [XXX] functionality and adding an abnormal treatment module.
HTML code generation Please generate HTML code conforming to HTML specifications, including HTML labels, CSS styles and JavaScript scripts, according to [specific needs, such as web layout, functional requirements, etc.], to ensure the beauty and interactivity of the web pages.
Python code generation Please generate codes that conform to Python ' s s syntax, including function definitions, class definitions, module import, etc., to ensure the readability and maintenance of the code according to [specific needs, such as functional description, algorithm requirements, etc.].
JAVA code generation. Please use JAVA language to prepare efficient and robust codes according to specific needs, following JAVA programming norms and best practices.
C++ Code generation. Please use C++ language to prepare efficient and robust codes, following C++ programming norms and best practices, according to specific needs.
Batch script generation. Please generate a batch (bat format) script to achieve [specific functional description]. The foot should be good readable and robust, and the errors that may occur should be reasonably handled.
The PYQT6 application is generated by generating an application based on PYQT6 that achieves [specific functional needs]. The program should have a good user interface design and interactive experience, using an object-oriented programming idea for development, to ensure the maintenance and expansion of the code.
VBA code scripts are generated. Codes are to be structured so that variables, functions and processes are used rationally.
The Photoshop script is generated by generating the Photoshop script (.jsx file), completing [the specific image processing task description], like a batch resizeing image, adding special effects, etc. The script follows the application rules of JavaScript syntax in the Photoshop environment.
Scrack Code Generation Please generate Scrack Programming Code to achieve [specific function description], which should conform to Scrack Programming Standard.
Blockly code generation. Please generate Blockly programming code, which is [specific function description] and which should meet the Blockly programming specifications.
Alice Code Generation Please generate Alice Programming Code to achieve [specific function description], which should conform to Alice Programming Standard.
Code generation and debugging, and error analysis and fixation, for example, "Please use Python to generate a fast-sequenced code and debugging error."
Algorithm design and analysis Design and analysis algorithms, such as, "Please design an efficient search algorithm and analyse its time complexity."
Database management Addresses database-related issues such as, "Please help me optimize the query statement of this database."
Systems design and architecture Systems design and architecture planning, such as, "Please design a high-availability architecture for this site."
Arduino programming, use the Arduino platform to develop codes that achieve [specific functional requirements] that take due account of Arduino hardware characteristics such as leg allocation, interruption processing, etc.
RaspberryPi programming is available using the Raspberry Pi platform to develop codes that [detailed functional requirements] can use the Rasprry Pi rich interfaces and computing resources such as GPS control, network communication, etc.
Unity programming is required to use the Unitity engine to develop a code that [specific functional requirements] is required to conform to the programming specifications and architecture of Unity, such as the Mono Behaviour class, the program etc.
UnrealEngine programming is required to use Unreal Engineering to develop the code to achieve [specific functional requirements] that should follow Unreal Engineering programming patterns and blueprint systems such as the use of the Actor class, event-driven etc.
AppInventor programming. Use the AppInventor platform to develop the code to achieve [the specific functionality requirements], which should use the AppInventor visual programming interface and components, such as buttons, text frames, etc.
Lego Mindstroms programming uses the Lego Mindstroms platform to develop codes that achieve [specific functional requirements] that combine the hardware modules and sensors of Lego Mindstroms, such as electrical controls, colour sensors, etc.
DEBUG Assistant please explain the reason for the error in the code below (with the error log) and provide two options for restoration.
API docking please prepare an example code for calling the [XXX] interface, including authentication and error retesting mechanisms.
Please check the following five potential problems in the code, and describe them by safety/performance/readability.
Algorithm optimization Please optimize the O(n2) time complexity algorithm to O(n log n), with detailed comments.
Code debug - Error Information Translation Use "By Misdiagnosis Mode" to explain the nature of the problem using a white word, labeling three common scenarios that may trigger the error, giving the most likely fix (tand & ) and other options, please: I encountered [programmed language] Wrong reporting: "painting the wrong information" command
Debug - Code analysis - Paste the code with context Use the "Invent a trajectory of variable values by arrow, mark the cause by the suspicious line number, compare the code differences with the output (Green +/ Red - Mark) " command for context analysis
Code debug - defensive programming - For error types, use "For error types: design [number] of unit test examples (including boundary conditions), generate code snippets:
Technical interview - Predictions According to the target company and the technology store, using "the system design focus area (with learning road maps)"
Technical interview - Whiteboard programming simulation - Generate topics Use "Give me a list of [topic difficulties, such as medium difficulty]" [title type, such as the two fork tree theme], request: include both relativ and non-recursive resolution, set up [number] of examples of easy error tests, with points for time complexity analysis" command generation of interview topics
Technical interview - Whiteboard programming simulation - Simulation interview using the "To start interviewing simulation: Please describe the idea with a false code (timer [timer)]), I will point out a potential bug, [number], please fix it on site and finally give an optimist (space-for-time strategy) instruction to simulate the interview process
Technical interview - Whiteboard programming simulation - Smart feedback - Use, based on code, "In accordance with my code: [paste code], please: give ABC grade according to big factory rating criteria, label code bright points (e.g. elegant border processing), indicate bad taste of possible deductions (e.g. magic numbers)" command for smart feedback
Technical interview - a jugular device uses the command "Generating 10 high frequency questions: 'How can you optimize if the amount of data increases [multiple]?', 'how does this algorithm fit in a distributed environment?'

entries.title: 网文创作辅助类
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/网文创作辅助类.csv
entries.summary: 小说创作 - 角色档案生成 使用 “生成小说角色模板：姓名：核心欲望：关键秘密：关系网络: - 盟友 (表面 / 真实) - 对手 (直接 /
entries.prompt:
小说创作 - 角色档案生成 使用 “生成小说角色模板：姓名：核心欲望：关键秘密：关系网络: - 盟友 (表面 / 真实) - 对手 (直接 / 潜在) - 情感羁绊 (爱 / 恨 / 亏欠)” 指令生成角色档案
小说创作 - 关系可视化 基于角色列表，使用 “用 Mermaid 语法生成关系图 (区分实线 / 虚线 / 不同颜色箭头)，标注 3 个潜在冲突爆发点，生成时间轴：关键事件对关系的影响” 指令进行关系可视化
小说创作 - 剧情冲突检测 针对当前章节内容，使用 “分析当前章节:[粘贴文本]，找出人物行为的矛盾点 (与其档案不符)，建议 [数量] 个增强戏剧性的改写方向，生成 [数量] 个让读者惊呼的伏笔埋设方案” 指令检测剧情冲突
生成以 “镜湖神龙：一条龙的誓言与救赎” 为题的小说提纲 我选择 “镜湖神龙：一条龙的誓言与救赎” 这个标题，请根据民间小说写作指令，为我生成具体的小说提纲，包含主要角色、重要情节点以及预期结局等内容，按照吸引开头、描述主要人物和背景、展开故事情节、高潮部分、结局和教训的框架来写，完成后询问我对框架是否满意
根据 “狐狸的婚礼：谋略与爱情的较量” 创作小说 我选择 “狐狸的婚礼：谋略与爱情的较量” 这个标题，希望小说字数在 3000 字左右。请根据选定标题生成小说框架，在我确认满意后，按照通俗易懂、生动有趣、深入浅出、情感投入、逻辑清晰的输出风格，为我创作具体的民间小说文案，之后进行自我优化，并询问我需要优化的部分
以 “梨花女与冥王的契约：爱超越生死的故事” 创作并优化小说 我选择 “梨花女与冥王的契约：爱超越生死的故事” 为标题，希望小说字数在 5000 字左右。请先为我生成小说框架，我确认后创作具体小说文案，完成后进行自我优化，优化时重点关注情节连贯性、角色深度和文化元素表达，优化后询问我对小说的优化意见
视频脚本 - 情绪曲线优化 - 原始脚本分析 针对视频脚本内容，使用 “分析以下文案的情绪波动: [粘贴文案]，输出：情绪值曲线图 (紧张 / 有趣 / 感动)，高潮点间隔时间统计，建议优化的 3 个节奏卡点” 指令，分析原始脚本情绪波动。
视频脚本 - 情绪曲线优化 - 峰值设计 根据脚本时间点，使用 “在以下时间点插入情绪钩子: [具体时间 1] 设置「悬念」问题 (互动提问)，[具体时间 2] 添加「共情」故事 (用户证言)，[具体时间 3] 加入「震惊」事件 (数据反差)” 指令，优化脚本情绪峰值。
视频脚本 - 情绪曲线优化 - 分镜强化 针对脚本中的特定段落，使用 “将 '[段落主题，如产品优势]' 段落转化为分镜表: | 时长 | 画面 | 台词 | 音效 |” 指令，对脚本进行分镜强化。

en.title: Web-based creation aids
en.summary: Writing novels - role files generate using "Generating novel role templates: Name: Core desires: Key secrets: Relationship networks: - Alliances (surface/ real) - Counterparties (direct/)
en.prompt:
Writing of novels - role file generation Use of " Generating novel role templates: Name: Core desires: Key secrets: Network of relationships: - Ally (surface/ real) - Counter-enemy (direct/ potential) - Emotional constraints (love/ hate/ default)" command to generate role files
novel creation - Relationship visualization - Role-based List, Relationship Visualization using "Mermaid syntax to generate relationship maps (distinguishing solid lines / dotted lines / different colour arrows), marking 3 potential conflict flash points, generating time axes: the impact of key events on relationships"
The current chapter is designed to be a novel-- theatrical conflict detection, using the "Analysis of the current chapter: [painting text], identifying inconsistencies in the behaviour of the person (not in line with his file), suggesting [number] a more dramatic re-orientation, generating [number] of an euphemism-to-read ambush-laying program" to detect the conflict.
I choose the title "The Dragon of the Mirror Lake: The Promise and the Salvation of a Dragon" and write a specific novel outline for me, based on the instructions of a folk novel, containing the main role, the key context and the expected outcome, in the framework of attracting the beginning, describing the main characters and background, developing story plot, the orgasm, the end and lessons learned, and then asking me if I am satisfied with the framework.
According to the "Fox's wedding: a strategy versus love" novel, I choose the title "Fox's wedding: a strategy versus love" and hope the number of words is around 3000. Please generate the novel framework according to the selected title, and, after I have been satisfied, create specific folk novels for me in a popular, interesting, in-depth, emotional, logical, output style that I need to optimize, and then optimize myself and ask what I need to optimize.
I've chosen the title "The Pears Woman's Contract with the King of the Underworld: The Story of Love Over Life and Death" to be written, hoping that the number of novel words will be around 5,000. Please create a novel framework for me, and then I will confirm that I will write a novel, and then I will optimize myself, focusing on the context, the depth of the role and the cultural element of the story, and then I will ask my views on the best way to read the novel.
Video Script - Emotional Curve Optimization - Original Script Analysis - Original Script Analysis - Analysis of Video Script Content, Using the Command "Analysis of Emotional Volatility by Context: [Placing Text], Output: Emotional Value Curves (Strained / Interesting / Move), Time Counting between Climax Points, 3 Rhythm Card Points Suggested for Optimization" Analysis of Initial Script Emotional Volatility.
Video script - Emotional curve optimization - Peak design Use " Insert Emotional Threads at [Detailed Time 1] Sets the "Suspending " Questions (Interactive Questions), [Detail Time 2] Adds the "Commonwealth" story (User Testimony), [Detailed Time 3] Adds the "Standing Event" (Data Contradiction) command to optimize the Script Sense peak.
Video script - Emotional curve optimization - Fracture enhancement - for specific paragraphs in script, using the command "converting the paragraphs '[the paragraph theme, such as product advantage]' into the semi-collage table:  time frame,   line,  sound, " for scaffolding.

entries.title: 翻译与润色类
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/翻译与润色类.csv
entries.summary: 精准翻译 根据商务或其他场景需求，使用 “【特殊要求】[保留格式、金额处理、术语要求等]【目标语言】[目标语言名称]【源语言】[源语言名称] /
entries.prompt:
精准翻译 根据商务或其他场景需求，使用 “【特殊要求】[保留格式、金额处理、术语要求等]【目标语言】[目标语言名称]【源语言】[源语言名称] / 开启专业翻译模式 [需要翻译的内容]” 指令，例如 “【特殊要求】保留敬语格式 (Dear/Honored)，金额保留两位小数，使用 ICC 国际商会术语【目标语言】商务英语【源语言】中文 / 开启专业翻译模式 关于 CIF 纽约条款，我方希望增加保险覆盖范围”
学术润色 上传参考文献后，使用 “请模仿这篇 [论文期刊名称，如 Nature 论文] 的用词风格翻译我的摘要”“确保 '[专业术语]' 统一译为 '[标准译法]'”“图表标题翻译后保持 [原格式，如 Figure 1 - 格式]” 指令进行学术翻译和润色
文化适配 针对本地化需求，使用 “向 [目标客户群体，如印度客户] 解释 '[企业文化内容，如质量第一]' 的企业文化” 指令，让模型给出文化适配建议

en.title: Translation and routing
en.summary: Precision translation, based on commercial or other scenario needs, uses “[special requirements] [retention format, processing of amounts, terminology requirements, etc.] [target language] [target language name] [source language] /
en.prompt:
Precision translation, based on commercial or other scenario needs, using instructions such as “[Special request] [Retention format, amount processing, terminology requirements, etc.] [target language name] [origin language] [source language name]/ Opening professional translation mode [content requiring translation]”, such as “Retain eugenic format (Dear/Honored) [Special request], two decimals in amount, commercial English [source language] Chinese] using ICC ICC terminology [target language] / Opening professional translation mode on CIF New York provisions, we would like to increase insurance coverage”.
After uploading the reference, use the "Please translate my summary in the form of a phrase like this [name of the journal of the paper, such as the Nature paper]" instruction "Ensures that the title of the chart is translated in a uniform way to '[standard translation]' and maintains its academic translation and refinement in [original format, such as Figure 1 - format]"
Cultural adaptation, in response to localization needs, uses the Directive to "interpret [the cultural content of the enterprise, such as quality first]' to [the target client group, such as India], to allow the model to make recommendations on cultural adaptation. ]

entries.id: 问答-考试-作业分层设计
entries.title: 考试、作业分层设计
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/考试、作业分层设计.csv
entries.summary: 考试 - 分层方案制定 根据【学科名称】和【学生群体特征，如年级、学习能力层次等】，制定考试分层设计方案，明确分层依据、层次划分标准以及不同层次
entries.prompt:
考试 - 分层方案制定 根据【学科名称】和【学生群体特征，如年级、学习能力层次等】，制定考试分层设计方案，明确分层依据、层次划分标准以及不同层次考试的目标定位。
考试 - 试卷编制 按照【已制定的考试分层方案】，分别编制不同层次的考试试卷。每份试卷要体现相应层次的难度要求，涵盖不同类型的题目（如基础题、提高题、拓展题），并注明各题目考查的知识点和能力点。
考试 - 考试实施安排 规划基于分层设计的考试实施流程，包括考试时间安排、考场布置、监考要求等，确保不同层次的考试能够有序进行，同时考虑如何保障考试的公平性和保密性。
考试 - 成绩评定与反馈 针对分层考试的成绩评定，制定差异化的评定标准，综合考虑学生的答题情况、进步幅度等因素。设计有效的成绩反馈方式，向学生和家长清晰呈现考试结果，为后续教学和学习调整提供依据。
作业分层设计 - 分层策略规划 依据【学科课程标准】、【学生学习水平差异】和【教学目标】，规划作业分层设计的策略，确定分层方式（如按难度分层、按学习任务类型分层等），明确各层次作业的功能和侧重点。
作业分层设计 - 作业内容设计 根据【已确定的作业分层策略】，设计不同层次的作业内容。基础层作业注重基础知识巩固，提高层作业强调知识的应用和拓展，拓展层作业鼓励学生进行创新性思考和实践，详细列出各层次作业的具体题目或任务。
作业分层设计 - 作业完成时间规划 为不同层次的作业合理规划完成时间，考虑学生的学习能力差异和作业难度，确保学生能够在规定时间内高质量完成作业，避免学生负担过重或过轻。
作业分层设计 - 作业评价体系构建 建立针对分层作业的评价体系，制定不同层次作业的评价标准，评价方式应多样化（如教师评价、学生自评、学生互评等），通过评价促进学生对知识的掌握和学习能力的提升，并明确如何根据评价结果调整后续作业设计。

en.title: Examinations, tiered design of operations
en.sourcePath: Prompt Library/Q&A/Examinations, tiered design of operations.csv
en.summary: Examination - Tier-based programming, based on [the name of the subject] and on the characteristics of the student group, such as grade, level of learning ability, etc., to develop a stratification design programme for the examination, with clear lines of hierarchy, criteria for hierarchy and different levels
en.prompt:
Examination - Tier-based programming, based on [the name of the subject] and on the characteristics of the student group, such as grade, level of learning ability, etc., develops a stratification design programme for the examination, with clear lines of reference, criteria for hierarchy and target setting for different levels of examination.
Examinations - Tests are prepared, each with a different level of examination examination in accordance with the [established examination hierarchy programme]. Each examination will reflect the level of difficulty required, covering different types of topics (e.g. foundation, enhancement, extension) and indicating the knowledge and capacity points examined for each subject.
Examination - arrangements for the implementation of examinations Planning of a layered process for the implementation of examinations, including scheduling of examinations, placement of test sites, monitoring requirements, etc., ensuring that examinations at different levels are conducted in an orderly manner, and considering how to safeguard the fairness and confidentiality of the examinations.
Examinations - Performance appraisals and feedbacks, with a view to evaluating performance in the hierarchical examinations, develop criteria for evaluating differences, taking into account the student’s answer and progress.
Operational stratification - stratification strategy planning Planning strategies for stratification (e.g., by difficulty, by type of mission) based on [disciplinary curriculum standards], [learning level differences] and [learning objectives], planning strategies for stratification of operations, defining the ttrenchment approach (e.g., by difficulty, by type of mission) and clarifying the functions and focus of the various levels of operations.
Job stratification - Job content design Designs for different levels of operations based on [a defined operations strategizing strategy]. Base level operations focus on the consolidation of basic knowledge, enhancing the application and extension of knowledge at the level, and expanding the level of work to encourage innovative thinking and practice among students, detailing specific topics or tasks at the various levels of operation.
Operational stratification - Job completion time planning. Reasonable planning of completion time for different levels of operation, taking into account differences in learning abilities and difficulties of operation, ensures that students are able to perform their work with high quality within the specified time frame and avoids over- or under-burdening students.
Operational hierarchy - Operational evaluation system development Evaluation system for layered operations, evaluation criteria for different levels of operation, with diverse evaluation approaches (e.g. teacher evaluation, student self-assessment, student peer evaluation, etc.), promotion of knowledge acquisition and learning skills in students through evaluation, and identification of how to adjust the design of subsequent operations to the evaluation results.
