Please backup the [critical data] data, develop a sound data backup strategy, regularly back up the data to ensure the security and integrity of the data, and provide detailed operating processes and testing options for data recovery.
Please perform critical data recovery [in the event of loss or damage of data], using specialized data recovery tools and techniques, in accordance with data backup, to restore lost or damaged data as soon as possible, while recording and validating the data recovery process in detail.

entries.title: 金融投资
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/金融投资.csv
entries.summary: 风险管理 请对[投资组合名称]进行风险管理，运用风险评估模型（如风险价值模型、风险收益模型等），评估投资组合中的潜在风险
entries.prompt:
风险管理 请对[投资组合名称]进行风险管理，运用风险评估模型（如风险价值模型、风险收益模型等），评估投资组合中的潜在风险。制定风险应对策略，如资产配置调整、止损策略、套期保值等，对风险进行有效的管理和控制，确保投资组合的安全性和稳定性，实现预期的投资目标。
财务报告 请对[公司名称或财务主体]生成财务报告，全面梳理财务数据，包括资产负债表、利润表、现金流量表等主要财务报表的数据。对财务状况进行深入分析，如偿债能力分析、盈利能力分析、营运能力分析等，详细解读财务数据背后的经营状况和发展趋势，为利益相关者提供准确、详细的财务信息。
数据统计 请对[金融数据集]进行数据统计，运用统计学方法（如描述性统计、推断统计等）对金融数据进行分析和解释。计算各种统计指标（如均值、标准差、相关性系数等），通过统计图表（如柱状图、折线图等）展示数据的分布和趋势，挖掘金融数据中的规律和潜在信息，为金融决策提供数据支持。
用蒙特卡洛模拟预测投资组合收益 进行【模拟次数，如 10 万次】模拟生成风险收益分布图
生成另类投资风险评估模板 制作包含【风险因素，如气候风险】的【因子数量，如 5 因子】评估表
用行为金融学分析交易记录 识别出【数量，如 3 个】受【效应，如处置效应】影响的错误操作
为加密资产设计链上分析指标 创建【数量，如 5 个】【资产分析方向，如资金流向异动监测】指标
宏观经济数据转化为投资时钟模型 绘制【模型框架，如美林时钟框架】下的资产配置建议
生成 ESG 投资筛选条件组合 创建【数量，如 3 套】不同权重的【行业，如绿色能源】筛选标准
用期权希腊字母对冲持仓风险 设计基于【策略，如 Delta 中性策略】的对冲方案
为退休计划生成现金流模型 创建【数量，如 3 种】【假设条件，如通胀率假设】下的养老储蓄模型
技术指标转化为量化交易信号 生成【指标组合，如 RSI + 布林带组合】的买卖点提示
为初创企业设计估值模型 创建【数量，如 3 种】不同【参数，如贴现率】下的【模型类型，如 DCF 模型】

en.title: Financial investment
en.summary: Risk management Request risk management of [portfolio name], using risk assessment models (e.g., risk value models, risk return models, etc.) to assess potential risks in the portfolio
en.prompt:
Risk management requests that [the name of the portfolio] be managed for risk management and that risk assessment models (e.g., risk value models, risk return models, etc.) be used to assess potential risks in the portfolio. Risk response strategies, such as asset allocation adjustments, damage-free strategies, hedging, etc., be developed to effectively manage and control risks, ensure the safety and stability of the portfolio and achieve the expected investment objectives.
Financial reports are requested to generate financial reports for [name of company or financial entity], and to compile comprehensive financial data, including data from major financial statements such as balance sheets, profit statements, cash flow statements, etc. An in-depth analysis of the financial position, such as debt-servicing, profitability, business capacity analysis, etc., and a detailed reading of the business status and trends behind the financial data, to provide stakeholders with accurate and detailed financial information.
Please provide statistical data for [financial data sets], and use statistical methods (e.g. descriptive statistics, extrapolation statistics, etc.) to analyse and interpret financial data. Calculate statistical indicators (e.g. mean, standard deviations, relevance factors, etc.), demonstrate data distribution and trends through statistical charts (e.g. column charts, line charts, etc.), extract patterns and potential information in financial data, and provide data support for financial decision-making.
Simulation of risk-benefit maps using Monte Carlo simulations to predict portfolio returns [simulations, for example, 100,000]
Develop assessment tables containing [risk factors, such as climate risk] [number of factors, e.g., 5 factors]
Use behavioral finance to analyze transaction records and identify mispractices [number, e. g. 3] affected by [effects, e. g. disposal effects]
Design index for index analysis on the encryption asset chain
Macroeconomic data are converted into investment clock models Draw asset allocation proposals under [model frameworks, such as the Merrillian clock framework]
Generate ESG investment filter conditions to create filter criteria for [number, e. g. 3 sets] different weights [industry, e. g. green energy]
Slamk risk using options Greek letters designed to hedge against a strategy based on a strategy like Delta neutral strategy.
Generate cash flow models for retirement plans Create old-age savings models for [number, for example, 3] [assuming, for example, inflation rate assumptions]
Technology indicators are converted into quantitative transaction signals generating a business point hint for the [indicator combination, e.g. RSI+Brein belt combination]
Design valuation models for start-up enterprises Create [number, for example, three] different [parameter, for example discount rate] [model type, for example, DCF model]

entries.title: 项目式教学
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/项目式教学.csv
entries.summary: 项目设计 请设计一个以[具体学科]为核心的项目式教学方案，明确项目目标、任务分解、时间安排和评估标准，确保方案具有可操作性和趣味性，能充分激发学
entries.prompt:
项目设计 请设计一个以[具体学科]为核心的项目式教学方案，明确项目目标、任务分解、时间安排和评估标准，确保方案具有可操作性和趣味性，能充分激发学生的学习积极性。
项目实施 请详细阐述在项目式教学中如何引导学生进行有效的小组合作，包括小组组建原则、分工安排、小组讨论和沟通技巧等方面的指导。
项目评估 制定一套全面的项目式教学评估指标体系，从学生的学习成果、团队协作能力、问题解决能力、创新思维等多个维度进行评估，确保评估结果客观、公正。
案例分析 请提供一些成功的项目式教学案例，分析其教学目标、实施过程、教学方法和评估方式，总结其成功经验和可借鉴之处。
教学融合 探讨如何将项目式教学与探究式教学相结合，设计一个教学活动，培养学生的自主探究能力和创新思维。
项目主题构思 结合【学科领域】与【现实情境/热点话题】，构思5个具有启发性和探索价值的项目式教学主题，并简要说明每个主题的教育意义。
项目目标细化 针对【已确定的项目主题】，从知识获取、技能培养、素养提升三个维度，细化出具体、可衡量、可达成的项目式教学目标。
任务拆解与流程设计 将【项目主题】拆解为一系列逻辑连贯的任务，设计详细的任务流程，明确每个任务的开始和结束节点、交付成果以及任务之间的依赖关系。
课堂活动编排 为【项目式教学项目】规划课堂教学活动，包括项目启动会、小组讨论、成果汇报等，确定每个活动的形式、参与方式、时间分配和预期效果。
课外拓展活动规划 制定与【项目式教学项目】相匹配的课外拓展活动计划，如实地考察、专家访谈、社区实践等，阐述活动的目的、实施步骤和安全注意事项。
教学素材收集 收集用于【项目式教学项目】的各类教学素材，包括文字资料、图片、音视频、数据集等，注明素材来源和在项目中的应用场景。
外部资源对接 为【项目式教学项目】寻找合适的外部资源，如合作企业、科研机构、公益组织等，制定合作方案，明确双方的权利和义务，以及资源对接的方式和时间安排。
项目进度管理 制定【项目式教学项目】的进度管理计划，设置关键里程碑，明确每个阶段的任务和时间要求，提供监控项目进度的方法和调整策略。
小组协作指导 针对【项目式教学项目】中小组协作可能出现的问题，如分工不合理、沟通不畅等，提供有效的指导策略，促进小组高效协作。
个性化学习支持 为参与【项目式教学项目】的不同学习能力和风格的学生，制定个性化的学习支持方案，包括学习路径引导、辅导计划等。
评估指标构建 构建【项目式教学项目】的评估指标体系，涵盖项目成果质量、学生学习过程表现、团队协作能力等方面，确定每个指标的权重和评价等级。
过程性评估方案制定 设计【项目式教学项目】的过程性评估方案，明确评估的时间点、评估方式（如观察、记录、测试等）和反馈机制，以促进项目的持续改进。
终结性评估实施细则 制定【项目式教学项目】的终结性评估实施细则，包括评估的组织形式、评分标准、成果展示方式等，确保评估的公平公正。
反馈机制建立 建立针对【项目式教学项目】的反馈机制，收集学生、家长、合作伙伴等各方的反馈意见，说明如何整理、分析和利用这些反馈来优化项目教学。

en.title: Project-based teaching
en.summary: Design a project-based teaching programme with [specific disciplines] at its core, with clear project objectives, mission breakdown, timing and evaluation criteria, to ensure that the programme is operational and interesting and fully stimulating
en.prompt:
Design a project-based teaching programme with [specific disciplines] at its core, with clear project objectives, mission breakdown, timing and evaluation criteria, to ensure that the programme is operational and interesting and fully motivates students to learn.
Please elaborate on how effective team cooperation is being directed to students in project-based teaching, including guidance on principles of group formation, division of labour arrangements, group discussions and communication skills.
Develop a comprehensive system of indicators for project-based teaching and learning assessment, which is assessed from multiple dimensions such as student learning outcomes, teamwork, problem solving, innovative thinking, and ensures that the results are objective and impartial.
Please provide examples of successful project-based teaching, analysing their educational objectives, implementation processes, teaching methods and methods of assessment, and summarizing their successes and lessons learned.
(b) To explore ways of combining project-based teaching with exploratory teaching, designing a teaching activity that builds the student's autonomy and innovative thinking.
Project theme concept. Concepting with [the field of disciplines] and [the reality/hot topic), conceptualize five project-based teaching themes of inspirational and exploratory value and outline the educational significance of each theme.
Project objectives are refined, targeting [the identified project theme], to refine specific, measurable and achievable project-based teaching objectives from knowledge acquisition, skills development and literacy.
Dismantling of tasks and process design Dismantling of [project theme] into a series of logical and coherent tasks, designing detailed mission processes, identifying the starting and closing nodes of each mission, delivering results and the dependency between the tasks.
Classroom activities are organized to plan classroom teaching activities [project-based teaching projects], including project start-up sessions, panel discussions, outcome reporting, etc., and to determine the form, participation, time allocation and expected impact of each activity.
Planning of extracurricular outreach activities Developing plans for extracurricular outreach activities, such as field visits, expert interviews, community practices, etc., that match [project-based teaching projects], outlining the purpose of the activities, implementation steps and security concerns.
Collection of materials for teaching, including text, pictures, audio-visuals, data sets, etc., indicating sources of materials and applications in the project.
External resources docking. To find suitable external resources for [project-based teaching projects], such as cooperative enterprises, scientific institutions, public interest organizations, etc., to develop cooperation programmes, to clarify the rights and obligations of the parties, and the manner and timing of the match.
Project progress management Development of a progress management plan [project-based teaching project], setting key milestones, defining tasks and time requirements for each phase, and providing methods and adjustment strategies to monitor project progress.
Team collaboration guidance provides effective guidance strategies to facilitate efficient team collaboration on issues that may arise from team collaboration in [project-based teaching project], such as the unsound division of labour and poor communication.
Individualized learning support programmes, including learning path orientation, mentoring programmes, etc., are developed for students who are involved in different learning abilities and styles of [project-based teaching project].
(a) The evaluation indicators are constructed. The assessment indicators system is constructed [project-based teaching project], covering the quality of project results, student learning process performance, team teamwork, etc., to determine the weight and evaluation level of each indicator.
Process evaluation programme development Design of process assessment programme [project-based teaching project], with clear time points for assessment, assessment modalities (e.g. observation, documentation, testing) and feedback mechanisms to facilitate continuous project improvement.
Final evaluation implementation rules Develop final evaluation implementation rules for [project-based teaching projects], including organizational modalities, rating criteria, presentation of results, etc., to ensure fairness and fairness in the assessment.
(b) Establish feedback mechanisms for [project-based teaching projects], collecting feedback from students, parents, partners, etc., on how to collate, analyse and use these feedback to optimize project teaching.

entries.title: 预测模型
entries.sourcePath: 聊天文本/问答/预测模型.csv
entries.summary: 预测模型 请基于 [历史数据] 构建预测模型，通过模型训练和优化，精准预测未来趋势，同时评估模型的预测性能和泛化能力
entries.prompt:
预测模型 请基于 [历史数据] 构建预测模型，通过模型训练和优化，精准预测未来趋势，同时评估模型的预测性能和泛化能力。可以使用机器学习算法（如线性回归、决策树等）或深度学习模型（如LSTM、CNN等）进行预测模型的构建，对历史数据进行预处理、特征工程和模型训练，使用交叉验证等方法评估模型的性能和泛化能力。
线性回归 请针对 [具有线性关系的数据] 构建线性回归模型，用于预测连续变量，对模型的系数进行解释，说明每个自变量对因变量的影响程度。可以使用Python的Scikit-learn库进行线性回归模型的构建，对数据进行拟合和预测，使用统计方法对模型的系数进行解释，提高线性回归模型的解释性。
逻辑回归 请对 [分类问题相关数据] 构建逻辑回归模型，预测分类变量，评估模型的分类准确率、召回率等性能指标。可以使用Python的Scikit-learn库进行逻辑回归模型的构建，对数据进行分类和预测，使用评估指标（如准确率、召回率等）对模型的性能进行评估，提高逻辑回归模型的准确性。
决策树 请对 [适合决策树分析的数据] 构建决策树模型，用于分类或回归任务，展示决策树的生成过程和决策规则。可以使用Python的Scikit-learn库进行决策树模型的构建，对数据进行拟合和预测，使用可视化工具（如Graphviz）展示决策树的生成过程和决策规则，提高决策树模型的可解释性。
随机森林 请对 [需要提升预测准确率的数据] 构建随机森林模型，通过集成学习提高预测准确率，分析模型中各特征的重要性。可以使用Python的Scikit-learn库进行随机森林模型的构建，对数据进行拟合和预测，使用特征重要性分析方法（如基尼系数、信息增益等）分析模型中各特征的重要性，提高随机森林模型的预测准确率。
神经网络 请借助强大的学习能力，对 [复杂数据] 构建神经网络模型，进行复杂的数据预测任务，详细描述神经网络的架构和训练过程。可以使用深度学习框架（如TensorFlow、PyTorch等）进行神经网络模型的构建，对复杂数据进行预处理、特征工程和模型训练，使用可视化工具（如TensorBoard）展示神经网络的架构和训练过程，提高神经网络模型的可解释性。

en.title: Forecast models
en.summary: Please construct a projection model based on [historic data], using model training and optimization, to refine future trends, while assessing the predictive performance and generalization of the model
en.prompt:
Forecast models are based on [historic data], and project models are designed to predict future trends through model training and optimization, while assessing their predictive performance and generalization capabilities. The construction of predictive models can be done using machine learning algorithms (e.g. linear regression, decision tree, etc.) or in-depth learning models (e.g. LSTM, CNN, etc.), the pre-processing of historical data, profiling and modelling training, and the assessment of model performance and generalization capabilities using cross-checking, etc.
Linear regressions. Construct linear regression models for [linear data], which are used to predict continuous variables, explain the coefficients of the models and the extent to which each self-variant affects the variable. The Scikit-learn library of Python can be used to construct linear regression models, to compile and predict data, to interpret the coefficients of the models using statistical methods, and to improve the interpretation of linear regression models.
Logical regressions Please construct a logical regression model [as related to classification problems], predict the classification variables, and assess the model’s classification accuracy, recall rates, etc. Performance indicators. The logical regression model can be constructed using the Python Scikit-learn library, the data can be classified and projected, and the model’s performance assessed using assessment indicators (e.g. accuracy, recall rates, etc.) to improve the accuracy of the logical regression model.
The decision tree is designed to construct a decision tree model [data suitable for analysis of the decision tree] for classification or regression tasks, showing the decision tree generation process and decision-making rules. The decision tree model can be constructed using the Scikit-learn library of Python, which can be used to synthesize and predict data, and visualize the decision tree generation process and decision-making rules (e.g. Graphviz) to improve the interpretability of the decision tree model.
(b) Random forest. Please construct random forest models [data that require an increase in the accuracy of projections], improve the accuracy of projections through integrated learning, and analyse the importance of the characteristics in the models. The Scikit-learn library of Python can be used to construct random forest models, to compile and predict data, to use characteristic importance analysis methods (e.g. Gini coefficients, information gain, etc.) to analyse the importance of characteristics in the models and to increase the accuracy of projections in random forest models.
Neuronetworks build neuronet models [of complex data] with a strong learning capability, with complex data prediction tasks, detailing the structure and training processes of the neural network. The construction of neuronetwork models (e.g. TensorFlow, PyTorch, etc.) can be done using a deep learning framework, pre-processing, feature engineering and modelling of complex data, and visualization tools (e.g. TensorBoard) to demonstrate the structure and training processes of the neural network, and to improve the interpretability of the neural network models.
